**Newt Gingrich here.**

Let me be very clear with you.

****[**Democrats trying to cheat and manipulate our elections is nothing new.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/F0QzKMzi92cG90hPPui8LbRqIVQmXNyEEq6_1fmgNajm3Yj_CPWmWrW522a5qO4rqIunHcAro8d1kWRULw7yIZF88gZQ92sCt29sMdIeAd04Nt_aNoKDNhovYOUMfbmEmNwBX_eQGJ7S0Yo7hP4eS7jxeRr7iChCF7AD_7h0sES0aOooL9NdjPtCSGgvPu3qEUcNkiDSyaj1S2hchBytOGU47q41F_jtX8EwP86S77tfD-3ueANSIV1tsyskNZ6SBg_sgUDH6E0x4Ufl611F7eNF0kn6Xe5_KONo5cU4zJJsQIktc0TzTuw4OQfaTQquxd0riWz-jU3h_bDoOjPeECJzcTWpIyt3BxU2AZ6OXntWmdrcD4K1ICmbGshTqgDw55VAhpSbpo3hOPirpp8Rk2g0RVaJA8di6_QkPBwRv73Ybj4ZvTH2YIsOnTqgTagj6ww9mcdayw8vIl31pyf3RuLxx04hxZkD_zjhfFGEKB7bgZsY-Ah__tVu7BZmF4XMsRVu-s9tFakZydPi43rGfGjFlo4TVMU2cgC_72ao3UcXEXKqOipPfXPV4JMO5jZ_UCWjSlupjwW70hDppu2plBEG_-Wdh9d7EKhSTkMQoeSV6fERlonEGWbH8FdxR2PAhK0eBoI5c_2Jalt87CYW8A8XbnL7pr_Y_ZHaSszqnc7nwvEc-bDYr9_MUsTBNULejIh3eYEQMazWnDXg0zWeL6zIFKReKswFhVSUcF5PfL0gdLBcokqW1fusS1sGeCgIRV0JTN8ANvExFJeHr_e4D_TdCNlAcRUnCIJ08wt1QiIdti54AAUjh3z3FsZX-grnvbmVMGvT0HhDLU_SHx-bWJunEM9ofm_ukLmYHhvSVonpkywfeIaubW8L5E1BHMRjvSq6uzuOGV37TWNCDYB90K7xOIPA8EAitGPAVyTbzuvKKbbYIiuWQMRWGLB_pDEwbxe4fHX5TWcXus0dKjF-BMd5TW8JViZGrqXF86GCLqYPcBONqJX25dM91HGGnujDh-AZkZC2c7CXv4grd9jgNcJwWBYM9G8xkn19mtP8NOBGDtSgRLSqUqn7zjcKwnw3jZopcY6dieObVDdP2vAW11b-rmh4NuE/CbDkuZ_P4o7nnj9wzw3OwfxF9eyVOmg1/18)

I've seen it before.

_And I stopped it before._

**It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House.**

The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census.

Their plan was called _" statistical sampling."_

**In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting _real people, one at a time._**

Red states would be undercounted.
Blue states would be completely inflated.
Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast.

It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter.

_**So I sued Bill Clinton --and won.**_

The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling.
They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a _strict, physical headcount._

That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation.

_**Now the same election scam is back.**_

[**Only this time, the consequences are far more dangerous.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/9hrw3V51AEwY9CDCSOgk6XwiDRGjsRgoIAbGNtq0GJLKexC1Ixjy9Msr4Su61zk1FkvT9aWUq5TJYtPjed5PHOaH7eOfO2lgZYIktR5BuAyMl93n8OjfobRv-CDrlBTqi6OUumK_FpA-GLFYVmPkReNpPVR_WlM18c2x8j4HjYwImnuUMsyq1RBu2dehUwo5S5OlvEI6GMcEFBsIYNCj839s4WwkoXuhImf9h4_y-z30MDdPN7wtXYapbjt-zLG3MjVXOsw1z4eMg7eFLtVC6ZPppqEPOqGWdxGJJC7lPwqXOhJul4lcrJMpPCPuKEWwAA3yqJT6_-bHYGsgNNVPz0XXDzD-LKjNU2RophS7w7Wce1vtZi1MjItIgVHh8bZzT9EVLhiqrOFL55ymCn-ideNe8YeefU_25d02S7-xAORwWsELLoT-khWvWf-rBFDnwJA8I6SoirE_uEqF4Zun8Q2GObt-w1_A8a1krXeh2-Ydcnb4yjv9ieNOkvXOemOMqG76YtM9yrCNACf0GML5EV9mtWEf1pRnhC-N6Wm0kif-mTDoS_w_Cxtpy0Mpa4xKW-aNHOiqT1Pm8u9_WWYTqWme6rjJSNVNQ3zBn6i-nSEytChM65s5hPacmCi31vwRYnDzU-KtVe4ggDcNyTB6ckO08b6sYmYXmltam7vCpzSN4zvW1z8s5SmgRUwZkRpJPc4woyQvRwl5YrqpetWhpVKFDLkrdUhMn0l-s6sT9W1E-L9QT__D7mWRPFosaAtVCIS2_f3B-pUeR7_iUIPZk5L5cuD1QKMJpOHCrd-jvzogflA934bh7j_R6lO77hBttT2qAPyp7PweLCiVge24CCsBKM-uU5yd5rXbBqkXzJpO7mhtYuDDBwxlGHubfBKlH0J37c15qP6Geev-vDq-QAch7IrMIoZXZasojYRuIXCWAAwYltw3S6D7K8A4GR4MnZVYUTMWM4HO5IHf6hm04FkBnKf8_DuuFuKR2J6tKx2nYNxfdt3w3hv54w5whGfyE7zIGa540hZ9u0Q5wDb8jY_rMloruJF79nmITXxE-pVUtW7kkEqgIsujtpvCzRJjjwLeZZdyj3ixyPPNd64sv_LHkSXdIxQ/Tw1TefARml9144gbrloOvODp5897_Sou/18)

Not because it's lawful.
Not because it's constitutional.
But because it would permanently tilt political power in the Democrats' favor.

clean_body: | | FROM: FMR. SPEAKER NEWT GINGRICH TO: YOU RE: CENSUS RECOUNT PETITION **** Newt Gingrich here. Let me be very clear with you. ** I've seen it before. And I stopped it before. It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House. The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census. Their plan was called " statistical sampling." In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting real people, one at a time. Red states would be undercounted. Blue states would be completely inflated. Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast. It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter. So I sued Bill Clinton --and won. The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling. They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a strict, physical headcount. That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation. Now the same election scam is back. The Democrats are demanding tens of millions of Biden 's illegal aliens be counted in the Census. Not because it's lawful. Not because it's constitutional. But because it would permanently tilt political power in the Democrats' favor. Over thirty years in politics, and I can't recall a more brazen attempt to subvert the American system. And it 's happening right now in SOCIALIST SUPERSTATES like California and New York. These Democrats didn't roll out the red carpet for millions of illegals out of "compassion"... Republicans like you and me are now facing the most important midterm election of our lifetimes, and we have a clear choice to make: Are we going to let the Democrats STEAMROLL us through rigged Census counts? Or are we going to put U.S. elections back in the hands of U.S. citizens? Below is a petition calling for a CITIZENS ONLY CENSUS RECOUNT. We must put Congress in a pressure cooker. There's no bigger task than the task to secure our elections. Do NOT let the Democrats cheat their way to power. Do NOT let illegal aliens steal your vote. I know we can win this fight. I 've won it before - but I need you by my side. For America, Newt Gingrich Fmr. Speaker of the House Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

One of my most favorite places to go on vacation is Seaside Fl. It's magical, peaceful, with beautiful sugar white sandy beaches and great restaurants.

I have taken my daughter there on vacation and rented a house since she was 3 months old. It's one of our traditions.

One year while I was packing to go for another vacation there, I was asking God if when I get there and walk the beach I could find a sand dollar. Not a broken one - which there are tons of those scattered on the shore - but a whole sand dollar. I know that sounds like a small thing to pray and hope for, but I had always wanted to find one.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.v7ZEjl4iIHFCiZq4ZftfiRHuxZwmQAFLbu_PQwixFkk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=189500479)
We unloaded our bags and headed for the beach. There I was, walking in the water about waste deep, when all of a sudden I walked on something. I reached down, and not only did I find one, but I found hundreds of sand dollars! They were stacked up almost side by side vertically. That is how they grow. Who knew?

They were still alive because they were still gray. If a sand dollar is gray and not white then they are still alive, and you shouldn't take them out of their environment. I just stood there holding 100s of sand dollars in amazement knowing I had found such a rare treasure.

God is into such detail. He let me experience live sand dollars. I slowly put them all back just happy I was able to experience that. It wasn't about a sand dollar, I realized. It was about how good God is and how much he loves the details of each of our lives.

The next day as I walked the beach guess what I found? A small white whole sand dollar made just for me! It's now in my office and every time I see it I am reminded that God cares about every detail and desire. He wants to show us his love and goodness everyday.

If you are open and respect timing and nature you never know what God has for you.
We think in our small minds that He just wants one certain thing for us, but in reality his storehouse is full of blessings he has stored up for you. All we need to do is:
Seek, Knock, Obey, and Believe.

Tomato Spinach Frittata

**INGREDIENTS**
2 tablespoons olive oil, 1 garlic clove - minced, One (6-ounce) package fresh baby spinach, One (10-ounce) can Ro*Tel tomatoes - drained, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon black pepper, One (4.5-ounce) can sliced mushrooms, 12 large eggs - beaten, 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese, 1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese

**DIRECTIONS**
* Preheat oven to 350F
* Heat the oil in a 10-inch (2 inches deep) ovenproof, nonstick skillet over medium heat.
* Add the garlic and saute for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
* Stir in the spinach and cook for 1 minute, or until the spinach begins to wilt.
* Add the tomatoes, salt, and pepper, stirring frequently for 2 to 3 minutes
* Add the mushrooms
* Add the eggs and sprinkle with the cheeses and stir
* Cook for 3 to 5 minutes, gently lifting the edges of the frittata with a spatula and tilting the skillet so the uncooked portion flows underneath
* Place the skillet in the oven and bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown
* Remove from the oven and let stand for 5 minutes
* Slide the frittata onto a large platter and cut into 8 wedges.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

subject: What sets Marie apart
body:
| | Peter –Marie’s brand of leadership is about bringing people together to solve problems, talking and actively listening to the concerns of our community, and always finding new ways to get things done.

She doesn’t take orders from corporate PACs or special interests. That sets her apart – but it also makes her a target for the far-right.

They don’t want someone like Marie – they want a rubber-stamp politician who will vote the way they’re told. National Republicans have spent millions of dollars against Marie since 2022, and they’re prepared to spend even more this year.

name: Team Stevens HQ
subject: Trump is scared he's going to lose the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
He doesn't care about Michigan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14540?t=2&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---
It’s Team Haley, and we want to be clear: Trump didn't come to Michigan last month for the auto industry. He was here because he knows Michigan could decide Senate control – and he’s desperate to hang on to power.
**[That’s why we set a critical $300,000 end-of-month goal to ensure we can fight back. Can we count on you to rush $5 now and help us keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14541?amount=5&t=3&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14542?t=4&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---
Trump has claimed he supports Michiganders, but here’s the truth: He imposed reckless tariffs that hurt Michigan auto workers. And last year, he said he “couldn’t care less” if auto prices go up.
Meanwhile, Haley helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs during President Obama’s auto rescue, and she's spent her career fighting for the good people who keep this state running.
So while Trump and his handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers, try to act as if they care about Michigan’s working families, we're asking you to stand with Haley:
**[Will you chip in $5 to help us fight back and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14541?amount=5&t=5&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14543?t=6&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---

---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14545?t=8&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14542?t=9&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---
With grit,

Team Haley HQ
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14546?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14540?t=11&akid=2342%2E49239%2E5EJB0d)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Team Gina
subject: Mind blowing numbers
body:
We can turn historic turnout into a historic victory with your help.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Something remarkable is happening in Texas.
**For the first time since 2002, Democrats are on pace to outnumber Republicans in a Texas midterm primary.**
Let that sink in. Democratic voters haven’t outnumbered Republican voters in 24 years.
This level of enthusiasm is **mind blowing**. And it’s a sign that Texas voters are fed up and ready for something different.
If Democrats can turn out in higher numbers in the primary, we can cast more ballots in November too. And if we do that, **Gina Hinojosa will be the next Governor of Texas.**
We need the resources to scale up right now to turn this historic momentum into a November victory.
**[Will you chip in today to help Gina reach more voters, build the infrastructure we need, and unseat Greg Abbott?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_2_mindblowing.DyJTKC&refcode=em20260228-677&amount=5&t=1&akid=677%2E299639%2EKqnKH6)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_2_mindblowing.DyJTKC&amount=5&refcode=em20260228-677&t=20&akid=677%2E299639%2EKqnKH6)
Twenty-four years is a long time. Let’s make this the year Texas finally turns the page.
With gratitude,
Team Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260228-2&t=21&refcode2=677_299639_KqnKH6&akid=677%2E299639%2EKqnKH6)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=22&akid=677%2E299639%2EKqnKH6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=23&akid=677%2E299639%2EKqnKH6)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

name: =?utf-8?q?this_is_your_final_notice=E2=80=A6_Fight_for_Reform?=
subject: hold on... you're ignoring us?!?
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) Listen, this is your final notice.

We’ve reached out to you over and over again. It’s probably time to give up, but we had to try and reach you one more time.

All we’re asking for is your signature on our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to [**END _Citizens United_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=3&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) before the Supreme Court ruins all of our progress... but you don’t seem to care?!

We thought after we told you how IMPORTANT this was, you would listen — but [**STILL, NOTHING.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=4&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)

[**The deadline for our petition is TONIGHT at 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=5&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) [**and you are the only Democrat in your area who hasn't responded.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=6&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)

[ **Will you PLEASE add your name to our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to end _Citizens United?_ >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=7&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=8&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
---
Hoping to see your name,

Fight for Reform

**\------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------
From: Horrible Supreme Court news (Fight For Reform)
Subject: Republicans are thrilled...
To: YOU **

[**HORRIBLE BREAKING NEWS FROM THE SUPREME COURT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=9&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
[**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=10&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=11&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO HELP OUR EFFORTS TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=12&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
---
WOW – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=13&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
[**So please , before it’s too late: Sign our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=14&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73163?t=15&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=16&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=17&akid=23968%2E4449941%2EwMrFcW)

Folks, I’ve had it up to HERE with Jon Husted and his buddies in the Senate majority. They clearly only care about one thing and one thing only: keeping their lobbyist friends happy and their campaign coffers overflowing. Meanwhile, families across the country are footing the bill.
We urgently need real fighters – not these spineless suits who roll over every time some special interest donor waves a checkbook in their face. That’s why we need to elect Sherrod Brown. He’s devoted his career to serving Ohio, and he’s not afraid to stand up to the powerful to do what’s right.
But we have a problem. National Republicans will do whatever they can to hold onto their majority, and that means they’re going to spend UNIMAGINABLE amounts of money in Ohio to keep this seat. They shattered spending records going after Sherrod last time, and they're already gearing up to spend even more this cycle. We're talking an absolute tsunami of attack ads.
**That’s why we need to help Sherrod hit every single goal every step of the way, starting with his monthly deadline TONIGHT.[Can you make a $10 split donation RIGHT NOW to help Sherrod win this battleground race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101077?refcode=em20260228-10107&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=9&akid=10107%2E614464%2EnyZ5ci)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101077?refcode=em20260228-10107&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10107%2E614464%2EnyZ5ci)**
If we can win in Ohio, we can win the Senate too. It’s that simple. Let’s go win this thing.
James Carville

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: I don’t scare easily. And I won’t back down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260228em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260228em]
I’m going to be blunt.
While families across Georgia are worrying about rent, groceries, and healthcare, Donald Trump is busy attacking our democracy and making life harder for everyone but his billionaire buddies.
And too many Democrats in Washington are whispering when they should be shouting.
You know me. I don’t whisper.
👉 I flipped a Republican seat that had been red for over 20 years.
👉 I’ve had my district redrawn again and again to try to silence me — and I still won.
👉 I’ve stood on the House floor and called out the GOP’s lies about everything from public education to abortion to COVID data.
So believe me when I say that I don’t scare easily. And I don’t back down.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260228em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260228em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260225em]
Now I’m running for Congress in Georgia’s 13th District because we need a science voice, a truth teller, and a fighter to take on this lawless administration and its enablers.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260225em]
But at midnight tonight, we’re facing our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline yet.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260225em]
Here’s the hard truth: If we’re going to compete in this race — in one of the most critical districts in Georgia — we need to show real strength right now.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260225em]
I’m not funded by corporate PACs or billionaire backroom deals. This campaign runs on nurses, teachers, scientists, small business owners, parents — people who are tired of watching extremists wreck our future.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260225em]
If you’re ready for bold, loud, intentional leadership — I’m asking you to step up before midnight: Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us hit our end-of-month goal and send a clear message that GA-13 is ready to fight back. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260228em]
Thanks for your support,
Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

# Peter, It’s the end of February.
And we have a fundraising deadline. I’m going to make this brief - we’re short on time and the ask is simple. We are ***this*** close to making this the best fundraising month - our campaign momentum is growing, we’re adding supporters every day.
**And it’s thanks to you.****With Caucus and Assembly around the corner, now is the time to make a difference in our campaign.**
_Can you chip in to put us over the top before midnight? Every dollar counts!_

name: Shawn Harris
subject: Special Election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene set for March 10 🚨
body:
🚨 Marjorie Taylor Greene announced her resignation from Congress effective January 5, 2026.
There will be a special election to replace her on March 10, 2026 — that's just 10 days from now.
My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a Retired Brigadier General, a farmer, and I intend to win that election for Georgia and for the American people.
If you are in a position to support my campaign, I need you now more than ever. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Tobias Read to help me restore honor, integrity, and dignity to the U.S. Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-shawnharris]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-shawnharris [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-shawnharris]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-shawnharris]
I’m a fifth-generation farmer and a veteran. I believe in hard work, service, and telling the truth.
Let’s give GA-14 the serious, steady leadership it deserves.
Thanks for your support,
Shawn Harris

Can you split a donation between my campaign and Tobias Read to help me restore honor, integrity, and dignity to the U.S. Congress? [] [] DONATE NOW [] I’m a fifth-generation farmer and a veteran. I believe in hard work, service, and telling the truth. Let’s give GA-14 the serious, steady leadership it deserves. Thanks for your support, Shawn Harris [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | |
# [Hegseth Must Go. TODAY](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3aad8e3-2a81-4477-be3f-18e70ff66e6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Every day Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is in charge of defending our nation is a day that all of us are in danger. He is wildly incompetent, has nowhere near the necessary experience, and he has done incredibly stupid things that have made us vulnerable -- like sending our top secret battle plans via a public chat app (remember that?) **And now that we're in a war that could get much larger very quickly, we can't afford to have people who have no idea what they're doing in such a critically important position. ** **Add your name: "Secretary Hegseth Must Go."**

Last week, we launched **Mission Majority: **our plan to take back a majority in the U.S. House with EMILYs List women. This is our most aggressive target map yet. We built this plan around the bold women who are defending their seats in frontline races, flipping Republican-held seats, and tackling tough terrain in historically red districts. When we planned to launch Mission Majority, we set a goal to **raise $250,000** by the end of the month. We knew then what's only more clear now: that any path to a Democratic House majority runs through EMILYs List women. **[So with less than 5 hours left until the end of February, Peter, will you donate to our Mission Majority fund and give our candidates the support they need to win across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126375901/604766370/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEN81_20260228_FebJMCloser_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057897&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTBhNDg5MC0wOTE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fTLgZkB0Ugqi1_-1KW5ifAeniDqv8sYktikPmPEXWY=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126375902/604766371/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEN81_20260228_FebJMCloser_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057897&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTBhNDg5MC0wOTE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fTLgZkB0Ugqi1_-1KW5ifAeniDqv8sYktikPmPEXWY=)

EMILYs List was built for this moment **–****** because we've been here before. In 2018, facing a 23-seat deficit in the House, EMILYs List women delivered a Democratic majority and a sea-change for women's political leadership. With Donald Trump back in office, I'm proud that Emily's List is once again leading the charge to show that women are at the center of the fight.
This year, the path to stopping Trump's abuses of power runs through small towns in Kentucky, suburbs in Iowa, and seaside South Carolina communities — and EMILYs List women will be the key to winning there. Our women are lifelong public servants, small business teachers, veterans, and so much more. And no matter their background, they're running to give their communities the faithful representation they deserve.

clean_body: Join our people-powered movement to take back the U.S. House. | = Hey Peter, it’s Jessica. Last week, we launched Mission Majority: our plan to take back a majority in the U.S. House with EMILYs List women. This is our most aggressive target map yet. We built this plan around the bold women who are defending their seats in frontline races, flipping Republican-held seats, and tackling tough terrain in historically red districts. When we planned to launch Mission Majority, we set a goal to raise $250,000 by the end of the month. We knew then what's only more clear now: that any path to a Democratic House majority runs through EMILYs List women. = | = EMILYs List was built for this moment –** because we've been here before. In 2018, facing a 23-seat deficit in the House, EMILYs List women delivered a Democratic majority and a sea-change for women's political leadership. With Donald Trump back in office, I'm proud that Emily's List is once again leading the charge to show that women are at the center of the fight. This year, the path to stopping Trump's abuses of power runs through small towns in Kentucky, suburbs in Iowa, and seaside South Carolina communities — and EMILYs List women will be the key to winning there. Our women are lifelong public servants, small business teachers, veterans, and so much more. And no matter their background, they're running to give their communities the faithful representation they deserve. ****=****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Peter,

As we end the final day of Black History month, and head into the final days to get out the vote before Tuesday’s primary election, I’m filled with immense gratitude. **I’m so grateful to represent this community in Congress.** Since being elected to Congress in 2022, I’m proud to work everyday to fight for a brighter future for my home district. **I’m so grateful to call this community my home.** I was raised here by my parents, whose principles guide my work in Congress. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. **And I’m so grateful to have YOUR support, Peter.** Time and time again, you’ve stepped up to the plate and had my back every step of the way. And with just a few days until our primary election, it humbles me to know I can count on you. **[If you’re able, I’d be truly thankful if you chipped in to support this campaign today. We have just a few days to go until Election Day, and every contribution, no matter the size, makes a difference. Because it’s less about the amount, it’s about the strength of the grassroots team standing behind this work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126375962/604767289/-87142129?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_022826_B2_EOM6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWMxNWRkOS0wOTE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onTyJSZRH5c6IJ5fPsVyorwiu474WRFxDwNuzXtPgC8=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Hello,
**My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.**
I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council.
But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again.
**I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.**
Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. With the right Democrat, we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.
Our campaign has set a goal to raise another $250,000 before our end-of-February deadline at midnight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:**
[**Please, will you make a monthly donation right now – every single dollar you can afford to give today – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126376078/604768306/156431970?refcode=20260228pm-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRmYmVkZjctMDkxNS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtE_flwM74GE6s3szzStfiwZL8-t4iZ6RCOVWKYufGg=)

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: 248 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
There are 248 days until the midterm general elections. We have way less than that until primaries start this year. And state legislative sessions have already started, with more right around the corner, and suppressive bills are on the rise again.
What does this all mean? Our work is going full speed right now , not waiting for the summer or the primaries or even in just a few weeks. The foundation we lay today is what sets the stage for November's elections.
RUSH $35 or more right now and help make every vote count and every voice heard in our elections nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=022826_4&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Atlantic: Donald Trump’s Plan to Subvert the Midterms Is Already Under Way [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=022826_4&amount=25]
Team, that headline from The Atlantic says it all.
Donald Trump already promised as part of his 2024 campaign that “ we’ll have it fixed so good, you’re not gonna have to vote .” Watching his actions after he lost in 2020 -- lies, denial, rallies, all leading to January 6th -- it's not hard to imagine what he's got in mind for November.
Our states run our elections. But that doesn't mean that MAGA-aligned politicians won't follow his illegal orders to interfere. It doesn't stop him from using ICE agents to intimidate at the polls or threaten eligible voters. And it doesn't stop his Department of Justice from trying to interfere through the courts, especially when more than half of the suppressive lawsuits brought to court this year were brought by the very federal department that's supposed to protect our rights.
None of that takes into account the highly partisan efforts for mid-decade redistricting as well. It's clear that the threats to the next election aren't going to stop. That's where we come in.
We must inform voters, defend our elections, and make sure every eligible vote counts. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to fuel our voting rights work for 2026 and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=022826_4&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=022826_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=022826_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=022826_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=022826_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=022826_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=022826_4&amount=35]
Our democracy, our elections, and our fundamental right to vote have been under attack for more than a decade. Our electoral system is reaching a breaking point, and it's hard to predict exactly where the next set of electoral shenanigans will come from.
Are we destined to watch our elections break down? Absolutely not. We still have the time and the people to win. What we need most is the resources to carry on this fight for our democracy and the work to make every voice heard in our elections.
Stopping their attempts to subvert the midterms will require courage and integrity across the board. Most of all, it will depend on individual Americans like us to stand up for our rights and demand that our votes are counted.
This is a fight we can and will win. Stand with us to protect the right to vote by pitching in with $35 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=022826_4&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=022826_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=022826_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Stand with us to protect the right to vote by pitching in with $35 or whatever you can today >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: $1 today, fair elections tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260228-253&t=1&akid=253%2E12592%2EGBesCY)
_What if protecting fair elections only cost $1?_
Right now, a nationwide fight over redistricting is deciding whether voters choose their leaders or politicians choose their voters. In Virginia, we have an opportunity to level the playing field in Congress by voting yes on a constitutional amendment this spring.
That is why we are asking for something simple: **[Can you chip in $1 today?](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/138?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260228_2.2HTihE&refcode=20260228-253&t=2&akid=253%2E12592%2EGBesCY)**
Just one dollar helps us:
* **Reach voters;**
* **Push back against rigged maps;**
* **Defend the basic promise of democracy;**
* **Fund organizing, voter education, and the rapid response work we'll need in the weeks ahead**

A dollar today can help ensure fair elections tomorrow.
This fight is about whether every vote counts and whether our democracy works the way it should. When Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are putting their thumbs on the scale to determine control of Congress, we here in Virginia are stepping up to give our voters the right to approve their own maps.
[**If enough people give just $1, we can meet this moment and protect Virginia’s elections and representation. Early voting starts next week. We don't have time to waste: Can you be one of the people we critically need to step up today?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/138?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260228_2.2HTihE&refcode=20260228-253&t=3&akid=253%2E12592%2EGBesCY)
**[Donate $1 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/138?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260228_2.2HTihE&refcode=20260228-253&t=22&akid=253%2E12592%2EGBesCY)**
Thank you for believing that democracy is worth investing in, even just a dollar at a time,
Team Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=253_12592_GBesCY&akid=253%2E12592%2EGBesCY)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Spineless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re here to elect the next generation of leaders.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260228-3&t=1&akid=3200%2E587540%2E07aB0x)
_“Spineless.” “Complacent.” “Paralyzed.” “Afraid.”_
That’s how Democratic and Democratic-leaning voters described the Democratic Party in a recent _New York Times_ focus group.
And when those voters were asked what they do want? They were crystal clear. Young, progressive candidates from working and middle-class backgrounds with clear, simple messages, and the backbone to fight.
**Here's the advice they gave Democrats:**
\- Stand up. Don't back down.
\- Be bold.
\- Pick a message and stick to it.
\- Run candidates that make wealthy donors nervous.
They’re asking for leaders who will _use_ their power. That's why Leaders We Deserve exists, Peter.
We're not here to elect younger versions of the same politicians who got us into this mess. **We're here to elect the next generation of leaders who aren't sellouts and suckers.** People who actually fight, who actually deliver, and who aren't afraid to take on entrenched power. Our party can change its message all we want but that won't fix a courage and messenger problem. That's why we exist.
[**So, will you pitch in $5 now to help us hit our $30,000 end-of-month goal and elect the next generation of leaders?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260228_3_eom.G7H1KS&refcode=em20260228-3200&amount=5&t=2&akid=3200%2E587540%2E07aB0x)

name: John Padora For Colorado
subject: Just Hours Left - Let’s Finish Strong and Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
We are so close to our end of month goal. Chip in now and help us start March with the strength to defeat Lauren Boebert.

This race is bigger than Lauren Boebert. Colorado’s Fourth District is filled with cultural and economic diversity - from sprawling cities to growing suburbs, small towns, farms, ranches, and hardworking families trying to build a future. I love this district. I love our neighbors. And I have driven thousands of miles to listen to them. Teachers. Farmers. Small business owners. Working parents. What I hear over and over again is this: **our leaders are not listening. They just want to hear themselves talk.** I am running to change that. I am running to bring the voice of our community to Washington DC - to work for **ALL AMERICANS** and deliver federal reforms that actually impact our lives where we need it most. This campaign is not about me. **I am the vehicle.**
**I am the mechanism to carry YOUR voice to DC.**
And I will never take that lightly. But I cannot do this without you. If we hit this goal tonight, we start March strong. We show momentum. We prove that grassroots energy beats corporate cash. We prove that this district is ready for serious leadership. [**WATCH OUR NEW AD - then chip in and help us put it in front of every voter in CO-04.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/WhGZ4N11dqHYs0HHSIVMng~~/AAUS1hA~/JhA_lSJWVrbtzOkZO4ZewBCmT0bTiJ19wEsXY7vfH1yXYDfNFWLFY9Dn2ISWQEOAkvjLiz3NA1UdK2qBamwF9dAlmFk1iZ2JyIJMMcSsp5Q3WNc3qPRwy-vlUyozweIsE1z93B-B-xt2srLcqsDOoQ~~) We are close. Closer than we have ever been. Chip in now and help us start March with the strength to defeat Lauren Boebert. | | | ~~ Friend, We are just HOURS AWAY from our end of month deadline - and we are getting so close. This race is bigger than Lauren Boebert. Colorado’s Fourth District is filled with cultural and economic diversity - from sprawling cities to growing suburbs, small towns, farms, ranches, and hardworking families trying to build a future. I love this district. I love our neighbors. And I have driven thousands of miles to listen to them. Teachers. Farmers. Small business owners. Working parents. What I hear over and over again is this: our leaders are not listening. They just want to hear themselves talk. I am running to change that. I am running to bring the voice of our community to Washington DC - to work for ALL AMERICANS and deliver federal reforms that actually impact our lives where we need it most. This campaign is not about me. I am the vehicle. I am the mechanism to carry YOUR voice to DC. And I will never take that lightly. But I cannot do this without you. If we hit this goal tonight, we start March strong. We show momentum. We prove that grassroots energy beats corporate cash. We prove that this district is ready for serious leadership. ~~ We are close. Closer than we have ever been. ~ Help me replace Lauren Boebert. ~ Every single dollar matters. Fellow Conservative,

**_“Republicans Face Tough Battle Defending Senate Majority in 2026 Midterms”_** – one recent warning read.

Here is what I know: If we lose the Senate, the radical Left will ram through their agenda unchecked – and God help Montana and America if that happens.

As a Navy SEAL who fought for this country overseas, and now fighting for Montana in the Senate, I’m not letting that happen on my watch.

| Peter,
---
This is what it looked like after the Democrats' goons arrested and booked me in one of the most violent jails in America...

__
---
On that day, I remember thinking this is it – _this is what it looks like when the Radical Left and their Deep State take political persecution and LAWFARE to its limit._
---
**_But boy was I wrong!_**
---
The Democrats would continue to go to unimaginable lengths to not just try to put me behind bars, but to utterly ruin me personally, professionally, and financially... all because I defended my dear friend, a true patriot, and our President – Donald J. Trump.
---
They proceeded to **STRIP me of my law licenses** and the means to defend myself. They forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**. And even now, they’re trying to use bogus _state-level_ charges that President Trump cannot _federally_ pardon to throw me behind bars for the rest of my life!
---
But as I recently emailed to tell you, I still have hope that justice can prevail.
---
_Especially after this breaking report:_
---
_**“Republicans are demanding _FULL_ _RESTITUTION_ for Rudy Giuliani, who was charged with 13 felony counts and fined $148 million after contesting Georgia’s 2020 election, following Fulton County’s admission that 315,000 votes were fraudulently counted.”**_
---
My day for TRUE justice and restitution will come. If our free Republic is to survive, __it__ __has__ __to__.
---
Remember, this kind of political persecution won’t end with me. If we don’t FIGHT BACK here and now, then the precedent is set.
---
But I’m counting on every last patriot to stand with me and demand it!
---
And as it stands, I’m still missing _YOUR_ signature.
---
**So, I _humbly_ ask that YOU join the Republicans who are calling for “FULL RESTITUTION” for yours truly.**
---
This is the only way to make me whole, Peter.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Today’s attack on Iran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

This is an illegal war. And it is one whose end, whose cost in lives and
treasure, no one can predict.

Only the American people, through their representatives in Congress, can
choose to take this country to war.

Because war involves taking enemy lives, losing American lives and
committing Americans to foot the bill for whatever flows from a war;
because Presidents (of any party) are inherently inclined to commit our
country to war; the authors of the U.S. Constitution — the supreme law of
our land — vested the power of going to war in the people’s
representatives in Congress.

Here’s what happens when we defy the constitution, refuse to listen to the
American people, and begin wars of choice, as President Trump has done
today:

Nearly 60,000 Americans died in Vietnam. It cost this country $1.6
trillion (in today’s dollars). More than a million Vietnamese were killed.

More than 2,400 Americans died in Afghanistan. It cost this country $2.5
trillion (in today’s dollars). More than 200,000 Afghans were killed.

More than 4,400 Americans died in Iraq. It cost this country $1.1 trillion
(in today’s dollars). More than 300,000 Iraqis were killed.

My hope is that no American is injured or killed in this war. I hope that
no more Iranians are killed in this war. I hope that the war concludes
very soon. Most of that is out of my control.

What’s in our control is doing everything we can to end America’s wars of
choice by demanding an end to this one (protesting, speaking out, holding
our representatives to account for how they react to what has happened
today — including forcing a vote to end this war) and electing people to
office who will obey the Constitution and the rule of law and respect the
American people — especially our service members and veterans — who have
been made to bear the brunt of these wars of choice over the last 60
years.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=240721%2E444211%2EceXXWh

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Friends,This Coming Tuesday is Election Day. Please plan to get out and vote if you have not already. Montgomery County allows you to early vote at any location, but on **Election Day,** you must vote at the specific poll location assigned to your precinct. Due to population growth, new precincts have been added. Scroll down for important links.
_Your normal voting location may be different._
Please double-check for the correct polling location before you head out to vote.
Harris County allows anyone to vote at any location, even on Election Day.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I always knew my opponent could be bought, but this is especially appalling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Epstein's "co-conspirator" is Jon Husted's billionaire donor
#
Peter,
We always knew Jon Husted could be bought, but this is especially appalling. Take a look:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101144?refcode=em20260228-10123&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10123%2E614464%2EnR0uIQ)
Here are the facts: **New reports reveal that my opponent, Jon Husted, has taken 10x more money than any U.S. Senator from billionaire Leslie Wexner. Wexner is a longtime associate of Jeffrey Epstein and one of his co-conspirators.**
It gets worse. Husted didn’t just take Wexner’s money.
When the Senate had the chance to release the Epstein files and provide accountability for the victims, **Husted voted against it.**
Wexner’s most recent donation to Husted came _just a few weeks before that vote._ You do the math.
It all makes me sick to my stomach.
Ohioans deserve transparency. We deserve accountability.
**We deserve a senator who fights for working people, not one who protects the rich and powerful. Not one who protects the Epstein class. Not one who protects pedophiles.**
I've spent my career holding powerful interests accountable – and I'm fighting as hard as I can to unseat Jon Husted and prove that working people, justice, and accountability matter more than protecting billionaires.
But no one person could win this fight alone. I need you, Peter.
**[If you believe the super wealthy shouldn’t get special treatment – and the truth shouldn’t be hidden – I’m asking you to split $10 or whatever you can today between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us flip Ohio and bring accountability back to the Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101144?refcode=em20260228-10123&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10123%2E614464%2EnR0uIQ)**
Thank you.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=3&akid=10123%2E614464%2EnR0uIQ).

This is urgent,
Peter Willis,

Grassroots fundraising is down for the fourth month in a row, and if we
don’t close the gap, we’re going to need to scale back — at the worst
possible time!

We set an urgent goal to raise $12,345 by midnight TONIGHT to power our
crucial work in the midterms, in the streets — and for rapid response like
today after Trump bombed Iran.

We’re mounting public pressure on Congress to call the War Powers Act
ASAP, but we’re also in the final weekend of GOTV in NC and Texas — where
we can elect progressives to Congress and other powerful seats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35362?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20230228nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10303%2E5885482%2EgFYVma ]This is no time for us to scale back. We rely on the grassroots for the
resources to keep up the fight. Will you chip in whatever you can right
now to help us close the gap before March 1?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Right now, the truth is our small team is firing on all cylinders to meet
this moment:

* Our 100,000 strong Citizen Action Team is in rapid response against
War in Iran, lobbying on Capitol Hill, and organizing the March 28 No
Kings Day events to break records.
* Our powerful GOTV machine is working around the clock to organize
phone banks and hit the streets to make sure we elect progressives in
important primaries from North Carolina to Illinois to Texas.
* We’re rapidly scaling up our work to take on the oligarchs with sharp
exposés – amplifying our hard-hitting videos and targeted protest
actions.
* And our grassroots team is organizing mass mobilizations, coordinating
mutual aid, and running neighborhood patrols to protect our
communities from ICE.

The truth is that ALL of this work is important right now – but if we
don’t close this gap, we won’t be able to do it all.

And that’s exactly what Trump and his cronies want. Because the truth is
we have a target on our back because the work we do is EFFECTIVE. Fox News
Radio is calling us “Bernie Sanders’ Gestapo,” Breitbart is publishing hit
pieces, and MAGA senators are pushing legislation to go after organizers.

These tactics to silence us will not work. Bernie founded us in 2016 with
a mission, and we won’t back down.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35362?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20230228nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10303%2E5885482%2EgFYVma ]Falling short could mean we’re forced to scale back where we’re needed
most in 2026. It could mean doors we can’t knock on to elect progressives
and defeat MAGA in the midterms. It could mean protests we have to scale
back. But if enough people rush an urgent donation now we’ll be able to
meet the far right’s intimidation head on – together.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Team Cooper for Senate
subject: last one
body:
3 quick things
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
Hi Peter — here are three things you need to know right now:
1. We have just hours left to help Roy Cooper meet this end-of-month fundraising deadline for February.

2. **This is our last monthly fundraising deadline before Primary Day on March 3.**

3. We need to get into the strongest possible position for this extremely competitive U.S. Senate seat — _before D.C. Republicans throw everything they have behind the official GOP nominee._

**[Help us finish this month strong and show the nation we’re ready to flip the Senate blue together. Any amount helps.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6352?t=7&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6352?t=8&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)**
---
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=651%2E124072%2EkodBjy)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE**
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KTVthrGjmHI27SNCnLUUV3Ir_Aie76ZHXG66xlQ6JBsINCWBhTvyUfw4YpWPc5ZM-4e7nTU9NJrZYCY1Vg0hXOpyIU-QkeDPdkFoWzOdgGf-LwYk0kPqeEoJnGL85DGYTXqjuEE0HMSbZ4D5r-352N4YImDtWCYMVBmccL1jB1O1omFe18n_uf8EsPVcfk80ffnv4DEDv4IITkzeF2waUm8-d63hW47Cikfhd5ezcEF7WENdX5prpj6Fjb7QxECQh6GQEhliozI0aBu8yrn8Er6Ao_mJV-QRyKXan5qsM3iYIVLtN_ftQX9HtDm_voK7JbttCQRp6q6wIH7Rgpq1RILaWYzmh5Ij4Z4iKX1kY4AtfSIFPsQ-o0k2YF9rbgwSzFakxWfgRhuByFFF7sHw5hUtxOk4UJSYWiz8AQ5fCtEra3SAkwqf-pi6GT9ycUuSCLGcNkpZVhyd_YUsUY2sxtZWWSc9g9cxL2DDV6d13r_ufevP1jHgF-RN0wO0x-lQ7KSGqzJe-izYRw51MI6qA_TAhhUfVEitx0O1QjXp-qszYUKvAFSMcXCZtvRoijUdZQjbKKoOQytMZdKIfFDLVZgWS9N7vxngg8P9_FxaEn6iap0j1xS8zwvq0YPX_UsKpDyxHcNathzmUwoxKVjGxh0s_NTzDtV3sq1iZVJAlxOKCZyue76nRO5A34bb-eDri_TFBP-1ok-aTOeb5-8s2BcabPmO2tqblCxJrDyn1x5fH-cbloDmpLqg7gtyp93xwUKwN74ZdGoQLl-c2QP9U0C11FGKmJ8lZ3RZgyhGSsvXg12Bs8Hd6_uEPk3-_41TW4dbXIaaz2uLlhJnmJkpkKBcwsuOxs9T5vWrU69gVcnBrkxSVgHksWrXmCCiqzW71nUYqicnHNT_KnuGhkc6rsWA5uZJBfzncn9ECzU/AiHNg4Xzu_mDZ6fD9w4Vpel03s_cqPYi/18)
---
******** Peter,

Michael with Team Collins here, and we need to bring something **URGENT** to your attention.

Mark Levin just sounded the alarm:

body:
Peter,
I'll get straight to the point.
House Republicans are facing the most aggressive Democrat assault we've seen in years -- and it's focused on 29 critical battleground districts that will decide control of Congress.
That's why I personally approved a 29X IMPACT INITIATIVE, effective immediately.Here's what that means for you:
Your donation today doesn't just help one race -- it helps 29 must-win House seats at once.
$5 becomes 29X more powerful,
$10 becomes 29X more powerful,
$25 becomes 29X more powerful, or
ANY AMOUNT becomes 29X more powerful!
This isn't a gimmick. It's a targeted, battlefield strategy designed to stop Democrats from flipping the House by a single seat.

clean_body: Peter, I'll get straight to the point. House Republicans are facing the most aggressive Democrat assault we've seen in years -- and it's focused on 29 critical battleground districts that will decide control of Congress. That's why I personally approved a 29X IMPACT INITIATIVE, effective immediately.Here's what that means for you: Your donation today doesn't just help one race -- it helps 29 must-win House seats at once. $5 becomes 29X more powerful, $10 becomes 29X more powerful, $25 becomes 29X more powerful, or ANY AMOUNT becomes 29X more powerful! This isn't a gimmick. It's a targeted, battlefield strategy designed to stop Democrats from flipping the House by a single seat. And make no mistake - if they win even ONE of these districts, everything we're fighting for is at risk. But here's the catch: Once it closes, this opportunity is gone. We're counting on proven patriots like you to step up when it matters most. you for standing with us in this defining moment. clean_body: I can’t do this alone. | | = Hey Peter, I’ll be honest: I’m feeling the weight of this moment. Tonight at midnight is our end-of-month deadline, and I’m reaching out because we’re falling short of our goal. = THE ATTACKS: Donald Trump and his allies have launched a fresh wave of attacks against me simply because I voted to protect your right to vote and against their voter suppression bill. But it only proves we’re doing the right thing. THE MOMENT: I just officially filed my paperwork to be on the ballot in California’s 9th district. It’s an honor to serve my community, but with new district lines, thousands of voters in my new district don't know who I am or what I stand for yet. Some of them have never seen my name on the ballot before, so I have to earn their trust. And I can't do that alone. THE REALITY: We are currently $6,570 short of our goal and the deadline is coming up quickly at midnight. The GOP already has a massive cash advantage against us, so we can’t afford to fall even further behind. I don’t have corporate PACs in my corner, I only have you. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for always standing with me, Josh *

name: Katie Porter
subject: I wasn’t going to email this late but this is too important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
I know it’s late on a Saturday, so I’ll get right to it. **We’re just hours away from our February end-of-month deadline and I could use your help.**
A recent poll shows our campaign as the #1 Democratic campaign in this race.
I am going to do everything I can to ensure our campaign advances from the primary election in June to the general election in November so the choice in November isn’t between two Republican candidates.
**Will you rush a donation before midnight tonight so I can defeat our Republican opponents and WIN this race? Here’s a personal link where you can pitch in:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260228_3_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260228_3_ak.7pxuQF&refcode=em20260228-40912&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40912%2E3422442%2EVy8cTw)**
Thank you,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40912&t=2&akid=40912%2E3422442%2EVy8cTw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40912)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40912&t=3&akid=40912%2E3422442%2EVy8cTw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

---

Friend: There are _only a few hours_ left until my end-of-month deadline at midnight — **and I still need to raise****another $4,726 to reach this critical goal.**

_**[Will you please rush a gift right now to help power my campaign to become governor of New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk285-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7787%2E400544%2EZK-K2T)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk285-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7787%2E400544%2EZK-K2T)
---
Right now, all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico as the GOP prepares to spend big to flip this seat. And that's because they know, just as well as we do, that New Mexico’s governorship tends to flip parties every eight years — **and they’re coming for this seat right on schedule**.
And now, betting markets show this race is tightening, and our opponents are seizing on it as a green light to pour even more money into New Mexico.

We cannot back down without a fierce fight, friend.
**I'm in this race to lower costs, invest in education, and make healthcare more accessible and affordable. I am also ready to be a brick wall to Donald Trump and his administration when they want to sow violence and fear and drag an extremist agenda to our state. But I can't win in 2026 and deliver on these promises without your support.**
**_[Please, will you chip in whatever you can spare before tonight's midnight deadline so we can win this race and deliver progress for New Mexico's working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk285-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7787%2E400544%2EZK-K2T)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk285-fr-nd&t=5&akid=7787%2E400544%2EZK-K2T)
---
Thank you for your support, friend.

Be fierce,
Deb

clean_body: | | | Friend: There are only a few hours left until my end-of-month deadline at midnight — and I still need to raiseanother $4,726 to reach this critical goal. | | Right now, all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico as the GOP prepares to spend big to flip this seat. And that's because they know, just as well as we do, that New Mexico’s governorship tends to flip parties every eight years — and they’re coming for this seat right on schedule. And now, betting markets show this race is tightening, and our opponents are seizing on it as a green light to pour even more money into New Mexico. We cannot back down without a fierce fight, friend. I'm in this race to lower costs, invest in education, and make healthcare more accessible and affordable. I am also ready to be a brick wall to Donald Trump and his administration when they want to sow violence and fear and drag an extremist agenda to our state. But I can't win in 2026 and deliver on these promises without your support. | | Thank you for your support, friend. Be fierce, Deb | | | | |

body:

Hey.
Before you log off for the evening, we wanted to reach out one final time to ask:
**[Can you chip in for the very first time in 2026 ahead of tonight’s monthly fundraising deadline?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260228_3.T9sLj0&refcode=em20260228-3&t=2&akid=5363%2E582294%2E1mugYn)**
We’re incredibly close to reaching our February goal. We did the math, and if you and just a few other donors contribute before midnight tonight, we’ll be able to hit it.
If you can spare even a couple of bucks before this deadline, we would be extremely grateful. You can use this link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20260228_3?refcode=em20260228-3](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260228_3.T9sLj0&refcode=em20260228-3&t=3&akid=5363%2E582294%2E1mugYn)**
Thank you for being a part of this campaign. We’re proving that New Hampshire’s Senate seat is _not for sale._
More soon,
Team Pappas

body:
| | Our February deadline is just hours away, Peter, so I wanted to reach out one last time to ask:

In order to reach our $45,000 February goal, I need a few more supporters to chip in before midnight:

Peter,

I won't mince words and get straight to the point.

February is the shortest month of this Election Year. That means we have less time than ever to hit our critical fundraising goal.

Here's the problem: **we were outraised by my liberal Democrat opponent last month.**

clean_body: We were outraised in January. We can’t fall behind again. | Peter, I won't mince words and get straight to the point. February is the shortest month of this Election Year. That means we have less time than ever to hit our critical fundraising goal. Here's the problem: we were outraised by my liberal Democrat opponent last month. The Left is energized. They are organized. And they are pouring money into this race because they know I stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Donald Trump. And that makes them raving mad. February may be short - but the stakes couldn't be higher. Conservatives like you are the last line of defense against Democrats taking back the Senate and undoing everything we've fought to accomplish. If we let them outraise us month after month, it could be a complete and utter failure - and a return to the Obama/Biden/Schumer agenda. I can't win this race alone. Thank you for being part of this team. Lindsey Graham | In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: We need your help in Nacogdoches County
body:
We’re not writing off a single county in Texas.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
You know something big is happening in Texas.
Texans are fed up with politics as usual. They're ready for change.
If we want to win in a state as large and diverse as Texas? _We can 't write anyone off._ No county is too small, too red, or too "out of the way" to be ignored.
**Our 254 County Plan targets every voter, and we 're asking you to support Nacogdoches County, where there are currently 39,731 Texans registered to vote.**
**[Will you chip in $5 to help us reach voters in your county before tomorrow's primary?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_3_254counties.vGVZ2u&refcode=em20260228-678&amount=5&t=1&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_3_254counties.vGVZ2u&amount=5&refcode=em20260228-678&t=20&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)
For years, politicians have **_stopped showing up._** We can't expect voters to turn out _if we don 't either._
Texans deserve leaders that have to compete. Leaders who are held accountable and are putting up a fight to prove they care.
I will continue showing up. From the Valley to the Panhandle, from El Paso to Houston, I will not write off a single county or a single Texan.
Here's the reality: **organizing across 254 counties costs money.** We need people on the field, phone banking, hanging signs, door-knocking. And it adds up fast.
**Your vote is not just a ballot. It 's power.**
**[Will you give $5 to help us ensure no county is left behind?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_3_254counties.vGVZ2u&refcode=em20260228-678&amount=5&t=21&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260228_3_254counties.vGVZ2u&amount=5&refcode=em20260228-678&t=40&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)
Texans, let's show up. Vote early, vote strong.
With gratitude,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260228-3&t=41&refcode2=678_299639_dthbt7&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=43&akid=678%2E299639%2Edthbt7)
