# Act Now! Join Newt Gingrich and Support Christine Bish's Campaign!

| |
---
| | | | Dear Friend,
Newt Gingrich just warned Republicans: if we don’t run a unified national campaign and fight for the truth, we will lose by inches.
I’m Christine Bish, Republican candidate for Congress in California’s 6th District, and I’m running to protect the House majority and stop the Democrats’ agenda cold.
As a constitutional conservative, small business owner, and lifelong advocate for our values, I’m committed to affordable housing, restoring the economy, reforming education, protecting parents’ rights, and rebuilding our military. We’ve seen what happens when Democrats control the agenda – higher taxes, lax borders, and policies that undermine our freedoms. We can’t let that continue.
Our end-of-month deadline is here today, February 28th, and we cannot afford to fall short. Your support is crucial to building the resources we need for a strong, unified campaign that fights for the truth and delivers wins for conservatives.
Can you chip in today to help us win? Every dollar counts in this battle to flip CA-06 and strengthen the Republican majority.
Together, we can heed Newt Gingrich’s warning and secure a brighter future for America.
Thank you for standing with me.
In Freedom,Christine Bish Republican Candidate for Congress, CA-06
P.S. This is our moment to unite and fight back. Don’t wait! Contribute before midnight tonight!

name: Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
subject: My time with Jeffrey Epstein
body:
My story of meeting Jeffrey Epstein is unusual. Fortunately for me, I didn’t end up one of his victims. At the time, I was 27 years old and, by then, too old and well-connected (and protected) for his tastes.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6m5goshbcbav4djj2hgnd93bds221goin4ljiig_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs) Friend,

My story of meeting Jeffrey Epstein is unusual. Fortunately for me, I didn’t end up one of his victims. At the time, I was 27 years old and, by then, too old and well-connected (and protected) for his tastes.

We met in Aspen, Colorado. He was charming, funny, and attentive. He offered me a ride back to NYC on his private jet. With several friends in common, I had no reason to suspect the darkness that hid behind his glamorous facade.

Shortly thereafter, he invited me down to his palatial estate in Palm Beach, but once I arrived, I knew something was wrong. He was naked in his pool, making calls. When I declined to similarly disrobe, he started making vulgar remarks about my bathing suit and make-up.

**Before I tell you the rest of my story, allow me to introduce myself _(Please keep reading)_.**

My name is Jennifer Grossman (JAG), and I serve as the CEO of The Atlas Society. Our mission is to engage young people with the ideas of Ayn Rand in creative ways to equip the next generation with the virtues of reason, productivity, and achievement.

In a world in which young women, in particular, are vulnerable to the irrational, destructive woke agenda of the left — peddling victimhood, envy, resentment, fear, and entitlement — Ayn Rand’s inspiring female protagonists and her empowering message of individualism and freedom, can help young women defend themselves against predators, whether dangerous deviants like Jeffrey Epstein, or predatory leftists seeking to prey on gullibility to amass power.

**[You can support The Atlas Society’s mission by donating $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount by clicking here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcmpmi6sndtvo4nsfttj5kelfaogrvp32n6q4ao_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)**

**The rest of my story with Jeffrey Epstein: ⬇️⬇️⬇️**

Fortunately, I believe Epstein recognized I was not a suitable candidate to become one of his victims. At 27 years old, I was already 13 years older than his oldest victim.

Predators like Epstein are also experts at recognizing the weak and vulnerable—and avoiding those with experience and resources.

**Why am I telling you this story, and how does it relate to our mission at The Atlas Society?**

Here’s the ugly truth: The story of Jeffrey Epstein is about more than perversion and predation. **It’s about power** — gaining power over his victims and wielding power over the rich and powerful he hoped to ensnare in his network.

His strategy was all about finding shortcuts, cutting corners, and manipulating others. He didn’t seek productive win-win relationships with equals but rather sought to bring others (girls and peers) down to his own depraved level. He didn’t seek to live with integrity — he sought to destroy it in others.

It’s the absolute antithesis of the vision presented in Ayn Rand’s novels like _Atlas Shrugged_ and _The Fountainhead_ , where heroic entrepreneurs and independent creative geniuses pursue lives of productivity and integrity.

Even critics of Ayn Rand’s fiction acknowledge that her villains are eerily accurate characterizations of the moochers, looters, and second-handers we see around us — people trying to get something for nothing, not by bringing their best efforts and ideas to the table, but by promoting fear and victimhood to exploit others.

**At The Atlas Society, we’re helping young people recognize — and defend themselves — against such parasites.**

In a day and age where daily book reading has plummeted 85% since the late 1970s, we introduce young people to Rand’s philosophy of individualism, honesty, and responsibility through wildly creative means such as graphic novels, animated videos, edgy social media, as well as weekly events and our annual student conference.

[I am asking you to consider supporting The Atlas Society’s mission by helping us reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors in the next 48 hours. Can I count on your support? Please use one of the links below to make an URGENT donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ausm39cut9pqs7j2bb8jfn495bejdvbpskn6jo_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5mfaf07lrqn560dnk5is7qlqi4aekolt56p440_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zno41bk1ice9n9ee6v5uk79a9t97eeg822qv61ng_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggj0m5413aida56aub1kv0fgd3n693njp1jpf7g_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3uhf6r1rh14d5kp5flhalcs9cbrne76u57tdpk0_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsabtgek2l5qab88oo10abdtqvqp0v3tmo0a7tq0_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za58b6f21aq7iigaobv16o18l7qiqmlb48n85d1g_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl97u7edjki23em1uhmpjlumm5gqfc0e3bne1728_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

[Donate ANY Amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1h3jdbhbrtse010p0k4jui54h67gkc5q8avhup0_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)
**The Jeffrey Epstein story isn’t over yet:**

Here are two of his greatest unsolved mysteries:
* How did he acquire his wealth?
* Who were his conspirators, and why haven’t they been identified?

We may never have these answers as insiders, our corrupt justice system, and some big names do NOT want us to discover the truth.

Yes, Jeffrey Epstein is dead.

However, corrupt men like Jeffrey Epstein continue to live at large and use blackmail, fraud, and the evils of big government to obtain money, fame, and power.

The Atlas Society and Ayn Rand’s message provide the next generation with a different path, hope, and a brighter future.

You and I MUST reject the status quo.

**Ideas like socialism and big government aren’t just bad... They are evil!**

We must stop believing that the use of force to obtain money, power, and fame is the answer to any of our problems.

[Please join The Atlas Society and help us spread our message of reason, capitalism, rational self-interest, and achievement by making a donation. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgpvdij1bkm0dbu17prv3a9aigdmbrvmubl73lqo_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmcpr1c5h2bs)

Reminder: Our goal is to raise $25,000 from new online supporters in the next 48 hours. So please make your donation before you do anything else today.

Thank you,

Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywood's Agenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j60t8j2qp9sc6536rcmvjsb6s9s7v697g3mquo_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj7fp0b499g6r1p9ebot0m21o40a8dpb6artvon0_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmj9j84fognc6kufvd0rutcmlg68kfmhkgncj3m0_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgm29msmuh4546nf9ousjtu0lpp05ndg5vuk6r4g_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsf3q7p7137ijovbm14crh7mhdfms47tet9mg1og_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zliq6fpba6t0u56nmpl6pb9ejsnoutf0gs5h1d6g_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabhv1qa024rn4uivbuh7oa491b23f60bc1ctc78_rp22sh2s8i6epr2cphmepj6c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|

clean_body: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. body:
Join us on Wednesday, March 11.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-atdikut-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,**We have BIG news!** Join Republican Candidate for Governor Danielle Bethell at [Tumwater Vineyards on March 11](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-atdikut-hhlrhljhit-y/) for an unforgettable evening.And we are announcing today that our special guest will be Chael Sonnen!**Yes --that Chael Sonnen!**This is going to be an electric night of energy, momentum, and powerful conversation as we gather supporters from across Oregon for a major campaign moment.**📍 Tumwater Vineyards**
375 SW Barrel House Way
West Linn 97068 _Event Schedule_

**Cocktail Hour:** 6:00 - 7:00 PM
**Program featuring Chael Sonnen and Danielle Bethell:** 7:00 PMGuests will enjoy wine, light bites, and an exciting program._Sponsorship and attendance opportunities include:_**$1,000+ Reserve Circle**
* Special mention in the program

**$750 Premier Bottle Sponsor**
* Bottle sponsorship
* Admission for two
* VIP meet & greet access with Chael Sonnen

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Peter, you've been a big part of my team! Will you do me a huge favor?
body:
View my message to you >>>

body:
Iranian state media [confirmed that Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdLMy4wUuhYs0dDdtSjTGA0xibGR7d8XbR-QV0o00R9_5-fU9f5MEidtPOtjWNc2RPyVwrZzndHKmKinyKcv6yldcQ6FAeUaNPWgDup09SbjmZ-PtyoxsGrbtMKDpDXam2W3veOn1Yrql8wNrGkfn-r7t2DEPzq2N2JumjW7bVg8GH19jt5hx9GjcaDpa1VOzl5ry43eSWHdew5XenB9LOppg91rPoswPhZPCKV5nKvV-KZxusMJJ431_KZw-KQcPd8VbypXiRfsLCl0FimyxwHlbQE0gmWKB8jozHwyByXOGPzsdHFnAscQNYoKQ4sYZKMibFU5Ntv78SAhS-kE99XaQhH9B63-t-7b4NwAA___Yr5B0) was killed on Saturday in a joint U.S.-Israeli air campaign. Reports also said his daughter, son-in-law, grandchild, and daughter-in-law died in the strikes.

# Sunday, March 1, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1932, the baby of famed aviator Charles Lindbergh was kidnapped, setting off one of the most sensational manhunts of the 20th century. Bruno Richard Hauptmann was executed for the crime in 1936. ([See FBI Photos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1yhSAUQOHVYKfDjz5CQZHG7qVN6VzlojdBcICn4-4zyRaygXNmvs_n9AQKFNcP2NFWn6aIVwlYK-YpHZihUop40OJf-Y4-FAiQJ8nlo-Wq5WJyQOGe-sZZjyhRNWiF1lI9lBxUs9l-1ii8R3CGG-XnXmkPAxeeG9DGLQ3Z3xpXXAjBtZLdmxkWZYyTajZqAM96jo5qyt1Xolg39OFOJ-ZuSXsT7FbrUZh6Z3Jkcryuq_MzdWs6mRw3KjXlm8nRw55epV2gYGFyDBTdjHnd2m9yEY6D4tpk646LQqDy0Kzn6w4U_ib1XzKnlT8BAAD__2xyeXY)) Roller rinks once occupied center stage in youth culture, providing a combination of athletics, social life, and the opportunity for a little romance. You can still take a spin today, but the rinks fill just a small niche, as we see in ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1qAyEUxfGncXYZ1Jv5cOEiUAItpKtC6UrUuWZuMePUMZF5-5K-QrfnwG_x_7yYi6VIy_Xd3lCXkMyCdYtYCmaTVsy2UFpwJR_ueV9C3Gy02Ugu-wOHAxdmshR3c2wmHRAlQoNaDIOEHmQHzaytF8o7IUfnles7p3DsRoEBOXqrxr4h_dQ4cCEEH0C2o-o8KDVJcAo6G9iR40Ql5fY70VJmDHFPD8ytT7cm6rmUdWNwYvLM5LnW2u7pXu4On_9zscXPDM4PBi8zfby-1fRz-kpN1tNaKUba-oEd-fVmKf6R5V8dHlr-BgAA___RFXIX) In case you missed it, _The Flyover Podcast_ breaks down a new analysis showing what $100 invested in 1965 would be worth 60 years later--across gold, real estate, stocks, and more. Host Ayla Brown walks through which asset performed best (and which disappointed). [Tune in here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb_GbEG2H2A8eGgVRe2QLh3SDRn8HFwZjMwLiH59lf5C13ulc6Rzu3ZXG2KY7x92QkM-dTPua0QizF1aMFsKacYlDP6Rj9nH1UabO8llc-Jw4qJzNsSjqwpnPKJEKNAIpSQ0IGsoRtNy73tZ27YG0WJvhWu0Em1lVSNr7VQRzJPGgQshuAJZtroeQGsnoddQW88qji5QyuV3CjON6OORNszlkKYimpFoWRm8MHlh8rLve3mkBz16fP7PxdIwMrhsDM7N7Wuj8f3n7bNlsrHTwuCVGJyB67XIxi17iDGsjWIVv082xD8H_SvMZuRvAAAA___6DHVh)! As a Christian, you shouldn't be getting most of your news from social media. It's designed to trigger your emotions, not inform your faith. That's why we read [_The Pour Over_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGKwyAQxvGnMbcW45gYDx4WSm_d6x7F6Ji4aAzGtPTtl5Rd-gB7G_jBx_D_uumbCTEs06dJqKrPesHHFrFWLDqvWEwNecE1WL-X5-LjZqIpmlHWnyicaKudCfGpeeOUR2QIDapWCAY9sA6aWdmBj6LnHba-d46DHFrDmWWjFeMghWyCOtYo0LZtqQB2HmRnQUrHYJTQGU84RRdqLufvHJY6o4_PfMdytjk1Uc21rhuBD8KuhF3_rM645r287lymA-G616S3vBeLBC7vIcL6QxK6sCcCl3eCX7EmrSZMy2GvICbqZIqm0BTl1keIMWy9IJxOyYT4eqz-q-ZdsZ8AAAD__7A0jCg). It's one of the sources we trust to deliver the facts, while uniquely keeping our hearts grounded in Christ.

## Khamenei and Top Iranian Officials Killed
Iranian state media [confirmed that Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdLMy4wUuhYs0dDdtSjTGA0xibGR7d8XbR-QV0o00R9_5-fU9f5MEidtPOtjWNc2RPyVwrZzndHKmKinyKcv6yldcQ6FAeUaNPWgDup09SbjmZ-PtyoxsGrbtMKDpDXam2W3veOn1Yrql8wNrGkfn-r7t2DEPzq2N2JumjW7bVg8GH19jt5hx9GjcaDpa1VOzl5ry43eSWHdew5XenB9LOppg91rPoswPhZPCKV5nKvV-KZxusMJJ431_KZw-KQcPd8VbypXiRfsLCl0FimyxwHlbQE0gmWKB8jozHwyByXOGPzsdHFnAscQNYoKQ4sYZKMibFU5Ntv78SAhS-kE99XaQhH9B63-t-7b4NwAA___Yr5B0) was killed on Saturday in a joint U.S.-Israeli air campaign. Reports also said his daughter, son-in-law, grandchild, and daughter-in-law died in the strikes. U.S. and Israeli officials confirmed Khamenei's death earlier in the day after photographs of his body were shown to Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Israel also said the airstrikes on Khamenei's fortified compound eliminated more than 40 senior Iranian security and regime figures. Iran [fired dozens of missiles](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ8Gd7Zg1z-hoLjGXa690sKwJJw2YGESK29_cl7h2u-TZjTzc12uNnJMt2_7IFNDXhIdO1OtVJa8UbE15kRbdOFZ3inwbtmWBSSMrcRWqsXbyO-lb7wJREDYkFHTBDgiDNjczQg20BQkYrj4AZR3U-jJr-QuSjscm2jONIlSKSUnhO6iB4dae8BV42CD6CX5WHPpfnNM9U6B3_lFpXP50bC517rtAr8EzALm4zi6tLpzxelPkgt7AXMsNgmYOb6oXTnfTrQXS9yepv3w5-Ztpb0tLlkYldS6KcZvR2SO-ziJXt4eNvKnuf7rrpeBvwAAAP__IAF_ow) at Israel and launched strikes on U.S. military bases across the Middle East, including in the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan, in retaliation. President Trump [described the operation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ygzAQBeDTQCdG7PJjChVp6Jw2JSPDCm8ikEYrm_j2GVLkAql3Zt9738d1ulr2vK_vdiOTXZh2OsRTzpSmECnZzGGnyLN7pNfuvFhv0wQaOqVR6XpaLPvX1JSLcURAWJKp-x6wQ2ixvBvXNzW2i7vUPfS37obDTFZj17TONdRByeb8plHXda17hOoytDMOwwJ4G7C1rmg0LZxDqj4D7_lOzr_Ck1I1h6305p5zlALfChgLGI_jqFz4Plec9wLGGDxnnqWAkSVZ8irbtFIWxcnuouQRE22kPNmFkpKDKPK-KsmJv0jUQ9SZK-qPQ50e6gQpk1niwd6zdH3R6HWz7H975X9hPg38BAAA__-tLY0T) as the opening phase of a campaign to devastate Iran's military, dismantle its nuclear program, bring about regime change, and urged Iranians to "seize control of your destiny." According to Israel officials, ["Operation Epic Fury" has been in the works](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZlHphvjI3Bw0olsLjmdNkQGt4feNRjZnhnx96vZYH9g45Kq9OrtOl0dR95vf91GtoY07fQskWqlPKWDsqucdjp4Cfd87iEWF12eQEEvFUrVTt5xPKeu8TYQAWFDtjUGsEfQ2Kx2HgBV6L3uu3kxi-rm1g0aZwOmoyV0DdtXm0LVtq0yCJdfg15wGDzgPKB2QXSKPNeUL--J97pSiGd6UL4saWuiXWs9isDfAkYBo5uXl-CVCRj__xMw3ovkkh1Flt8iydnt8pnyR5Fb2utaJPsgYCw15VPgyF7gnxaVHrQ2usnWH0-OkUtvRKdum-P4tV9_dNrDwmcAAAD__yXRgDk) for the past several months, highlighting what appears to be the Israel Defense Forces' close cooperation with the U.S.
## Pentagon Bans Some Colleges for Military
The Pentagon will [forbid members of the military](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL_G7ojgAsYUFK9Jl9duaV3DJWaFjYVJIv_9yvsLW45GGs05X4_pgSmn7fkfV3Itlmmjz5GpNapT2aliS2WjPfn4qucW84EZ6wQcBsYl42IKmPI5qT64SAQke3LCGJCDBC37xaGJ2kLggrQYERE0jQpnDzZqjUL1yV1rXHIhBDcSbqPVXlobQM5Waoyd4hRSK_X2XdLWFor5LG-qN1_WPrultf3o5L8O7h3ccb8AruoKtSWfqYP7Qs-D2sIWrG-sgc21fDbmS36tc0J2YiYmjQUTvIpIUfLIB0GGE1cDmXFANH11Yf-knNMxmE7x54op_55ofzL3dvATAAD__74igcc) from attending Columbia, Yale, Brown, and other universities beginning with the 2026-27 school year. [Secretary of War Pete Hegseth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMiP_wACBg0vI5tILUQNt6BtjI7tnWN5-xb7CZiWVVKrv-_ccn0CewvoXdrTs4hjwzB6ZMY3xwARMMeBBs3unKzifwUMatdQPIY2QalyA_DXW5WIdokZTolVtq83D6MaUm5WdVs3Uybpz3SKVAtSI0LgOjAKHdUn2XpNGKqVka3TV9c1s-n7RZupNA66oJS7EMVX_IwXe0PkrfjBVc9xLbzfmIxfmT6GHQg_neVYuft0Ud1_o4YiemOZc6GHDNSNvYoKQxU6eGNIlgBnDQmEVR6IwI8cg5ujf-0QgIm-YBHpiFO9AH0yZmDCLM74wYM7iRHjdoUx2OU7ynvKjLWq57kD-5yP_SuzH6u8AAAD__w01koM) said on Friday that the universities had replaced "the study of victory and pragmatic realism with the promotion of wokeness and weakness." In a video [posted on social media](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUgOGnwVuiwzk22APDla68pUuHjBaBQ0JFjAUkqd--Sl-h6z98w38-LScbU1yvH_bOpoW8rPyqiVvjsuSNi20xr7xFFx5lX0OqNtmyIKA6AB1ALt7GtC99501gRqaOjdQaSREO1N2Md8pepGTvFCEzgEeJSisnL7IHGrto3hoQSClBEx7HaXA0TR7pMtFgg-iBfWy5HL9yXNuNQ9rzk8vR5XuXzK21rQr6J3AWOH-_q8D5k93ZFoFzbbY9qsAZAXWv-wFw1Ao00KgEzVXQf4SuGL-9YkqxKi16uN5tTL9--9OUp8GfAAAA__8UHXFm), Hegseth said he would direct a formal "top to bottom" review of the U.S. war colleges to ensure they are "once again bastions of strategic thought, wholly dedicated to the singular mission of developing the most lethal and effective leaders and war fighters the world has ever known." War colleges [provide professional military education](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMRkjuw14CBxcQjaXXoj67Db0qsdG4JkRf79if2HDUqleUP8e8wNZOC9_8Um-pjJn-hxCtdI-l412rFwybRzSaz9zkgMF9xk0DK22rTZzRJZz7proExGQbcgb58AOFnrbrP6uE3V9MNZCdFEbdw_OxIFGdCFZwIb9pWmrjTHaWbjdxz7YcYxg_4-2x6Q6TZFr2W9fhXNdKclZ3rTfQnk24tdat0PZPwomBVNdaWWRq1MwbUU4nAqmSInyQQqm3vVjp6HdKFdcSm4D5kBytFgr5XiFlt9nK4TL6xo0u4_bh0X4GJzq9PJE_vGb-qvD3h6-AwAA__8__3-N) to high-ranking officers, Pentagon civilians, and international partners, with a focus ranging from joint operations to national security and strategy.
## List: Most Popular States for Migration
South Carolina topped a list of [the most desirable states](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ8Gb7bwvf4JA0MXb-na0SJwiW-FwQLiKG9fpUNfoNsZjs7R931d16vhwPH-aXbS1ac10rMEqpXymg7KpnKKdLD1j_yKPhQTTF5BwtRKbGW_OsPhtQ6N054ICBvS_TwDTggjNpu2zigrwVpDF8BhmOyM7uahv4BVCsaG9XtNouz7Xs4I3UWNFpVygDeFo_FikOS4ptx9J451Ix9e6aTc2bQ3QW-1HkXgh4BFwJLJBCrVVOoe5c3ybglYtrRTWyifbKkIWPZ0crz_hbZmiq40WbvjySFwmWYxyPtuOPz-1H_JOTX8BAAA__-zsHp2) among people considering a move. The top 10 states included [six in the South,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFu7CAUAE-Du7XgYRu7oPgN3f42JWLh4SXCgIC1tbePEuUG6aaakebjru8mxJD2_-ZA2X3WCa8WsXesOhespoecsATrX_WdfGwmmqqBwnKj_EaZdibEt54GJz0iIB9QMiGALxxmPjylm9F6sayTFWzlM5tXyih1Vjz8ZoQVQ5DfNsopY4wKDuO6zZZvmwP-2PhsPJkoutBzHT9zSP2JPr7ziXW0-RiifPZeGuH_CCgC6rouGC2m9mrjnk8CasdMQBXnGwF1mNJuznTzywRURY8Vk0UC6tV0xd2FcyzOD1W6coUYQ1sEmeh-mBB_ov1Pp04JXwEAAP__ysl9OA) two in the West, and one each in the Midwest and Northeast. Six offer coastal areas, including on the Atlantic, Gulf, and Pacific coasts. The study used online search data, move-in and move-out ratios, and population. Idaho, Alaska, and Maine--with more rugged conditions--each finished in the top five. The Northeast region of the U.S. had the most states included in the bottom 10 in the migration-interest list, largely [due to the high costs of living](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunTAQRL8GOiOzxvhRuEhD99KmRAtew0YGI9v3Iv4-4uYTXndWOxrNzJ_v6Rs58LH-xp1s8XE66MqBSqE0xZMSFo4Hnbz4V7oPHzIGTBNI6IVUQraTQw731NXOeiIgVZNtjQHVK9Cq3mw7OK17kE6bwcxKwyJVb_p-1kYtsnM128dNKtm2rTQKmq9BL2oYHKh5UBp91UlyXGJq_kY-ykY-3PFNqVniXge7lXLmSv2qYKxgvK6reeWnxPOuYHywgnGmXEQuWOi5MBVewgdBghatFPD1XywcFhR5i1cWuFPiBbNYU7z4WAV6H5PDmQOXW5wpzoH2Oll3XhwC595UnVx35PAJV3606NvCvwAAAP__hMOK5g).

**Whatever Happened to Roller Rinks?** In the mid-20th century, roller rinks were a pillar of American recreation: big, bright rooms where teens flirted under fluorescent lights, families spent weekends, and whole communities gathered for lessons, leagues, and charity nights. Skating became a mainstream pastime--part sport, part social club, part inexpensive escape. Then came the late-'70s glow-up: roller disco. DJs, mirror balls, light shows, short shorts, and the swagger of skating-to-the-beat turned rinks into nightlife. Movies, music, and celebrity scenes made skating [look like the coolest thing you could do without a fake ID](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFq8zAUBeCnkbcYWdeWo0HDD8HTnwyFUugiZOkqVlEsI9_Y-O1LOnbt-h04B87H1VxtTHG-3-wDNYVsZtzXhERYTF6wWIp5xiW68CzHHNJqky1GcCFPHE68Md7GdJi28jogCoQKddP3AiSIDqpJy7YVHCSXQXA_Kq_8WXHoRje6Dh33VdSvNg68aRreg6jPqnOglBcwKuhsYC1HHymX-ivHmSYM6cgbltrlR5X0RLSsDP4xMTAx7PteH_lJzxFf-UssuYnBsDG4bEv5nMpw-2_emZAprsTg8vaLV7KFTLE-ZgaXpiraL3tMKa6yZy2_P2xMP9v0p8M2Lb4DAAD__xM1fww). But trends turn. Disco cooled, and rinks ran into a pileup of practical problems, [as this video outlines](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1qAyEUxfGncXYZ1Jv5cOEiUAItpKtC6UrUuWZuMePUMZF5-5K-QrfnwG_x_7yYi6VIy_Xd3lCXkMyCdYtYCmaTVsy2UFpwJR_ueV9C3Gy02Ugu-wOHAxdmshR3c2wmHRAlQoNaDIOEHmQHzaytF8o7IUfnles7p3DsRoEBOXqrxr4h_dQ4cCEEH0C2o-o8KDVJcAo6G9iR40Ql5fY70VJmDHFPD8ytT7cm6rmUdWNwYvLM5LnW2u7pXu4On_9zscXPDM4PBi8zfby-1fRz-kpN1tNaKUba-oEd-fVmKf6R5V8dHlr-BgAA___RFXIX). Land values rose, making redevelopment tempting. New competitors--arcades, multiplexes, malls, then home entertainment--pulled attention indoors in different ways. And many operators point to rising insurance and liability costs as the quiet budget-killer that made the math stop working. Still, the story isn't just one of decline. Plenty of rinks hung on by evolving: birthday-party packages, arcades, laser-tag add-ons, adult nights, lessons, and niche communities like artistic skating and roller derby. In the 2020s, social media and a pandemic-era skating boom helped nudge the culture back into view. Today, roller rinks are fewer than at their peak--but they're still around, humming on weekend nights, doing what they've always done best: turning a simple loop around a wooden floor into a little world of its own. _Did you ever go skating at a roller rink, disco, or otherwise? Let us know your experience by replying to this email._

Backed by six clinical studies, it's been shown to improve five key brain functions--and can start working within 45 minutes. | Whatever Happened to Roller Rinks? In the mid-20th century, roller rinks were a pillar of American recreation: big, bright rooms where teens flirted under fluorescent lights, families spent weekends, and whole communities gathered for lessons, leagues, and charity nights. Skating became a mainstream pastime--part sport, part social club, part inexpensive escape. Then came the late-'70s glow-up: roller disco. DJs, mirror balls, light shows, short shorts, and the swagger of skating-to-the-beat turned rinks into nightlife. Movies, music, and celebrity scenes made skating . But trends turn. Disco cooled, and rinks ran into a pileup of practical problems, . Land values rose, making redevelopment tempting. New competitors--arcades, multiplexes, malls, then home entertainment--pulled attention indoors in different ways. And many operators point to rising insurance and liability costs as the quiet budget-killer that made the math stop working. Still, the story isn't just one of decline. Plenty of rinks hung on by evolving: birthday-party packages, arcades, laser-tag add-ons, adult nights, lessons, and niche communities like artistic skating and roller derby. In the 2020s, social media and a pandemic-era skating boom helped nudge the culture back into view. Today, roller rinks are fewer than at their peak--but they're still around, humming on weekend nights, doing what they've always done best: turning a simple loop around a wooden floor into a little world of its own. Did you ever go skating at a roller rink, disco, or otherwise? name: Dire consequences
subject: Dems’ 2028 firewall could disintegrate here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ws6CxTCmlYJEqrdyD3oDZYiQr6_PuotQv4yWu5Qld0eGx9jeseGzg14L-xrp0A4YRiqIjHMC2vgYdnadHC9gPmsluNjcwjKZjbH8hri5GLN4R9ErWCmJV1oNxWYCa-dzUNFBYlR4QCJBf1IuRS_geHYdIUExJov1lHxcHLJUIb881xGUWeOo5-3olGST_WKq6F6Pb31yRUlFhEId4-fBCwsM_kMa9QJMR-Sn9ZRDbA=&c=jzVtAAS1B3KcDF11E6H_tu7-jtILBG33DxGxu7TdoXjz37Xa__1UOg==&ch=Zov2LF5ZzkkcJPXhXz4Enm6L6tfZQ6xjJw2oJUPrlKKwPkkQ4cRY8A==)
---
|
Peter,
We have a troubling update about Democrats' first major election of the year.
New polling in the April 7 Wisconsin Supreme Court election shows this race on a knife's edge. Judge Chris Taylor leads by just 5 points and 66% of voters are still undecided.
That means this election is a dead heat and could swing either way. And if our voters don't turn out, MAGA could seize this crucial Supreme Court seat.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ws6CxTCmlYJEqrdyD3oDZYiQr6_PuotQv4yWu5Qld0eGx9jeseGzg14L-xrp0A4YRiqIjHMC2vgYdnadHC9gPmsluNjcwjKZjbH8hri5GLN4R9ErWCmJV1oNxWYCa-dzUNFBYlR4QCJBf1IuRS_geHYdIUExJov1lHxcHLJUIb881xGUWeOo5-3olGST_WKq6F6Pb31yRUlFhEId4-fBP9bPk3PdXiZ2PGw7-UAW68=&c=jzVtAAS1B3KcDF11E6H_tu7-jtILBG33DxGxu7TdoXjz37Xa__1UOg==&ch=Zov2LF5ZzkkcJPXhXz4Enm6L6tfZQ6xjJw2oJUPrlKKwPkkQ4cRY8A==)
---

If MAGA candidate Maria Lazar wins, a critical firewall protecting free and fair elections could disintegrate into dust in August 2028, just months before the next presidential election.
If we lose this court, the consequences would be dire for Dems:

* The same court that blocked Trump's election schemes in 2020 could fall into extremist hands

* National momentum could shift toward MAGA just before the midterms

* Wisconsinites could face attacks on fundamental rights -- including reproductive freedom

And here's the most alarming number of all to come out that poll:
55% of Wisconsin voters say they've heard little about this race. 38% say they've heard nothing.
Volatile polling like this is exactly the opening MAGA billionaires look for. If they flood the race with cash in these closing months, they could pull off a coup.
After Elon Musk's public support for the MAGA candidate in 2025 brought national attention to the WI Supreme Court election, they learned their lesson. This year, they are hiding in the bushes waiting for an opportunity just like this.
Last year, Defend Our Courts helped orchestrate a massive landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election. We proved we can win these fights. But right now, we don't yet have the resources to make the impact Wisconsin needs.
[That's why we're asking you to step up today. We can't let WI's court fall to MAGA extremists. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help defend Wisconsin's Supreme Court before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ws6CxTCmlYJEqrdyD3oDZYiQr6_PuotQv4yWu5Qld0eGx9jeseGzg14L-xrp0A4jZ4DD4pDV2IXyG8zrrnbBU6Ndiv8wrUfX-Lr4ovIqc05NvA7XkDFV0DjqvqBx_OkB5x7B-1uaDurTI7EBNlySlNjC3TaftiQS_vJI3Sm20yY6NULYabQF6C53tvcqxt3QCnPJTVufcH07y-GieZrMID8tbQf58KhzVxT3cbyysDPGk_Qe3SvFqYpcTf7Dfy5&c=jzVtAAS1B3KcDF11E6H_tu7-jtILBG33DxGxu7TdoXjz37Xa__1UOg==&ch=Zov2LF5ZzkkcJPXhXz4Enm6L6tfZQ6xjJw2oJUPrlKKwPkkQ4cRY8A==)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: RFK Visits Austin, Loose Cattle, and Drone-Delivered Homes
body:
Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. visited Austin during his "Take Back Your Health" tour, promoting the Trump administration's dietary guidelines and the "Make America Healthy Again" agenda.

## Iran Strikes Divide Texas Officials
The state's elected officials are [weighing in](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGyszAQg08DnZldA04oXPwNXf72lYyD18lODM7Ym0Bu_4Zc4XUqJH0j_Vymi-PI6-2_W8jKHtK00lYiiVCecni8ubAU9yrCa0yp0OxE4qRBGwWtApy84_iZutrbK_gBa7J4OunWmB6hvlvSGtCDdmePfT-Q94DGmOsQaDbY-5rtUQYtIGrAbmggnNH3wzX0NHSAp6oD8iwpN3Inod2VED_pTbmZ01JHexd5lqr9V-mx0uO2bU1Ie3fMOAyVHg9Z6fEbVdFti3tQLiqTm0W9iiqS-UFFcXZrna1_bhwjF3OQb4vj-AXJ3-55W_0bAAD___50e6U) on the U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran, with Republicans largely supporting the action and Democrats expressing criticism and pushing for a war powers resolution. Wesley Hunt [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnwV2iYcAYFxS3sW6TrVbKdgiHIUFLTGQmX2-_8r7Ctqf4Hel_PPhDyCUv549wJcevVP1Cz1aImVa_pu9HbplbuDfOS6m10SkwF4-AZgdqB9LHkMvb6y66GeIoO3JyGFAZ00voLu6k1NCDtsrOeg5oZZLBxJ4QcEyDwS67DQMFUiJIPe4hWRn7cU49jRrkIDRQzFzXPV-I6RVaKu_6oHV_qteuuAvzrQn1T-AkcHptq8DpSK3Q-_994c8vgVPjwPcmcELAwRrQerQKje0t6G518fbMpeRmtrfzNeTyi_Pfkjwc_gQAAP__DPdyew) the attacks "ended a threat to humanity," and U.S. Rep. ## Falcon Dam Sets Winter Temp Record
Thursday's heat wave tied or broke daily temperature records in several cities across Central and South Texas. If confirmed, a preliminary reading of 106 degrees at Falcon Dam would be the [hottest temperature ever recorded](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAUBODT2B0WYIOXgmKbdNl2SwvDI34KNhE8h-T2K-8V_n40-mb-3pe7w4TH44_bwdIn5uWAVhMQQVlKfL6xIlV3VsIj5VzBO6K0SC414yPjYgkO03eZ-mBXHozowYp5lqPWSvB-s5Oc1ugliCi1n0zkBpTSoAxoucYZerRXGR-5EJKLyQw8_hJBmTUqMBMXczdxCEi5DLQBwcfVmL75DWXwee-T3YhetRt_d_LWyVtrbbgmNIDnFejkrfpc_IbHgxHsLyiOzgKs5TMFVoGYS4kR7sAaHgSFFfC5BIYHOysTQhnFleyLDa-GKWHVF-mxO0z_BfSz395W_gsAAP__wpSETg) in the U.S. in winter. The National Weather Service office in Brownsville [reported the reading](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-SsyAUxZ9GOxxARS0oviZdvnZLB-US7ixKBm4kvv2O2UfY9sz585vzdZ_vBgPuj_9mA01vF-cdSg5ABGlO7vvAjJTNKxPuIcYMqyEKs-RSMd4yLmZrMJxzV1u9cDuJGrQYBtkq1Qteez3CYEejpFxFr_g49FPbWamWDpZVtf1ao77KeMuFkFx0U8PdKGw_La6HqeNiqDoOFimmhjwQvE124YwHpGaNWx20J3rmqv1XyVslb6WUxsX38It8WS4RDHlIlbx98syDIVbMAcxHIsjECu4EiRFsT0iGXgnYKzOPmWI666Tts2AImNWF89gMhs86_e2zQ8ufAAAA__-RUIPx), which was recorded at Falcon Dam's NOAA Cooperative Observer Program (COOP) station. It could take several weeks to confirm the reading. Earlier, an automated NOAA weather station in La Puerta recorded a 104-degree reading, [tying the winter high](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy4yAMRb_G7vAIjMEuKLZxl2239BAjYmaxyYASkr9_4-QTXitdnTm6_y7LxYYYjttfu6Ohl0_LgbVEJMK8ZP__GUqgYh-FwhFTKrhaorgIEIpBz4Avzob4XmTrzBXcxFs0XGvRKzVwaDejhPRearQKvHYwaEDHhbI99HyUk2yDOWHQA-cCuJw68CN3w3T1A04SuG4koAuUckcbEr5s8fGdnpi7Ne1tNBvRvTT9n0bMjZhrrZ1d10dFS9s304gZj3P1HbHzw0bMHBRzeMuIhYWDfchst292xTPCMq4pO-ZTZo_CajgI83k2qrHnus3G3WuIMRR1Kt52G-LHiH7X49OInwAAAP__MimHZA) set in Rio Grande City in 1902. San Antonio (95), Victoria (89), Corpus Christi (95), McAllen (100), and El Paso (83) also [set or tied](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SwjAMhU-TdGZk5Q8XLrahY9stMyaWiWadmLEFgdvvAAUH2PbTjN733s9xPDqOvJ6_3UJW7iGNK20lkgjlMYffGxeW4q5FeI0pFZqcSBwRsFfQKNCjdxwfY1t7ewJvdE1WDwM2fd9pqGerwXnyoId9AI2tccEb6HA_ofOhC6Zm-3wGDWiNoFuzg7DXvjOn0JFpQQ9VC-RZUt7JTEJ3V0J8pBvl3ZSWOtpZ5FKq5qvCQ4WHjZzM71uFh2eZD_yAtz8qHNS1qDmJUBG18SqUldByoezkmkllmlL26hVbZ-svG8fIpX9anRfH8SUh_5vuZvEvAAD__zM9hEU) daily highs.

clean_body: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. visited Austin during his "Take Back Your Health" tour, promoting the Trump administration's dietary guidelines and the "Make America Healthy Again" agenda. | | | | | | Sunday, March 1, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1967, actor was born in Fort Worth. He is best known for his leading role as Nick Stokes on the CBS police drama CSI: Crime Scene Investigation. Texas is home to the best barbecue (sorry, Kansas City and North Carolina), so it's fitting that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. launched a "national BBQ tour" in the state capital. Check out he visited in today's Roundup. If you're ready to finally take control of your weight and your health, today's sponsor, , makes it simple to start--with trusted GLP-1 treatments prescribed online and delivered straight to your door. Abilene ☁️ 82/60° | Amarillo ☁️ 75/45° | Austin ☁️ 81/64° | Brownsville ☁️ 80/66° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 76/67° | DFW ☁️ 74/62° | El Paso ☁️ 87/52° | Houston 🌫️️ 75/60° | Laredo ☁️ 88/64° | Lubbock ☁️ 84/46° | Midland ☁️ 84/55° | San Antonio ☁️ 82/64° | Tyler 🌫️️ 77/57° | Waco 🌫️️ 79/60° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Iran Strikes Divide Texas Officials The state's elected officials are on the U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran, with Republicans largely supporting the action and Democrats expressing criticism and pushing for a war powers resolution. "Texas stands with our Commander-in-Chief," Gov. Greg Abbott. Sen. John Cornyn expressed hope for Iran's "dark days to come to an end," while Sen. Ted Cruz said the strikes "will enhance the national security of the United States and our allies." Attorney General Ken Paxton Trump's "courageous leadership," U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt the attacks "ended a threat to humanity," and U.S. Rep. Michael McCaul urged Iranians to "rise up and seize this generational opportunity to grasp democracy, prosperity, and a future free from tyranny." On the Democrat side, U.S. Rep. Greg Casar Trump for "sending other people's kids to risk their lives in a senseless regime change war." U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett said Trump "refuses to even pretend that he cares about following the law," while State Rep. James Talarico called for "no more forever wars." RFK Visits Austin Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. visited Austin during his "" tour, promoting the Trump administration's dietary guidelines and the "Make America Healthy Again" agenda. On Thursday, Kennedy a "national BBQ tour" at Terry Black's Barbecue, which Dell CEO Michael Dell a "great choice." Later, he spoke at an "Eat Real Food" rally, where he praised Texas for "leading the way with MAHA." On Friday, Kennedy toured Austin ISD's Cunningham Elementary School, where he and served lunch to students. "It is so great to see these kids getting healthy food, hot food. This is what we need to do all across the country ," . In January, Kennedy and U.S. Department of Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins new dietary guidelines that prioritize protein and saturated fats from dairy and meat. Kennedy has also worked to reduce the prevalence of food dyes and ultra-processed foods. Falcon Dam Sets Winter Temp Record Thursday's heat wave tied or broke daily temperature records in several cities across Central and South Texas. If confirmed, a preliminary reading of 106 degrees at Falcon Dam would be the in the U.S. in winter. The National Weather Service office in Brownsville , which was recorded at Falcon Dam's NOAA Cooperative Observer Program (COOP) station. It could take several weeks to confirm the reading. Earlier, an automated NOAA weather station in La Puerta recorded a 104-degree reading, set in Rio Grande City in 1902. San Antonio (95), Victoria (89), Corpus Christi (95), McAllen (100), and El Paso (83) also daily highs. | Flying together with our sponsor Ready to start your weight loss journey and take control of your health? With , it's never been easier. Their licensed providers prescribe clinically proven like semaglutide and tirzepatide--powerful treatments that curb appetite, support balanced blood sugar, and promote steady, sustainable fat loss. Losing excess weight doesn't just change how you look--it can lower your risk of diabetes, improve heart health, boost energy, and restore confidence. DirectMeds makes it simple and affordable to begin: complete a quick online consultation, get approved within 24 hours, and receive your medication shipped discreetly to your door. | ➤ Statewide: Kamala Harris endorsed U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett in the Democratic Senate primary as a Chism Strategies poll showed State Rep. James Talarico leading Crockett by 12 points, contradicting a prior survey. () ➤ Statewide: Samsung agreed to require smart TV users to opt in to automated content recognition, a viewer data-collection technology, after Attorney General Ken Paxton sued the Korean tech giant. () ➤ Corpus Christi: President Trump endorsed former State Sen. Don Huffines for Texas comptroller and Sid Miller for reelection as Texas agriculture commissioner. Gov. Greg Abbott has endorsed Acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock and challenger Nate Sheets for agriculture commissioner. () ➤ Mount Pleasant: A firefighter with the Tri Lakes Volunteer Fire Department died on Friday while responding to a brush fire. Meanwhile, a wildfire of the Angelina National Forest this week before it was brought under control. () ➤ Houston: At least 15 cows escaped from a property near U.S. 90. Police and dogs wrangled the loose cattle. body:
We dealt some crushing blows to the woke agenda
| | | | |

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4137b1179c4d48d083052425e96ec344&_e=ziL_w8HuHLest-YW3GcnA5mR4azzxXVfTwzP9yQSlDBvq69krqhXqPYwsSMu1TilB2E5yoQ0bLQ86Q8FyTBnXUnlG0yC0By9vyuJoFaw_S2L7dHEOvfPlPEDUEdh9TAAkyeJppfXWgBWBXB-OjtosA7391Oeoj89pah4RO151fHt89Cm0PLZGsFJ4oIEr_ZidlkdEUY3T3w-lznF_q_Q7LXt7v72kNL6YxLE5jCld2lDB7D_kHmR7AIxmbtYvwNrKexVtXuzL_ZaBQx9i_LWFvvivWPqQnBihpI9cm0L3B2YGyruUrsG7mmTSur-H59WsJBtORZkVlw1d2QvKo09JHCmnTiz1WZOZcnQb_rWbSg_6ZTRbC6f804y_KtOlsEtttZnW1CKfRZ3qZUp6UIU0yhpJMxQOZ6kiuHTqVAfyjeB6JjUFndhmkMLRJiYjahG7TQsM_Z0xlvsD9pfAOqo2fmQaw_9knxDr32js893u9lb10szgfMROY9hj0pdIlNpzJkw7-aDGo5K7crIQ2rgmQb09T-3VvElLViywve1u3GH6gT8l26OSUpNIptpDhCidz4eDQqvu-aG9mQBv2ymsZ1KAaqyOYyRvOVzW7DiVhuTCdqjRho7XtP9ofHzisJKuZsfrjFmxHGPwDbnsDV6Nshyl5LshaQzu37qyW20j7JCXHNQuCiifye9vWFuBV4G)

Peter,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia witch hunt** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment effort** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[PITCH IN NOW](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4137b1179c4d48d083052425e96ec344&_e=ziL_w8HuHLest-YW3GcnA5mR4azzxXVfTwzP9yQSlDBvq69krqhXqPYwsSMu1TilB2E5yoQ0bLQ86Q8FyTBnXUnlG0yC0By9vyuJoFaw_S2L7dHEOvfPlPEDUEdh9TAAkyeJppfXWgBWBXB-OjtosA7391Oeoj89pah4RO151fHt89Cm0PLZGsFJ4oIEr_ZidlkdEUY3T3w-lznF_q_Q7LXt7v72kNL6YxLE5jCld2nKxOH9sh40cgB9vdtJpsK6QkLc7H1aaSoQIAlOlGlP26KCq6GaD3bbGMWjQKGYHe8AHTLlOcCiXkh_Rut_XeUuSyoFGEWwX0JUkYhsFHCMWepiim1bErR6f8kU9N-7h6FhwA70LWE5MO-9W4u_R4P2idSMs9bsIz2kgG6d51T609mIUrq6KVN-myhv-GRf_P6pzQ7RB8NFI_X7g8kEq2CDyDAa1Jb8ncZLmVXZvZp_hBan4lpwfyBMOfw0YdQLMajhnzC1JuusB8YvBa6JcHI92XC1-jwKQ846W3536eeru392fzR5lwXKs4tFURDS_lO0rTEi-tYGNYQTJnHg1hvuQkPHxFEJL7aTevfNTCKC7IBkAp-jKz0RBFanW6UNkk6r53wzqjOxGkFqU28MgqsYHFR6d7jrUDydYzGFGpVVVNeAAOys_pJ7kQQFw1R96gCQeKh2WTALHgm5ulYDYUV4)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**
[**We know you can't personally cancel out $1.7 million in radical, anti-Trump money. But you can cancel out one anti-Trump donor's donation of $25 or more, and you can do it now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4137b1179c4d48d083052425e96ec344&_e=ziL_w8HuHLest-YW3GcnA5mR4azzxXVfTwzP9yQSlDBvq69krqhXqPYwsSMu1TilB2E5yoQ0bLQ86Q8FyTBnXUnlG0yC0By9vyuJoFaw_S2L7dHEOvfPlPEDUEdh9TAAkyeJppfXWgBWBXB-OjtosA7391Oeoj89pah4RO151fHt89Cm0PLZGsFJ4oIEr_ZidlkdEUY3T3w-lznF_q_Q7LXt7v72kNL6YxLE5jCld2lTNTBw0MdV5TWL0LmzBGRE2tZvcwkvZ5UZ37DqT3gcI2K8Mnsil5_6-zJ--oTidbLoLKDNs5pQWhKVHXpb2iMBS7TtoG2YBmm2fvR-kp3WT7ul4mXcahJ1aoPK4xPGN_DXRNRcu57udzQXfMrwxCcGL6HYwWNWcZ3j1PW6Siq_-A9hlzMsMKnTP5-k1VnaSw-CeaIXhxAbs8dW2zuizg1CfwmabFOFxpMVGzvGqkARVZrzDt3PWzGWGMdJup6ENItPI9_rxyhEJ-8x16sXjvasVl1bctmGvgYpvBE-x7mADXpwFj9rdeIx1apw3TmESJb9SWmylIFwwD23Yr6xUOZ2y5PvFHZBe4EDdVzR30cWCLzmzv-Euz2ZWvSOfo8kGfdBBCtuYQAAN0Xv_pAYbpppyo2PJhvSow4LrXfGdT6k3F1IzWzea_rMAShACF4jukNpcG3dexJ2roXpFRvcjdj9)
**_Are you in?_**
The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement.
Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,Ashley Moody

clean_body: We dealt some crushing blows to the woke agenda | | | | | | | Peter, The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First. The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy. They hit him with the Russia witch hunt that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart. When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the impeachment effort – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President. And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions. Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly. But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage. And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge. He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way. This is no longer a normal race.It is straight, personal revenge politics. I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright. It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for. Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. We are not allowing that. Are you in? The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement. Thank you for your commitment. Sincerely,Ashley Moody | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Moody for Florida | Moody for Florida 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Both President Trump and Elon Musk are warning about something that could send the market down 50%, real estate down 40% and savings accounts down 30%. | | | Sponsored Content | • | Golden Portfolio ---|--- • | Behind the Markets • | Safe Money Report | | | | | brоught tо уоu bу **Іnception Media, LLC. tо stоp rеcеiving mаrkеting cоmmunicаtiоn frоm us. ### A News Update -- and the Surgical Removal of a Regime
| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81) and [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)

The Middle East has entered a moment that may redefine the regional balance of power.
Israeli officials describe a historic shift. Defense Minister Israel Katz announced that Israeli Defense Forces have achieved operational air supremacy over Tehran as part of Operation "Lion's Roar," reportedly coordinated with U.S. efforts referred to as Operation "Epic Fury."
In a public statement, Katz declared that Israeli Air Force jets were operating "stand-in" over Tehran and that sustained operational corridors had been approved by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu for continued strikes against regime targets.
If these corridors are sustained, such air dominance would represent a dramatic erosion of Iran's defensive posture and a direct challenge to the Islamic Republic's core command structure -- the same governing system that has ruled since 1979 and its Islamic uprising.
At the same time, retaliatory missile fire continues. Sirens have sounded in Jerusalem and Tel Aviv. Damage has been reported as well as at least one death. Airspace across parts of the region remains restricted, and Ben Gurion Airport has faced closures. The situation is fluid.
**The Pro-active Prescription - Destroy the Cancer**
**As in medicine, when a malignancy metastasizes, treating symptoms is insufficient. You identify the primary tumor and remove it. If the tumor collapses, its satellite lesions are easier to destroy and new ones do not appear.**
**The regime in Tehran has long served as that primary tumor -- providing ideological and financial bloodstream to proxy groups across the region that has destabilized neighboring states and targeted civilians.**
The current military doctrine appears structured around four objectives:
* Disable air defenses
* Neutralize command and control
* Target senior military leadership
* Disrupt nuclear infrastructure and technical capacity

This joint US-Israeli strategy is framed not as a campaign against the Iranian people, but against a governing structure that exports militancy and suppresses internal dissent. _**It is also aimed at destroying the Geppetto like hold that Iran has maintained for far too long.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0fa642c-d83c-4e5c-b0e4-73cc5d4f0b23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Distinguishing Faith from Governance**
Criticism of a theocratic jihadist regime is not synonymous with criticism of Islam.
Millions of Iranian Muslims have lived involuntarily under significant political and social restrictions. Protest movements in recent years -- including those led by women and youth -- reflect internal demand for reform, accountability, and greater freedoms. **Many demonstrators have paid a severe price with imprisonment and/or death. Recent uprisings are estimated at over 40,000 lives while our human rights infrastructure has remained silent. Forget about the UN.**
The distinction remains essential:
* Faith is not the adversary.
* Militant governance structures are.

Debate over the term "Islamophobia" frequently arises in Western discourse from the safety and protection guaranteed in a democracy with no deadly consequences.
Organizations such as the Council on American-Islamic Relations often falsely frame scrutiny of Islamist political movements as religious bias and outright Islamophobia. Others argue that opposition to militant governance and terror sponsorship constitutes national security policy, not prejudice.
The rhetorical battle accompanies the military one and the media usually covers the protest.
**A Biblical Resonance: Purim and Persia**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e95eb102-903d-4ca6-9a43-77d631b68e09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Purim approaches, historical symbolism emerges. The Book of Esther recounts events in ancient Persia -- a moment when a decree of destruction and death of the Jewish people was issued, their fate appeared sealed, and yet the outcome was reversed.
Purim is remembered not as vengeance, but as reversal -- when an existential threat collapses, the evil Haman was killed instead of the Jews, and survival becomes possible against all odds because of conviction in one's faith.
Many observers draw parallels between that ancient narrative and present-day events unfolding in modern Persia on the biblical dates surrounding Purim.
**Strategic Inflection Point**
If sustained air superiority continues, three realities emerge:
1. Iran's deterrence posture changes. A regime unable to secure its own capital faces constraints projecting power outward.
2. Regional actors recalibrate. Alliances with Tehran will collapse out of fear of sharing Iran's fate.
3. The Iranian people (in country and exiled around the world) confront a crossroads. Reform, transition, or renewed repression.

Such power vacuums can generate instability as easily as liberation. The dismantling of centralized authority does not guarantee democratic transition. Moreover, this must also be viewed in the harsh reality that the USA has a horrible record of supporting (and/or installing) the replacement leadership following regime change. Frankly, it is abysmal.
**What Does Regime Change Look Like?**
One of the most complex questions is succession.
History shows that externally influenced regime change often produces unintended outcomes. Transitional governance must be treated as provisional and subject to accountability. We must support a free, pro-Western Iran.
One figure frequently mentioned in exile circles is Reza Pahlavi, eldest son of the late Shah Mohammad Reza Pahlavi. He has positioned himself as a voice for segments of the Iranian diaspora and protest movements. Whether he could serve as a transitional figure -- or whether internal leadership would emerge organically -- remains uncertain. Some have raised the concern that replacing one dictator with another is not the best option.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe8aee79-24f5-4529-95c9-4443556b6cc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**The Stated End Goal**
If military operations continue, the declared objectives appear to be:
* Security
* Deterrence
* Prevention of nuclear escalation
* Freedom and self-determination for the Iranian people
* An end to the export of militant proxy warfare

History rarely announces its turning points in real time. President Trump's words coupled with those of Prime Minister Netanyahu are really promoting this once in a lifetime opportunity for Iranians and exiled Persians.
If the central machinery of Tehran's regional power projection is being dismantled, the world may be witnessing more than an exchange of strikes -- it may be observing the beginning of a strategic realignment in the Middle East.
One of the pillars of the China, Russian, Iran and North Korean alliance has been removed. The world is a safer place.
The situation remains evolving.
| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney.
