The Book of Esther recounts events in ancient Persia -- a moment when a decree of destruction and death of the Jewish people was issued, their fate appeared sealed, and yet the outcome was reversed. Purim is remembered not as vengeance, but as reversal -- when an existential threat collapses, the evil Haman was killed instead of the Jews, and survival becomes possible against all odds because of conviction in one's faith. Many observers draw parallels between that ancient narrative and present-day events unfolding in modern Persia on the biblical dates surrounding Purim. Strategic Inflection Point If sustained air superiority continues, three realities emerge: 1. Iran's deterrence posture changes. A regime unable to secure its own capital faces constraints projecting power outward. 2. Regional actors recalibrate. Alliances with Tehran will collapse out of fear of sharing Iran's fate. 3. The Iranian people (in country and exiled around the world) confront a crossroads. Reform, transition, or renewed repression. Such power vacuums can generate instability as easily as liberation. The dismantling of centralized authority does not guarantee democratic transition. Moreover, this must also be viewed in the harsh reality that the USA has a horrible record of supporting (and/or installing) the replacement leadership following regime change. Frankly, it is abysmal. What Does Regime Change Look Like? One of the most complex questions is succession. History shows that externally influenced regime change often produces unintended outcomes. Transitional governance must be treated as provisional and subject to accountability. We must support a free, pro-Western Iran. One figure frequently mentioned in exile circles is Reza Pahlavi, eldest son of the late Shah Mohammad Reza Pahlavi. He has positioned himself as a voice for segments of the Iranian diaspora and protest movements. Whether he could serve as a transitional figure -- or whether internal leadership would emerge organically -- remains uncertain. Some have raised the concern that replacing one dictator with another is not the best option. | | ---|---|--- The Stated End Goal If military operations continue, the declared objectives appear to be: Security Deterrence Prevention of nuclear escalation Freedom and self-determination for the Iranian people An end to the export of militant proxy warfare History rarely announces its turning points in real time. President Trump's words coupled with those of Prime Minister Netanyahu are really promoting this once in a lifetime opportunity for Iranians and exiled Persians. If the central machinery of Tehran's regional power projection is being dismantled, the world may be witnessing more than an exchange of strikes -- it may be observing the beginning of a strategic realignment in the Middle East. One of the pillars of the China, Russian, Iran and North Korean alliance has been removed. The world is a safer place. The situation remains evolving. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Michael Goldstein ? ?

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: 🤔 Mansharamani Musings: Vikram's February Review 💭
body:
A review of Vikram's February thoughts...

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/vikram-update-february?e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5092855d30&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | | |
# Mansharamani Musings
---
| | [](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=53c42cd443&e=93b2c2b824)February was a busy month during which I met with executives in the food, agriculture, investment management, law, consulting, accounting, construction, insurance, defense, and packaging industries. Almost every conversation included concerns about the acceleration of artificial intelligence capabilities and what it might mean for business and industry dynamics. And as you'll see you, below I shared my thoughts about the risks and opportunities emerging from AI below in two separate articles.
Happy March! _**
- Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2d2c7dbfe4&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **FEBRUARY 1, 2026**

One of the most important global developments of the year got lost in the cacophony of January headlines. As the world focused on Greenland and its fate, the elites gathered in Davos to talk amongst and to themselves, Minneapolis residents took to the streets against ICE, and Wall Street began analyzing the implications of Kevin Warsh as the next Fed chair, major events in China that could have globe-shaking ramifications were under-reported.
Chinese President Xi Jingping [continued his purge of China’s military](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=581eb211c0&e=93b2c2b824), this time targeting Zhang Youxia, the military’s top general and Senior Vice Chair of the Central Military Commission, along with another member of the commission. The move leaves Xi atop the military hierarchy and completes one of the largest purges in Chinese military history. Aside from Xi, only one of the other commission’s six members remains in place. The lone survivor is Zhang Shengmin; he was just elevated to vice chair last October, and he is widely regarded as more of a [political officer than a military commander](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0bfc610b47&e=93b2c2b824).

Many diehard China-watchers (I admit to having been one since my undergraduate days when I spent a summer working at the US embassy in Beijing) noticed and began...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=cb3d61b45f&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=10fadc2abc&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **FEBRUARY 8, 2026**

UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is batting on a sticky wicket, as the Brits might say, and has had a bruising few weeks. First, he was [criticized](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1d4a42130c&e=93b2c2b824) for his welcoming an antisemitic activist who had been released from an Egyptian prison back to the United Kingdom. Then US President Donald Trump called his [plan](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d4a7550d75&e=93b2c2b824) to hand the Chagos Islands to Mauritus a “great stupidity” which led the prime minister to scramble to hold the deal together. Further, the _Economist_ notes that on the issues that matter most to UK voters, the situation is [stagnant at best](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=bdfeed93c7&e=93b2c2b824). This is certainly true of the economy, and despite [his valiant attempt to describe the gloomy economic data in a positive light](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9d9f2a445d&e=93b2c2b824), few seem to be buying his spin.

Things continue to deteriorate. Just last week, his hand-picked ambassador to the U.S. Peter Mandelson [popped up](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e6df4386b6&e=93b2c2b824) in the Jeffery Epstein emails released by the U.S. Department of Justice, and there’s a lot of speculation about what Starmer knew before nominating him. Starmer was [forced to issue an apology](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c2dee8f9e8&e=93b2c2b824), and the UK government has [vowed to release](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0d3fc3b6be&e=93b2c2b824) all of the files related to the nomination. The British police even [raided](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8d5e559ef4&e=93b2c2b824) two of Mandelson’s properties, searching for evidence and...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=25372f2670&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9bf0456566&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **FEBRUARY 15, 2026**

Developments in artificial intelligence are accelerating at an ungodly rate, and, as AI entrepreneur [Matt Shumer](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8e05a72395&e=93b2c2b824) eloquently summarized in a recent post with an understated title, “[Something big is happening...](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f403788ad7&e=93b2c2b824)” Matt does a fabulous job of pulling together the dynamics of what’s transpiring in the world of AI...and it integrates many of the thoughts I’ve had over the past few months. In fact, in a Matrix-esque logic, I began asking myself if AI might have written the piece. Many of us feel we’re on the verge of, if not already in the midst of, the most disruptive technological development in human history that’s going to change life as we know it.

For years, I’ve been warning about the deflationary impact of technology and productivity, but artificial intelligence is making those worries both more intense and immediate. I’ve been fiddling with various AI systems for the past few months, and I’ve personally watched the capabilities explode.
The most recent updates to the AI models created a complicated and nuanced financial model for me in about an hour, something that would have taken me an entire day when I was a junior analyst working on Wall Street. It was also able to summarize...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fe0438d5a8&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=bcd4594c38&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **FEBRUARY 22, 2026**

Last week I wrote about why AI keeps me up at night. This week, I want to explain why it also gets me out of bed in the morning. I’ve always felt that successfully navigating uncertainty requires consideration of multiple perspectives and since last week was about worries, it’s now time to explore the upside of AI.

My previous post focused on AI’s darker possibilities: autonomous agents developing private languages, systems capable of deception or manipulation, intelligence approaching Nobel-level performance across disciplines, and the potential displacement of millions of jobs. Taken together, those risks sketch a bleak future in which humans could become irrelevant—or worse.
But as I’ve often said, uncertainty and risk are only half the story; the other half is opportunity. Without uncertainty, there would be no opportunity. AI is simultaneously dangerous and miraculous. The same technology that could deceive an engineer might also diagnose an illness that has baffled the world’s best physicians. **Holding both realities at once is uncomfortable, but it is the only intellectually...**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1bc6458b2b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0752e65e70&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **FEBRUARY 26, 2026**

Earlier this week, President Trump delivered a record-setting State of the Union address—one hour and forty-eight minutes of showmanship, policy declarations, and a parade of his greatest successes. Medal of Honor presentations, the gold medal-winning men’s hockey team receiving a bipartisan standing ovation, and the ejection of a protesting congressman all made for compelling television. But if you zoom out—and I always encourage zooming out—what the speech revealed about the state of the American economy, global trade dynamics, and the investment landscape was far more interesting than the theatrics.
There are lots of great recaps of the speech, but let me connect some dots to share my interpretation of what was interesting and caught my attention. The most consequential backdrop to this speech was not political but legal. Just four days before his address, the Supreme Court struck down the president’s sweeping IEEPA tariffs in a 6-3 decision, ruling that he had exceeded his authority and that his tariffs are illegal. This was the centerpiece of Trump’s economic agenda—gone, just like that. And yet, rather than acknowledge the setback, the president told Congress that “congressional action will not be necessary” to reimpose tariffs. He has already signed a new 10 percent global tariff under Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974, with plans to raise it to 15 percent. The message was unmistakable: the trade war will continue...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9402304b9b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# 2026-2031 Predictions
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c92caa5ad3&e=93b2c2b824)
|
---
|
---
| |
# Read Vikram’s Prior Predictions!
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=202c181f37&e=93b2c2b824)
| | Since 2015, Dr. Mansharamani has publicly posted a set of global developments to watch over the following five years. Corporate executives, government leaders (including several heads of state!), journalists, academics, and others eagerly read, reread, and look forward to his annual piece. If you reread his prior pieces, you’ll find some developments he noted come to fruition, and others simply did not happen. But as Dr. Mansharamani repeatedly notes, the goal of the predictions is not **accuracy** , but instead **usefulness** in provoking thoughts about possible futures. Click on the link below to review his posts from 2015 through 2025.
---
| [Mansharamani Predictions: 2015-2030](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c594cc26e7&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|

[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fde323e2a2&e=93b2c2b824)
| |
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos.
If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing!
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ea0a6fa384&e=93b2c2b824)

| | Have an upcoming board meeting, corporate offsite, conference, or other event in which you might want to have Vikram share his views about the global economy, geopolitical dynamics, technological developments, or social pressures? Click below to inquire about his availability!

# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d9edd1b24e&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=65d9656429&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=26208d096a&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=b37949facf&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: MCG Holographic Sight
subject: MILSPEC Stinger Combat Optic released(67%OFF) ⚡
body:
Holographic Sight Rambo Wished He Had
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22524/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/230c32a32f2afab011f7156480142deb9e512224). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

With one squeeze of the trigger... a Navy SEAL took down the most notorious terrorist of all time.

And in the dark of night... with no light source...
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22524/6374453/c4f0528d2ae5e7e922ca903b9e097e51e1394464/230c32a32f2afab011f7156480142deb9e512224)
---
| |
---
Within milliseconds he was able he put these glowing holographic crosshairs on Bin Laden's forehead and end his reign of terror. I only have 50 of the set aside for this Limited Time Blowout... UPDATE: 27 of these left with this killer deal. **[These things allows you to double your shooting accuracy and speed...](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22524/6374453/c4f0528d2ae5e7e922ca903b9e097e51e1394464/230c32a32f2afab011f7156480142deb9e512224)**

No more straining your eyes trying to line up your sights.

If you're responsible for defending your home, I highly recommend you get yours today before I run out.

In Liberty,

Oli Fischer **[P.S. If you've never shot with a red dot sight before, I guarantee you'll love it!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22524/6374453/c4f0528d2ae5e7e922ca903b9e097e51e1394464/230c32a32f2afab011f7156480142deb9e512224)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Break Hollywood’s monopoly on children’s entertainment
body:
Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue 's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOmzAQhp_G3BzZY7DJgUOyhChSU1U5UPVkGTMk1oKNsGG1b19RdR9gb6NP34w0___7ru_Gjc4_f5oJK7s5vUTdLWjeX2EcPz9C6OMUfJjD-Bm8BgaSMkEZ3z2e9ZXtpYAMK64UCCWOvMxelRJWlKrshcQBBitFeewk8sHkFtlgVOaq_RITjPOcFbw44LEA5IapznQM8Uhyts69SRgPNviIy2aS29B5H_Yp-IMNUzZWr5TmSMSJQEOgiWjXBQ_GYx_SbhBousVsSLsQ3iOBBhQvwEJJ-wIlzbs8pyWXJcWiU1KiGsojJ6JZ06RjWBeLRNTn-kofl5aA3PGEvVsnIurL_T-xZpqNe3oiamBQsJwzfa6v-vw4tRd9u17_QPFDPy6t_nWib-3tay34hD4RUb-1N_qVR7ZU_fzhxtFFqUjOnpNx479n0_fr2Sr4GwAA__9mt5k2)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOmzAQhp_G3BzZY7DJgUOyhChSU1U5UPVkGTMk1oKNsGG1b19RdR9gb6NP34w0___7ru_Gjc4_f5oJK7s5vUTdLWjeX2EcPz9C6OMUfJjD-Bm8BgaSMkEZ3z2e9ZXtpYAMK64UCCWOvMxelRJWlKrshcQBBitFeewk8sHkFtlgVOaq_RITjPOcFbw44LEA5IapznQM8Uhyts69SRgPNviIy2aS29B5H_Yp-IMNUzZWr5TmSMSJQEOgiWjXBQ_GYx_SbhBousVsSLsQ3iOBBhQvwEJJ-wIlzbs8pyWXJcWiU1KiGsojJ6JZ06RjWBeLRNTn-kofl5aA3PGEvVsnIurL_T-xZpqNe3oiamBQsJwzfa6v-vw4tRd9u17_QPFDPy6t_nWib-3tay34hD4RUb-1N_qVR7ZU_fzhxtFFqUjOnpNx479n0_fr2Sr4GwAA__9mt5k2)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone - including folks just like you - who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we've made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 - and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOmzAQhp_G3BzZY7DJgUOyhChSU1U5UPVkGTMk1oKNsGG1b19RdR9gb6NP34w0___7ru_Gjc4_f5oJK7s5vUTdLWjeX2EcPz9C6OMUfJjD-Bm8BgaSMkEZ3z2e9ZXtpYAMK64UCCWOvMxelRJWlKrshcQBBitFeewk8sHkFtlgVOaq_RITjPOcFbw44LEA5IapznQM8Uhyts69SRgPNviIy2aS29B5H_Yp-IMNUzZWr5TmSMSJQEOgiWjXBQ_GYx_SbhBousVsSLsQ3iOBBhQvwEJJ-wIlzbs8pyWXJcWiU1KiGsojJ6JZ06RjWBeLRNTn-kofl5aA3PGEvVsnIurL_T-xZpqNe3oiamBQsJwzfa6v-vw4tRd9u17_QPFDPy6t_nWib-3tay34hD4RUb-1N_qVR7ZU_fzhxtFFqUjOnpNx479n0_fr2Sr4GwAA__9mt5k2) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD. This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. clean_body: Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue 's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books. If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone - including folks just like you - who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we've made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 - and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD. This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family - not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. subject: It's Time to Act!

body:
Support America First
| | | | |
---
Call to Action!
I recognize that something had changed, and that my freedom was stolen from me. I might have accepted this if I was another kind. But for me, American Citizen, there was but one fate. I will not allow my country to be conquered, I will stand, I will fight. And I will not rest until our governance is about the well-being of every citizen. Our nation must come first before any globalist agenda, any cabal of elites, any paid-off political professionals, the takers, and the cheats.
It will only be by the will of the people, a people's movement divinely inspired, that will rescue us from tyranny, from destruction, and from the haters of God.
So I am asking you to do something, to take action, and to do it today.
---
|
---
I do not have a stable of political professionals ON THE PAYROLL, to take the money I ask for today. TO LINE THEIR OWN POCKETS, to fool us, to tell us they'll make it ok.
My opponents criticize me for not running a well-oiled machine, not realizing it is my choice, to do this my way, with ideas, and with citizens united in purpose, a union of women and men. Together to tear down this evil status quo, this vampire system, and to confront the people who profit from it and who have made it so.
I will not compromise, or sell-out, or take a single backstep. Send what you can today and amplify this movement while we still have some time. Better yet, send what you can and then join us, tell all of your friends.
In Liberty, Royce White U.S. Senate 2026

subject: Receive A Place Called Heaven
body:
A biblical look at your eternal home | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e3b2fb1dfb3248a8b268e4e91cbbba2f&_e=t7_-dNLGsyPYtwiKenQY8lG0DME8-bWCPXUA1Jgt6GpmfVBbQBXr2NnKN8O6aziKPlG2UJWYnSp52CZHdB5hOGUF6QAkxL26rv4Ar6F1IZO961tp5IrZBhV9-yKDHwqpwVZrN89vg2iXuJIKV2ogalP7iGJ8w-SnQH4ikJzEGlrfMKCc1riaWFpjKYOsIdwmXzCHzWZPdSqGsHAO0qsG1pH7hQDCkjImdJmGEPTdLTPYMeOT7_pRDFVpWglKrWA_NO_32SYjp72CrmUbSWIfMXp5UqPthEcUCGDmnjzDeUnEyHuPAuN-6IeUz1juFE17OuNQJo7ghWGeLnZ1n76THHroOnL6PQ6I_TTcH0bdUkLin1xkkYbOFJbenMdX0KaNVs7oo4wZT7kyfe4DovXaJBsRg9hJlaxQXmmD9YBQ7gksnTcHb5Eoyujmddt4g3w2Sf6hfbQKQh1DsHPTbMrez_ofKwZ2lGTgqtcuPCAPtu9jgMP-OWx5aVrpGrKsDC4Wv4xdzaLZZPoi4P6WpF2cKLj23BGqQi8hgTEi04BexTJ8fobpAmK-YOxUuBvNkYUoD7NxUEit4N9EQ0Mt_H2pOflxCFiHFvFDnbVOWz0waVW3sIrxeQPpoHa1-F5rsjcErfmB3iWVwS4h2OKIrapbwHZfgEAyQ9S8eyKCYWiEOsk%3D)
---
| | Fellow Christian,A thousand years from today, you will still be alive somewhere.That truth is rooted in Scripture. Ecclesiastes tells us that God has set eternity in the human heart (Ecclesiastes 3:11). This life is brief, but eternity is forever.When we truly understand heaven, it changes how we live, how we give, and what we value. Jesus Himself urged us to store up treasures in heaven rather than on earth (Matthew 6:19-20).In _A Place Called Heaven_ , I show how a biblical view of eternity brings clarity and urgency to our lives today.Dr. O. S. Hawkins wrote, "No one is really ready to live life to the fullest until he or she is ready to die."
---

body:
This ain’t the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dacab8f6015641ccb6b988f03b170fb1&_e=9yEvcUOFV_YV-IttCUbhSPkkjjTILSTVx2goQMfYJJrngmRL9aLnScuAUM20QD3IYnkyM9ORdIt9H2-F6ljgE8kvT2TNYhMD5YXq66ubedd6tKrBa-B61SsrWplrYN1U4VF6AIFbSwwpf997nkIDIwH7wZ1EhT8zwCBcVDJsT1rv85-h6JgSsEyhKcz4Jl0_Sm1FZt1CcXg2b5M8Ojz9uWgruB7Z5LIXrrGNmO2efAxHbpDHrIe0kP1fxsxOVE1x1fxLTENzJ62Le6n6A5h13WpGBkMNyG8PbHIGFNrI_G74X_L8NC7YYAgeLfvthYQfv3IF3HUcNZ0rDuwjsjakTPy4ktyDHdNcXmWE1XIeTUXeFyNHkq1MXINpimlwrCbtpEoD4e41BGLV8NeuIuR-L0re_8vFNP8xyhlFJv-5dnmgB6tDwAAZLUv3RYuarR-9MGyyIfONBtpj_B-UjQIxtLRH9MxLYK4hrs2r6_3y_cYxPT08wNjqR7kbEVXPqva0trDGGJz_tyrEod_kAhPaFD5JnHXKkMHEU5n2HCCfY3tr1zdsfRAu0PZW8RwdWEM4AXbPdG2U9QdYhHfioTTeASQm1Nme_lU1F4g1ANYQAZNeARfMRrCcXUtPoeIWu5T_2vmfzbZgjXySAcWih-cAg7-Etj_1EWYkaXae7be3ZfFKvrr2602DsNnqJ9SdAkVck-R1YxvVJ8Y0Nyndbo-YruK0no2NbTCCiVgla4AXTug21RctfNiwyW0udASKwKOI7ft3Kae5OK1L5RjiXvDCgLrZLTtu-KJ1uk67kRxab-rwP0iXSylY_Js46IeAyzcso-CBF79MK2PXfG0g7vQkEA%3D%3D)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. We think if we can get 10,000 God-fearing Conservatives to pitch in 10 bucks each, then we may just be able to dig our way out of this hole we're in.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dacab8f6015641ccb6b988f03b170fb1&_e=9yEvcUOFV_YV-IttCUbhSPkkjjTILSTVx2goQMfYJJrngmRL9aLnScuAUM20QD3IYnkyM9ORdIt9H2-F6ljgE8kvT2TNYhMD5YXq66ubedd6tKrBa-B61SsrWplrYN1U4VF6AIFbSwwpf997nkIDIwH7wZ1EhT8zwCBcVDJsT1rv85-h6JgSsEyhKcz4Jl0_Sm1FZt1CcXg2b5M8Ojz9uWgruB7Z5LIXrrGNmO2efAxHbpDHrIe0kP1fxsxOVE1x1fxLTENzJ62Le6n6A5h13WpGBkMNyG8PbHIGFNrI_G74X_L8NC7YYAgeLfvthYQfF2MQ0VRcaCDnwdVyqAOIDwIUEMHb_u3fI9ii7jH9FY5ABthHtRRDBqYj55f2YIXoWH9leCo-dWV_y3YxK9QuY43VCOBBHOPcyw7ZigBLMxkF5OVUhttYwIUJVcGTKk0v-1APFgr0zN06EA8gScS8VcygXw-LZfNnjiACePNtxvPa4Rr32ulwgw02Hlfg18lhMAmK29A0e9JtRHgwvcWWjHa5GeaAZ5Gl_oTX0iQ2jFFOMiqK_mDI6H3sHjtCw2MbGtSN6jQv4s-mjQUmpvzEnG6wFZfNvVlYSi4tTPbNgGSWaxRKKNNYorfn6-hV4KH4VfdRh1UjDZ5uu-VZz13BH4nBc9rqX3-dAcekVaQRLdMVO29FLJ_W8iSI00YUZd4USz7S-fdz0V1CFQGqoBATxn8QV5D4ddAdrcfKd8fK32GF-zbN8YiaOqthlN04yZf_zGeZB0ZD7jv4k5YcqUXjUGaBd7BZ-w5DQuJcwdIxGdzwwD8-phUnOkxWgqy5VDCpsao4v2wqOxBrUixO0iU0Ng%3D%3D)_**

clean_body: This ain’t the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. That's why I personally approved a 29X IMPACT INITIATIVE, effective immediately.Here's what that means for you: Your donation today doesn't just help one race -- it helps 29 must-win House seats at once. $5 becomes 29X more powerful, $10 becomes 29X more powerful, $25 becomes 29X more powerful, or ANY AMOUNT becomes 29X more powerful! This isn't a gimmick. It's a targeted, battlefield strategy designed to stop Democrats from flipping the House by a single seat. name: James Talarico
subject: I had a few minutes between events
body:
[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1001&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ][IMG]

Hey Peter - it’s James Talarico writing to you from the campaign
bus on our Take Back Texas Tour. I have a few minutes between events
today, and I wanted to share my thoughts on our race.

We saw record-high turnout during early voting all across the state. It’s
more than anyone polling or modeling this race predicted. I feel confident
that this is the result of the massive organizing ground game we built.

But nobody can be certain, and we cannot take anything for granted in
Texas. This race is a true toss-up on Tuesday.

If we win this thing together, it will be a game-changer. It will stun the
political establishment, the billionaire and corporate mega-donors, and
the puppet politicians who defend our broken status quo.

Our movement can transform what is possible in our politics — proving that
a people-powered movement that takes on those at the top is the way
forward. A movement that puts people first and takes on Washington’s
corruption is unstoppable.

This is why corporate and billionaire donors are flooding Texas with
millions of dollars and tons of attack ads right now. They are trying to
tear us down because I refuse to take their corporate PAC money and play
their games.

They see our path to victory, and they know I can’t be bought. So they
will do anything they can to stop us. That’s why I’m asking you to have
our back today:

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1002&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Can you please make a $5 contribution to our campaign to
take back Texas and the U.S. Senate majority? We are going to leave it all
on the field. We can’t afford to falter now.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-2026q1.uoly08&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1021&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Donate $5

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-2026q1.TbKB0H&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1022&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Donate $25

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-2026q1.N0mCc7&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1023&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Donate $50

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-2026q1.2kKV7e&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1024&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Donate $100

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-2026q1.MJJTjD&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1025&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Donate $250

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q1.jmBlL0&refcode=em260301-1-ak&t=1026&akid=479%2E1347274%2EHTO6_q ]Other Amount

Thank you for being part of this movement. We wouldn’t be so close to
victory without you.

James

body:
It’s been about 100 years since...| | |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126406659/604828895/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260301WHM_N_JZ_90DO_8_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmY2UzNDM5LTdkMTUtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0a8CHtdAGqOOTBVvi5amtYax1m2FM-cc8gYI9WokPBQ=)

Hi Peter,

**Today marks the first day of Women’s History Month.**

While it’s lovely to have a month honoring the contributions, achievements, and victories of women... at Her Bold Move, we’d like to take a moment to reflect on why this special month was created in the first place.

It’s only been about 100 years since women _won their fight_ for the right to vote.

Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember a time when women couldn't even open their own bank account or credit cards without a male sponsor. _**Thank you Representatives Bella Abzug, Lindy Boggs, Margaret Heckler, and congressional fellow Emily Card for the Equal Credit Opportunity Act of**1974** (!!!!!!)_

**It’s important to remember that the rights women have today were NOT handed to us by the men in power.** Women fought tirelessly for them. They committed to never giving up and won SO MANY critical battles. We owe it to those women to defend against the backslide that MAGA and so many other forces are threatening to impose.

However, to this day, the vast majority of people making critical decisions about **_women’s bodies_** are MEN. [**That needs to change right away**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126406660/604828899/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260301WHM_N_JZ_90DO_8_NG_N_L1&recurring=auto&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmY2UzNDM5LTdkMTUtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0a8CHtdAGqOOTBVvi5amtYax1m2FM-cc8gYI9WokPBQ=) – and that’s why Her Bold Move exists.

We are proud to have launched our first wave of endorsed candidates ahead of this critical midterm election year. As of today we are working across 20 states, prioritizing the states with the fewest women in government. The vast majority of our candidates live in [**abortion ban states.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126406661/604828901/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260301WHM_N_JZ_90DO_8_NG_N_L2&recurring=auto&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmY2UzNDM5LTdkMTUtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0a8CHtdAGqOOTBVvi5amtYax1m2FM-cc8gYI9WokPBQ=)

[**This Women’s History Month, we are honored to be continuing the fight to ensure women’s hard-fought progress doesn’t disappear. Women account for more than half the human race but make up less than 1/3 of the American government. Join our continued fight to elect as many pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women as possible in 2026 and beyond by setting up a monthly donation of $20.26 TODAY.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126406662/604828904/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260301WHM_N_JZ_90DO_8_NG_N_L3&recurring=auto&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmY2UzNDM5LTdkMTUtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0a8CHtdAGqOOTBVvi5amtYax1m2FM-cc8gYI9WokPBQ=)

Together,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director
Her Bold Move

But electing women to the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made **_is as important as ever_**. **_A little over a century ago, women couldn’t even vote, and a little more than half a century ago, women couldn’t open their own credit cards. Our progress is as inspiring as it is infuriating – and we WILL NOT go back._** [**This Women’s History Month, please join our fight by making a monthly donation in support of Her Bold Move and our phenomenal, glass-ceiling-shattering candidates today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126406664/604828908/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260301WHM_N_JZ_90DO_8_NG_N_ftr&recurring=auto&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmY2UzNDM5LTdkMTUtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0a8CHtdAGqOOTBVvi5amtYax1m2FM-cc8gYI9WokPBQ=)

clean_body: It’s been about 100 years since...| | | | | = Hi Peter, Today marks the first day of Women’s History Month. While it’s lovely to have a month honoring the contributions, achievements, and victories of women... at Her Bold Move, we’d like to take a moment to reflect on why this special month was created in the first place. It’s only been about 100 years since women won their fight for the right to vote. Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember a time when women couldn't even open their own bank account or credit cards without a male sponsor. Thank you Representatives Bella Abzug, Lindy Boggs, Margaret Heckler, and congressional fellow Emily Card for the Equal Credit Opportunity Act of1974 (!!!!!!) It’s important to remember that the rights women have today were NOT handed to us by the men in power. Women fought tirelessly for them. They committed to never giving up and won SO MANY critical battles. We owe it to those women to defend against the backslide that MAGA and so many other forces are threatening to impose. However, to this day, the vast majority of people making critical decisions about women’s bodies are MEN. = – and that’s why Her Bold Move exists. We are proud to have launched our first wave of endorsed candidates ahead of this critical midterm election year. As of today we are working across 20 states, prioritizing the states with the fewest women in government. The vast majority of our candidates live in = = Together, Jordan Zaslow Founder & Executive Director Her Bold Move | = Women candidates are more likely to be subjected to sexual harassment, sexism, misogyny, double standards, and even death threats. But electing women to the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made is as important as ever. A little over a century ago, women couldn’t even vote, and a little more than half a century ago, women couldn’t open their own credit cards. Our progress is as inspiring as it is infuriating – and we WILL NOT go back. = | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today!** = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. Her Bold Move One Park Row 5th Floor Providence, RI 02903 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org. We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can . To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

subject: This is going to come as a shock

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ee35aaa-04e0-4035-bf12-85deb8cbaa5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On February 22, 1980, a bunch of American college kids beat the Soviet Union in hockey. You know the story. The crowd went berserk, Al Michaels asked if we believed in miracles, and for one night, the Cold War had a scoreboard and the Free World was ahead. The video below is ESPN's coverage of the last minute of that historic game.
46 years later, the United States beat Canada 2-1 in overtime to win Olympic gold for the first time since the big win in Lake Placid. Jack Hughes buried the winner. Connor Hellebuyck made 41 saves. While some might dismiss the event as "just a hockey game," it was so much more.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7fffed3e-0e50-485d-8d5a-48162d02afdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In 1980, the world was simpler and the fault lines clearer. The U.S. versus the Soviet Union. Freedom versus tyranny. The entire Western world was pulling in the same direction--Canada, West Germany, Japan all boycotted the Moscow Olympics that summer after the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan. **The West was unified as a single team.**
Our world is messier today. In 2026, Team USA faced off against Canada. Our neighbor. Our closest ally. The country with whom we share the longest undefended border in the world. And yet the vitriol around this game was palpable; not some manufactured rivalry, but rather something insanely intense. Why? Yes, there's the trade war, tariffs, threats to make the country the 51st state, and Prime Minister Carney declaring the old relationship "over" as he made a pilgrimage to China and kowtowed to the Comrade Xi.
* * *
## [Don't Diversify...Deepen!](https://substack.com/redirect/e105826f-7896-4471-8ada-fc8142f265df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 11
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e105826f-7896-4471-8ada-fc8142f265df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The key to navigating today's uncertainty, I've argued, is to form a mosaic from the cross-current of the forces buffeting our world. Leaders need to focus on connecting dots across seemingly disparate domains. Siloed thinking around a single discipline (economics, for instance) is a sure-fire way to misinterpret today's chaos and experts who fail to br...](https://substack.com/redirect/e105826f-7896-4471-8ada-fc8142f265df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e105826f-7896-4471-8ada-fc8142f265df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
But all of those things are the direct result of something bigger, namely the death of the post-World War II system that has governed world affairs since 1945. The hockey game was the embodiment of this fracturing world, and we saw it live on TV. And lest we think it was just the US-Canada tensions on display, let's take a look at how the US-China War was also visible.
Consider Eileen Gu. She won a gold and two silvers at these Games, making her the [most decorated freestyle skier in Olympic history](https://substack.com/redirect/9cc7083f-a019-4373-b8ea-d487cecbfa65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). She was born in San Francisco, raised in San Francisco, educated at Stanford, and competed for...**China**. According to the _[Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b8f174-543e-4265-a622-7e7cf1c60cc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , the Beijing Municipal Sports Bureau (BMSB) paid Gu (and Zhu Yi, another American athlete who competed for China in figure skating) millions for "striving for excellent results in qualifying for the 2026 Milan Winter Olympics." The payments were revealed in the BMSB budget which had been posted, but has since been scrubbed. In total, Gu and Yi were paid [more than $14mm over the past three years](https://substack.com/redirect/af836713-e1de-47aa-bd73-7f324e342c48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1094cd79-c01c-4377-aaff-74edcbd3f3bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gu is the embodiment of globalism, transcending borders and an devout capitalist. Unsurprisingly, the WEF global elite crowd embraced her. Gu is a dual-identity Stanford kid who speaks fluent Mandarin and bridges two cultures--why should she be reduced to a flag? There's no problem with choosing one's team, note her supporters while highlighting that [many teams, including the US, recruit from a global athlete pool](https://substack.com/redirect/115f26ae-8f34-42b2-902e-8b50753a9579?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Meanwhile, the America First crowd loved Team USA's hockey team. American guys, playing for America, playing a manly sport, beating a country that's been spewing anti-Americanism all year. Hughes said afterward, "[This is all about our country. I love the USA](https://substack.com/redirect/bc06faad-7582-4785-8d96-c4904049397d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." And that same crowd can't stand Gu. To them, she's captures everything that is wrong with a rootless, transactional globalism: born here, trained here, made wealthy here, then wearing another country's flag for a bigger paycheck. Vice President [Vance said he wished she'd compete for the U.S.](https://substack.com/redirect/47ad6eec-4be3-40c4-8236-30b8f9cde258?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [Dave Portnoy contrasted her unfavorably with Alysa Liu](https://substack.com/redirect/89507307-4e83-4bf2-99a5-8d57dcc61705?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the figure skater who won gold for the U.S. Others were less diplomatic; [Enes Kanter Freedom called her a traitor](https://substack.com/redirect/9cc7083f-a019-4373-b8ea-d487cecbfa65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RoUoL1QnMtppC6afKn1tmVLzs1a3BQb3TQz1OPSGBy0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=189491125)
In 1980, sports slotted neatly into a bipolar geopolitical framework. When we beat the Soviets, it was a win for the Free World. Everyone in the West was cheering for the same team. **That world is gone.** **The new fault line doesn 't run between nations; it runs within them.** On one side are the people who think Eileen Gu is a traitor; while the other side thinks she's a hero. And the people who cheer for U.S.A. hockey and those who sneer at their success aren't in different countries, they're in the same country, often in the same family, arguing about it over dinner.
In 1980, the Miracle on Ice told a straightforward and simple story: good beat evil. Freedom beat tyranny. It was the last great narrative of that binary world, on that inspired Disney to produce the movie _[Miracle](https://substack.com/redirect/b5e77527-683a-42a1-9add-1395955ca4dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. Incidentally, I re-watched Miracle last night with my family and found it exciting, entertaining, engaging, encouraging, and educational. If you are looking for a feel-good movie about teamwork, grit and how the "name on the front of the jersey matters more than the name on the back," I recommend you take the time to (re)watch
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b5e77527-683a-42a1-9add-1395955ca4dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In 2026, the story is a mess. The divide isn't East and West. It's up versus down. The global elites versus the populist commoners.
Just think about it. One of the most iconic moments of the Olympics this year was the United States beating one of its closest allies while the relationship between our two countries craters. We live in a world where your opinion of a San Francisco kid choosing to compete for China is a Rorschach test for the level of your patriotism.
Sports have always been a mirror into society's thinking and our cultural leanings. In 1980, the mirror showed us the Cold War. In 2026, it showed us something more difficult to look at: A world where the alliances that defined the 20th century are dissolving, and where your reaction to a hockey game or a skier's flag tells me more about your politics than your party registration ever could.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/72902f38-5391-4724-a913-d88e6491e2df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae9e0f9-4671-4bed-bab4-f34c89359471?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/ec2833e2-5c58-4732-af4b-ad433965755b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/0f85377d-5675-46cb-82b7-c0a2f9d1e40c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: When voters haven’t heard the facts, misinformation fills the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
We want to make sure you’re caught up with the latest regarding our redistricting fight here in Virginia:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260301-256&t=1&akid=256%2E12592%2E8MUr71)
We want to make sure you’re caught up with the latest regarding our redistricting fight here in Virginia:
🖊️ Last week, Governor Spanberger signed off on new congressional maps that could result in Democrats winning 10 of Virginia’s 11 House seats.
📊 Then, a poll dropped showing**52%** of Virginians would vote NO on the Fair Elections Amendment.
This poll was conducted before our campaign fully ramped up, but either way, it tells us we still have plenty of work to do to get this amendment passed in April. When voters haven’t heard the facts, misinformation fills the gap.
**So, that brings us to you****.**
With less than two months until Election Day, we need your help to keep our ads live, spread the word about what’s at stake, and make sure Virginians turn out to vote YES on the Fair Elections Amendment.
[**Please, contribute $10 or any amount today to help us continue firing on all cylinders:**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260301_1.rIzDNA&amount=3&refcode=20260301-256&t=2&akid=256%2E12592%2E8MUr71)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260301_1.rIzDNA&amount=3&refcode=20260301-256&t=21&akid=256%2E12592%2E8MUr71)**
Thank you,
Virginians For Fair Elections

clean_body: We want to make sure you’re caught up with the latest regarding our redistricting fight here in Virginia: We want to make sure you’re caught up with the latest regarding our redistricting fight here in Virginia: 🖊️ Last week, Governor Spanberger signed off on new congressional maps that could result in Democrats winning 10 of Virginia’s 11 House seats. 📊 Then, a poll dropped showing52% of Virginians would vote NO on the Fair Elections Amendment. This poll was conducted before our campaign fully ramped up, but either way, it tells us we still have plenty of work to do to get this amendment passed in April. When voters haven’t heard the facts, misinformation fills the gap. So, that brings us to you. With less than two months until Election Day, we need your help to keep our ads live, spread the word about what’s at stake, and make sure Virginians turn out to vote YES on the Fair Elections Amendment. Thank you, Virginians For Fair Elections

As a concerned American who keeps up with current events, _you know the dangers of censorship._

You understand how religious freedom and free speech drive the engine of self-government and help protect us from tyranny.

**But today, you also see how activists and government officials disregard the U.S. Constitution and trample on your freedom.** They devise ways to punish those who would dare express ideas they don't like. Some even seek to compel Americans to violate their conscience and express messages they know to be false.

This is precisely how authoritarian regimes begin: by _silencing the soul_. There's no greater protection from tyranny than each person's freedom to speak the truth.

Today's tyrants are subtle. They don't wear crowns--instead they sit on school boards, city councils, and civil rights commissions. They are openly hostile to freedom and even deny objective truth.

**They censor. They fine. They threaten jail time for anyone who dares to disagree.**

[If we fall silent now](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/-v59zVnLKdZoQf6qjSjn7oPgKARdf-cetRWi3smEa5Obvk38DSopW7hPHSZipciA984417t5qCLppQZCDWVNzM9Fvcu8PNlk6dWmXBacvuB5KDqvdqtshsZr-V-_46wAHgDG3NFwcwswSxDgyFel7muLqEDgJ-a63lsnC_mNha6e_yce9l7y1H0Hj-yTZcPQWXOg_RpK6lST5KMdS5J7eG_vWfDIZmAEuYdkAkDAfh-C7QBhewFGcn0aFN5hEvsaBQcV92m8grvqqU3B9PwfyAoyGF_dbeUMCBOxme6AcvKv07uF19lR64K0e5aTP31Vi_g8TPB_S5zLDhEjCAisjKDNmuT8wXDMNGwQ8Mp4DcCmZB0zXt_C_OtZBfiZPu0fAWWcUhPAdzv-xNqOLGE2y3hS-0BJz9E5A6Ughg6ds69bruvx-PldWajsw2mOT_OlKzZ9P414600YAOD7g8KRoSyb11bjSplWanqkJp3LxUhmKeOOXhYUQwDmsdmoHnF6Wp5ujs2qe2qrVY0eUjbRR6ptP2djKuV5NZEhXx-g1ZjNoQ446EFDwXwOk9ss6ASyFEFMzoERpA6atrOVl0Xp9IMwyRamzlY8jzyay8Wzk4GTXbc9FHj1WBOUfoViGD5KLJu6Y3XhM7Y0I71ACdkT2DGuY10BlUugSrQYffLya6UYq6S8gU0bf-yXiqu5V0rYv0yxWBmngSvB/YIsCBVu-z2cjiiU_uMgFDIMRvmR5ccvu/18), we may not just lose our current freedoms, but we will fail the next generation. The time to stand up against the tyranny of censorship is _now_.

Alliance Defending Freedom (ADF) is a Christian ministry that exists to keep the door open for the gospel by advancing every person's God-given right to live and speak the truth. We do this by protecting and advancing religious freedom, free speech, the sanctity of life, marriage and the family, and parental rights.

We don't just talk. We win._With God 's help, ADF has played a role in securing over 80 U.S. Supreme Court victories!_ And for those we defend in court, we do it at no cost to them, thanks to the generous gifts of our Ministry Friends.

And YOU can help--right now--by completing our Legal Action National Survey. [ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zTLUagQmMjkhzYk0w1bJDdeiIAYdahMQTO_ETrzGjbs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=189550860)
* * *
Before 1979 Iran under the Shah was a modernizing powerhouse. Oil wealth fueled explosive growth. Literacy soared from 36 percent to over 60 percent in a decade. Universities expanded. Women voted since 1963, studied in record numbers, worked in professions, won divorce and custody rights under reformed family laws, walked unveiled through Tehran streets. Cities pulsed with secular life, Western influence, opportunity, and real progress. That Persia was stolen in 1979 by Shia theocrats who forced Sharia and turned a proud nation into a prison of fear and terror.
President Trump struck decisively alongside Israel in Operation Epic Fury (US) and Operation Roaring Lion (Israel). They killed Khamenei. He gave those hostages the first real chance in forty-seven years to reclaim their country. The mullahs still cling to power, threaten massive retaliation, fire missiles at Israel and US bases like cornered animals. But this war is against the oppressors, not the people they have terrorized. The majority of Iranians are hostages. Imprisoned forty-seven years under Shia theocracy. Beaten in public. Executed in the thousands. Jailed for speaking. Women living every day in terror under enforced Sharia.
Public beatings. Mass executions. Torture chambers. Rape used as punishment. Morality police dragging women away. Acid thrown for improper dress. Rapes in custody. Murder for a strand of hair showing. Mahsa Amini's death ignited uprisings the regime drowned in blood.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_

# **[Trump's 2026 Economic Revolution Is Coming...](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
### _**But Your IRA or 401(k) May Not Be Ready For It**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle-class Americans in our country's history. His bold plan is designed to finally empower the American worker and break the grip of the elites.
But we have to be honest with you about the friction this creates. **Here is the "[Silent Risk](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" nobody is talking about:**
The established financial system -- the one your 401(k) and IRA are likely trapped in -- was built for the "Old Guard." It relies on stability, slow growth, and political compliance.
When Trump initiates this massive economic pivot, it could send a shockwave through that old, fragile infrastructure. Wall Street banks assume they can use your retirement savings as their liquidity pool. They assume you will remain passive while the rules of the game change.
**[But you have a choice, if you know where to look.](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
We've outlined a specific, controversial protocol inside the 2026 Patriot's Wealth Defense Guide.
This isn't just a savings strategy; it's considered an asymmetric advantage. And if you are an American Citizen with more than $50,000 in retirement, you may already be eligible to receive the benefits detailed in this free guide.
**[Confirm Your Eligibility: Get the 2026 Patriot's Wealth Defense Guide today](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/8e045bc4-27a9-4569-9223-3c5c40ce8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Large-scale protests are erupting across the USA and abroad against the strikes that cracked the prison walls. In America: emergency rallies in New York Times Square, DC White House and National Mall, Los Angeles City Hall and Federal Building, Chicago Federal Plaza, San Francisco Federal Building, Boston, Atlanta, Philadelphia, Denver, Las Vegas, Miami, Minneapolis. Thousands chanting warmonger Trump, illegal war, demanding War Powers votes. Abroad: Athens with over a thousand marching on US and Israeli embassies, Berlin, London, Ankara, Lahore, Karachi where deadly clashes killed nine outside the US consulate, Baghdad pro-regime crowds near the Green Zone. Condemning aggression. War crimes. Stones thrown. Chants against US, Israel, Trump.
While Iranians celebrate freedom these crowds rage at the man who helped make it possible.
Macron's response is pathetic. France neither informed nor involved. Calling the strikes dangerous for everyone. Outbreak of war with serious consequences. Urging immediate stop, ceasefire, good-faith negotiations, UN Security Council emergency meeting. Joint with Germany and UK: condemn Iranian retaliation but push diplomacy over force. No support for regime change. No recognition of Iranian joy. Weak European cowardice while Arab countries UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan get hit by Iranian missiles and drones on their US-hosted bases. They condemn sovereignty violations. They intercept most. They reserve the right to respond and defend. Saudi offers military aid and solidarity. They face direct terror from the regime and stand with US and Israel defensively.
Khamenei's death, confirmed by Iran's own state media, unleashed raw joy. Tehran, Isfahan, Shiraz streets erupting. Crowds dancing. Fireworks exploding. Horns blaring. Women ripping off hijabs. Chanting freedom. And they are doing Trump's YMCA. His slow hip sway. Fist pumps. Victory groove. Diaspora in LA and DC waving Lion and Sun flags. Thank you Trump signs. Grooving worldwide.
Persians are not Arabs. Farsi is Indo-European. Rumi's language. Not Arabic. The regime forced Arabic script and chants. Imposed their rule. Erased Persian identity. The Lion and Sun flag is Persian pride. Zoroastrian roots. Pre-1979 glory. Not the regime's conquest rag.
This is the reckoning. The regime is crumbling. The hostages are rising. Dancing Trump's dance in victory. We are helping free Iran from the monsters who stole it and terrorized it for forty-seven years.
If elites, feminists, and Ivy League fools cannot see that - if they are too busy protesting the liberator while Arab states defend against regime fire - they are complicit in their willful blindness.
Persians deserve this moment. After forty-seven years of terror they are tasting freedom. As an American with Lebanese and Syrian blood I say thank God for President Trump. Let them dance.
You've got the truth.
* * *
## **About the Author**
Wendy M. Yurgo is an attorney, entrepreneur, and the Founder and CEO of Revere Payments, a Christian conservative fintech company serving many of the nation's leading faith based and freedom driven organizations. name: RoyCooper.com
subject: A barrage of attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The GOP has nearly half a billion dollars to spend spreading lies about Roy and our campaign.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
| | | |
---
$5, Peter.
That’s how much Roy Cooper is asking you to chip in right now to help us win this election and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue.
If that’s all you need to hear, we’re tracking donations at this link: **[actblue.com/donate/roy-cooper-email](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6403?t=7&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)**
Otherwise, please let us explain.

As you read this, Roy is facing a barrage of attacks and smears from the GOP.
They’re doing it online. They’re doing it on TV. And a far-right PAC has already launched a seven-figure ad buy against him.
Between his Republican opponent, the dark-money groups supporting him and the party establishment, **the GOP has nearly half a billion dollars to spend spreading lies about Roy and our campaign.**
That’s why we’re turning to you for help, Peter.
By the time you get to this point in the email, many people have made the decision to chip in their first donation to fuel our fight. Now, we’re counting on you to join them.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more today so we can win in North Carolina, send Roy Cooper to the Senate and take back power for the people?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6534?t=8&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6406?t=9&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6407?t=10&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6408?t=11&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6403?t=12&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
Thank you for all that you do.

Team Cooper
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=2&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=3&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=4&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=666%2E124072%2EIiznhQ)
