| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/michaelafortennessee/p/progress-always-seems-impossible?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As a young-ish person (I'm 33, for those wondering), something I hear a lot from my elders who have been engaged in this fight for a long time is: _Thank you. We 're so glad you're young and stepping up. It's your generation's turn._
Let me tell you - if y'all weren't at the [Knox Young Dems](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bb3f58c2-b1e6-4b5f-9f45-b2fdc08a7fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) kickoff Saturday night,_us young folks are stepping up._
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/aafde221-be7e-4792-b6ef-3ee73d0ca5f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last week, I saw a supporter who has been politically engaged in Knoxville for a long time. She told me, "Michaela, I've been at this awhile, and I usually see the same 40 people at events. But when I come to your events, the room is packed with folks I've never seen before."
That was the case last night. We were standing room only at Printshop, and I didn't know 80% of the folks in the room.
This is how movements get made.
**I 'd like to share the heart of my remarks from last night, because I need y'all to understand why you should invest in this campaign.**
I am running in the longest-held Republican seat in the country against an incumbent who regularly gets almost 70% of the vote.
When you step up to run in a race with these odds, you get a lot of encouragement from folks who are yearning to hope. But something else you hear when some people decide to get honest is: "I want to believe that it's possible, but I don't think it is. I think my time, energy, and money is better spent elsewhere in other districts that can be flipped or other causes I care about."
I can understand that calculus. In a time when our house is on fire, we need power to deliver for the American people and fight against this administration.
**But what if other people facing incredible odds with very high stakes took themselves out of the fight before they ever got started?**
One example: In the 1980s, AIDS was a death sentence, and the people dying from it were overlooked, marginalized, and not a group that those in power were willing to expend political and social capital to advocate for.
Larry Kramer and his fellow activists at ACT UP refused to accept this. They held 'die-in' protests. They chained themselves to the New York Stock Exchange. They covered a Senator's house with a giant condom. They shut down the FDA for a day. A break-off group advocated for accelerated research and treatment access. They forced the CDC and the Social Security Administration to include more symptoms to allow women to access disability benefits.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a1af2dc6-5a97-48ca-aaad-f0e51fa1405a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And now, as a direct result of their activism, action, and organizing, an AIDS diagnosis is no longer a death sentence.
Or what about the brave activists that crawled up the steps of the Capitol to advocate for their disabled community when those in power stalled on passing critical legislation? They didn't quietly wait for others to act, and the Americans with Disabilities Act passed months later.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/77a430be-4e1b-41d1-82d4-89e6119f12c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Marriage Equality. The Civil Rights Act. Women's Right to Vote. A 40-hour workweek. Medicare. Social Security.
_**All of these seemed impossible - until they weren't.**_
What did those who made the impossible possible have in common? They did not wait for the conditions to become right. And all of them had people - well-meaning people, people who supported their causes - saying, "It's not time yet. You have to wait for conditions to change. Your time is better spent elsewhere."
But in almost every case, the breakthrough didn't come from waiting for the conditions to be right.
**It came from people doing the work to create the conditions for change.**_**The work itself changed what was possible.**_
I'm a gardener (albeit one who rarely has time to sink her hands in the soil). And I can't help but think about the work we're doing in gardening metaphors.
When you're trying to plant a garden in an area where the soil's a little rocky, or has been depleted for decades, you don't tell your seedlings to wait for conditions to improve. You add compost. You mulch. You water. You tend. And you nourish that plant until it bears fruit.
And that is the work that we are going to do in Tennessee's second Congressional district.
We are showing what is possible when you do not wait to be given permission, or for the "establishment" to deem you worthy of investment and attention. I am not waiting for conditions to ripen. I'm going to work with all of you to nourish the soil this year -and for decades to come.
**If you are ready to put on your gardening gloves, here are concrete ways you can help:**
**Funds.** We need money to pay our team's salaries, buy yard signs, pay for software, fund mailers, share digital ads, and hire field organizers. I hate asking for money. I want to get money out of politics. Ironically, to do that I have to raise enough money to run a transformational campaign and get into office. (_If you have already donated - thank you. You're fueling this movement._)
Yesterday, someone came up and said, "I'll be short and sweet. I have limited time to volunteer, but can contribute financially. What is the maximum amount I can donate to your campaign?" That answer is $7k ($3500 for the primary and $3500 for the general, which we can break up and earmark).
If you are in a position to [donate to my campaign](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/36426bd8-d26f-4b1d-9977-aede7a6848c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), whether it is $3 or $30 or $3,000, I promise you I will put it to good use. (My campaign manager, Amelia, has put together a fundraising committee. If you are interested in joining our fundraising efforts, reach out to her at [elect@michaelafortennessee.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/60e3a6ca-f262-4019-9095-f2536ed2b6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
[Donate to my campaign](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/91662779-f3a6-4b66-95c1-5851f9633190?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Connections to your network](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/48f857ec-f0f2-4371-a62c-fbe840c80685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **One supporter often invites me to professional society lunches where I can meet 50+ folks in an afternoon. Others have introduced me to critical leaders in our community whose endorsement, formal or informal, carries real weight. Some have introduced me to bigger-pocket donors (or even ask folks for funds on my behalf). One volunteer introduced us to a famous comedian (keep an eye out for that collaboration).
We're particularly seeking connections with folks who can get the word out about our historic campaign in a big way. Know someone with a significant platform? Local celebrities? Local Republicans who might endorse me? Podcasters? Have an in with Colbert? _Please introduce us._
**[Host an event for the campaign](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/60e3a6ca-f262-4019-9095-f2536ed2b6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** I have an amazing but small team. If you can do the heavy lifting and organize a house party, benefit concert, speed dating, civic trivia, dungeons and dragons night, soup-making competition, movie night, road clean-up, diaper drive - any event that does the quadriple lifting of making politics fun + introducing folks to me and the campaign + raising funds for our efforts + serving our community - we'd be eternally grateful. If you want to volunteer for our team as an events coordinator, our Field Director Madison will be beside herself with happiness and delight.
**[Volunteer with us](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/775bbe24-cbde-4d7d-b950-c9ff92b9b4c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **The obvious stuff matters enormously - phone banking, door knocking, and texting are the lifeblood of any campaign, and ours especially.
But I also want to hear from you if you have something else to offer, because this campaign is a scrappy, grassroots effort. Have policy or subject-matter expertise you can put into a one or two page memo that my team can review? [Email those to Luca](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2b6ca540-45af-4be0-8ddd-d1fa392e44e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Do you have a creative skill? Screen printing, face painting, photography, videography, graphic design, illustration? Are you a Meta ads expert? A PR person who can pitch our campaign to national outlets?
**Talk about this campaign, this race, and the candidates (both me and my opponent).**
On social media, in letters to the editor, in op-eds, on walks with friends or dinner and drinks. Share what's at stake. Share what's possible. Share your thoughts on Tim Burchett. Every week people bring us things to amplify. But my campaign can't be the only or biggest voice in opposition, and I want to spend most of our time focusing on what we are, not just what we aren't.
Messages hit differently when it comes from a neighbor, a friend, a trusted voice in the community. _That 's you_. You have credibility with your community I may not. Please use it.
In love and gratitude,
Michaela
P.S. My thoughts on President Trump's War with Iran are very similar to [those I wrote](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b28f5f08-348f-4773-940e-a29c2525844c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when he had Maduro abducted in January. Ayatollah Khamenei was a brutal autocrat who terrorized his people - and I have no desire for our country and military to be dragged into another endless conflict in the Middle East.
P.P.S. We are hiring a Deputy Field Director. [Learn more and apply here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4ae49243-88ce-4eab-a333-7fe8176a123b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
P.P.P.S. We hope to see you at our First Friday poster competition at [Ricky's Bar this Friday](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d72f6ed9-14ab-4d46-aa4a-ac5ba65cedee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: What Charlie did every week — no matter what
body:
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=46310de018e74609ab3a8ab2da2ea1a4&_e=X_HvxzCKq8PzL0hqdjwo9yeh9C_ng8pyGk3OpGccOyUYs4LivWVO7LCdmUTmAPytRUpE2NbzqZS8kO9ng9v75yGE4K_MwSdljf50rd3azMmiWZLflZQGTsxfqzFrpL2ahUiveUBjXpFmYS2_dVfX6cR88lvdqN2btbq6YxzahcSfVSjVWS6tfvn1jKpQqS_XdZHiz7oGwO26WV6glAlj8s5Nl3I2vCPZR__IKfUmUsohdl-XXjKgfkrpJ8ucSbLOENoVgjh7EE3emmA6OQ_k59yF6a-woMpTJTrNNiJ044GLriNBPmSxphog3MJ1aPxDlOCoaOFW1QDqT-hFth7N1oagtWXbMDNlhmI7t1vMYsNKrxVn0JJjyHRF5zcE5N7ctIWGwmOwWWrdgiN9zDkf94es5B1WN0XTfi0cV3Y9NmSGNF2sOuc4EWwT8DgE7Ck9JCBYI5K9clJm45rlj5XlDkBFx43oy4ppF5Kei1bXgoe6aqoFRtej1GOyPvvENicBjO_HGqx7upjIA1GzJQGWPRBJwrZftzDDmw6o6w20JX6yP1urMIvDcDEh-RhCEsGZb_MRUrgPuJOItW8InEOcb8PbuQJA6CwGIAhEJoswtzP_6fHPEaTyU57c3mqwoWRTTo-7qCdTw1--iTa0P0ejGyoRiLhwM4yzV9yCCdlRJBPNlEdvrEjXBmsNta0TooKb)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

name: VoteVets
subject: An Open Letter to the GOP:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
To all those refusing to hold this administration to account, especially after today, VoteVets will not rest until each and every one of you has been thrown out of Congress.
#
**MEMO TO THE REPUBLICAN CONGRESS, RE: IRAN**
The first American casualties are being reported. Our hearts are breaking for the families of the fallen, and the many more wondering if their son or daughter, sister or brother was hurt. The sacrifice these families are making is immeasurable.
GOP Senators and Representatives, you better stiffen your spines, because more may come.
The Iranian regime remains intact and is as defiant as ever.
After 20 years of Iraq and Afghanistan, we knew how this would go.
There is no plan. There is no metric for success. There is no strategy.
You won’t have to fight this war. America’s sons and daughters will bear your burden. You have dragged another generation of our best into a war they never should’ve had to fight. And this time, you didn’t even have the balls to vote for it.
You just let Trump do this, and the blood of our wounded and dead is on your hands.
If you think you’re going to get away with this, you are gravely mistaken. To all those refusing to hold this administration to account, especially after today, VoteVets will not rest until each and every one of you has been thrown out of Congress.
You will be held to account.
Expect us.
The team at VoteVets
[**We still have time to stop this from escalating further. Add your name and sign on to the VoteVets petition demanding a debate and vote on an Iran War Powers Resolution.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260228_VV_EM_IRAN/?refcode=em260301-1-F&akid=34978%2E3013755%2EXOzW0d)

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34978%2E3013755%2EXOzW0d).

subject: BREAKING: Trump has launched a war in Iran.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
BREAKING: Trump has launched an illegal war with Iran.
Congress will be forced to vote on the bipartisan War Powers Resolution I introduced with Thomas Massie to stop a war with Iran.
Trump promised supporters he wouldn’t involve us in any more dumb wars. Now he has launched an illegal war with Iran. Sources say this could be the largest U.S. military operation in the Middle East in more than a decade.
The president can’t engage in war without Congressional approval. We must not allow Trump to risk U.S. troops and waste billions. Congress must stop it.
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2027712488544862313 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2027712488544862313]
I ran for Congress in 2003 to oppose the Iraq War. I’ve seen what happens when Congress stays silent, and presidents act alone.
Not this time.
Rep. Massie and I, a Democrat and a Republican, are leading this effort because preventing unauthorized war shouldn’t be partisan.
Now we need to show overwhelming public support before this vote.
ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Congress to reject a war with Iran and vote YES on our bipartisan War Powers Resolution. Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. He wouldn't be here if he weren't worried. | If Democrats win this seat on March 10, Republicans lose their majority in the House. It's that simple. I'm Shawn Harris. Peter,

__**This Tuesday**__ is our primary election, and our team is working around the clock – knocking doors, making calls, and reaching every voter we can – to get out the vote for Valerie. We have just a few more days to make a difference. Valerie is in Congress fighting day in and day out for legislation that improves the lives of North Carolinians, uplifts the common good, and puts progress first. But her work isn’t done yet. That’s why she’s running for reelection, and we need your help to win Tuesday’s primary.

There’s still time to make a difference in this race, and we need your support to reach as many voters as possible in these final hours.

Close to two million dollars in outside money has come into the district on behalf of our opponent, but the power is in our hands to pound the pavement and mobilize voters over these final days.

[You’ve carried this campaign this far, and we need your support to get Valerie across the finish line on Tuesday. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, This Tuesday is our primary election, and our team is working around the clock – knocking doors, making calls, and reaching every voter we can – to get out the vote for Valerie. We have just a few more days to make a difference. = | | = Valerie is in Congress fighting day in and day out for legislation that improves the lives of North Carolinians, uplifts the common good, and puts progress first. But her work isn’t done yet. That’s why she’s running for reelection, and we need your help to win Tuesday’s primary. There’s still time to make a difference in this race, and we need your support to reach as many voters as possible in these final hours. Close to two million dollars in outside money has come into the district on behalf of our opponent, but the power is in our hands to pound the pavement and mobilize voters over these final days. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

Republicans run unopposed in 51% of elections nationwide, allowing MAGA extremists to build a deep bench of radical candidates in small towns and rural communities across the country. Their unhinged views ARE unpopular with average voters... _but that doesn’t matter when they’re the only choice on the ballot._ **Leaving these races uncontested lets dangerous radicals take power without needing to win a single vote.** That’s not democracy; it’s one-party rule by default. clean_body: | = | | Hey there. We’re Contest Every Race, the largest candidate recruitment engine in the country, and we’re on a mission to make Democrats competitive everywhere. Republicans run unopposed in 51% of elections nationwide, allowing MAGA extremists to build a deep bench of radical candidates in small towns and rural communities across the country. Their unhinged views ARE unpopular with average voters... but that doesn’t matter when they’re the only choice on the ballot. Leaving these races uncontested lets dangerous radicals take power without needing to win a single vote. That’s not democracy; it’s one-party rule by default. Contest Every Race was founded in 2018 to end MAGA’s reign over rural and small-town America. Since then, we’ve invested millions in reviving hundreds of dormant rural Democratic Parties and recruiting thousands of anti-MAGA candidates. We provide campaign tools, funding, and free texting to grassroots organizers to help them rebuild their local power and recruit first-time candidates — all the essentials they need to run winning campaigns in areas left under-resourced and underfunded by national Democrats. = | | | = — Contest Every Race | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: Tenets of Western civilization don’t defend themselves
body:
Now it’s time for citizens to have their say
Mark Levin just went nuclear, and he asked a question we can no longer ignore:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
Mark Levin just went nuclear, and he asked a question we can no longer ignore: **
**_**"You ready, America?"**_
**Because what's happening in Texas isn't just a state issue anymore – it’s becoming Ground Zero in the battle for Western civilization.** _
_**All across Europe, countries are rapidly losing their identities as a result of unfettered mass migration with no assimilation.** **
** Parallel societies have begun to emerge and they are incompatible – one based upon Western, Judeo-Christian values, and one based upon Sharia Law, or Islamic Law.
**You could say this is just a European problem, but Sharia is the primary driver of Christian persecution across the planet, and it’s begun to gain a foothold right here in America.** **_
_** On a recent show, a retired Texas police lieutenant blew the whistle directly to Levin._**He revealed details about EPIC City – a proposed Sharia-compliant "Islamic mega-city" being planned on roughly 400 acres in Texas.** Critics claim it's designed to function separately from American society, operating under Sharia principles rather than U.S. law._ _
___Mark's response was unequivocal:__ __
______**“Sharia Law has no place in the United States of America.”**____ ____**
**____ And yet, other shocking examples keep coming, including Sharia materials and hijabs (veils) being distributed in some Texas schools.
**Now it’s time for citizens to have their say, because on March 3rd, Texas Republicans will vote on a ballot initiative declaring "Texas should ban Sharia Law."** **
** In the lead-up to this vote, political leaders in Texas have been fighting hard:
* Governor Greg Abbott has designated CAIR and the Muslim Brotherhood as foreign terrorist organizations.
* Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick urged Texas Senate committees to make preventing Sharia law influence a top priority for possible 2027 legislation.
* Attorney General Ken Paxton is investigating Islamic developments for violations of Texas law.
* U.S. Congressmen Keith Self and Chip Roy launched the Sharia-Free America Caucus with 33 members from 18 states.

[ **But one big name is missing –** __**YOURS**__**– and we at Save the Persecuted Christians need you in this fight before time runs out.** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ba824c38e684f24be480d2daadf9a29&_e=grD2uxJe7NvoUA8I-Xmm9wjDHOJVWp6sBGiNcEOdwGerfGzmNSuomL-f-YBXB0iIeaPBGuCWsxpYwPImFd-yGK2EEvyAk27hXtjumHsYVX5sZKR-zf2NJEoWlSYooFdNmAOTL0ETjn4Uorb6RrW-DQeDRs9XjsEvgF3CWr7VWuJ49FguGJFSsfYuC8LDk0QMeqc4NXea_2GSS2q6ZgRCgHCrFZ6ShDdLCD1kj6y5gHOZ2GjnDXipw4Rj8tNubfwmvF52o6Q39AwHJSpeJdzcROnApyyT_PRVlc2qPAjD06iZErI8Dj2-xgUsff92JaywNGPlXWFm9MwvTXE0-DVhizmwHNvKeW0pUyIRn_P6aYsKOefsrsNDbyAXL3dyexYQxewwsJQT0NtSuxGhYzPFcZxgFPuy9YYjtQ96CVAVa1MpQudVsenx7lWiRd7l1OFcTaokY1YW01TKsnSaPJZ0BVN6__ivBbEqx7-vgcxEGXZJMOh0Ee5L8MTt-B27R5lc987tRgM9I0CCFRoOo9I5hnbGZ2O2SYFsk0naWr_lJENvPBpDtvmi6JWG-vpaZ-YqKurehHdsqhTefQDfDFI9IVT1QP-jw8LtKH2q_B-a4i3JlQbsze0JDoAiWrNn4ItLKkSCorzTq-6FdDjXe46wLJ3DBPas0MoNzOgosL7_nvJwXyrtYUNzLMb_TehDOMa0)
Whereas Sharia is the primary driver of Christian persecution worldwide, we are directly involved in the effort to educate Texans (and all Americans) about this growing threat to our sovereignty, our Constitution, and our most fundamental freedoms.
[ **If you believe Sharia must be banned in Texas – and all across America – sign your name immediately.** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ba824c38e684f24be480d2daadf9a29&_e=grD2uxJe7NvoUA8I-Xmm9wjDHOJVWp6sBGiNcEOdwGerfGzmNSuomL-f-YBXB0iIeaPBGuCWsxpYwPImFd-yGK2EEvyAk27hXtjumHsYVX5sZKR-zf2NJEoWlSYooFdNmAOTL0ETjn4Uorb6RrW-DQeDRs9XjsEvgF3CWr7VWuJ49FguGJFSsfYuC8LDk0QMeqc4NXea_2GSS2q6ZgRCgHCrFZ6ShDdLCD1kj6y5gHOZ2GjnDXipw4Rj8tNubfwm5geHa2IU-XTC_vNgY9y1i-4n994bQt3XG0RyX9HbZxexcOKukYHUmlMS0TILYQHDOqkZ0ZJiT8ztHr8ijrGX8KyBkpRLxk-HokU-Hacjr5JP_VCPYt5J58hQC62h7-0YKVmsnMV1Rf41pqEzjrtSH7jWHYfMytP0vYC1aQnVg7jJD-gxjH4FfgLLXqQGxKe_S9elyBBey6hZtao6mz9fzy8d9Gq7OH2yCsEh9r5152UyPAG4VXYKe3MWqXdg4rYipj6tuO6pAYhVp2TsPLmD_UMQBJp4a1np6-AE-ZxSIlFntkvbWk1PD5fMRygf7OFlfk8dad9xQUKE6fc_IoWKuuIj9a4oXwXzBXEaB_3nlo7GfFTQeOEOJ_HWvjIb1xh2sNYW3a8v8JRsaBDS9x_UAwKNgrrrfZcbRz7q7JjTotCzAO9YPjBadSFVpjWHbNyx)
[SIGN NOW](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ba824c38e684f24be480d2daadf9a29&_e=grD2uxJe7NvoUA8I-Xmm9wjDHOJVWp6sBGiNcEOdwGerfGzmNSuomL-f-YBXB0iIeaPBGuCWsxpYwPImFd-yGK2EEvyAk27hXtjumHsYVX5sZKR-zf2NJEoWlSYooFdNmAOTL0ETjn4Uorb6RrW-DQeDRs9XjsEvgF3CWr7VWuJ49FguGJFSsfYuC8LDk0QMeqc4NXea_2GSS2q6ZgRCgHCrFZ6ShDdLCD1kj6y5gHOZ2GjnDXipw4Rj8tNubfwmHxjymNj27uZSonhq3Jrrekvgxpysd8sgxx8RUzow3hv8ZFgIWqliED1Hw64Xk7qMcRVGQmg8jI-omSyFz9LD1mtkJnynTsclUh6BFZl4Yu1T-y1My4grgEJV6WaJWipncJkfOGQrLhGUj6TAZQfYdC4RedqJYRT2-6_gFpMs1fF2UU_4XD2nxIw6yYEtNGdmmwGn0D55xN2UX4rawFijYmfNzfZ8fmNtdhznMZnUsu1V_2yTL55vi9c2yTh0ikLMxnkbrqBI9smeFCIy0EJbhjmYCWzT0sy_PNu94iFvr8qTcKK9hnJp-zhMkPhI3uIgJqCvSiuxbyDW0TJkPp8tvfbKdd83affBNvKev00Ltl8gDNzZyzVpTEucHTw12-2PJxR3jllThWjL3j0d-aLBMurQfD5hW1HlTcfJ0Ju2njuA1WNtfavlhvC1MlPl2ZKI)
Our Constitution, our Judeo-Christian values, and the very tenets of Western civilization don’t defend themselves. That’s our job, and those who want to see them destroyed are already hard at work.**** As Mark Levin asked, “are you ready, America?”
**The time to start answering that question is now, and we need your help by March 3rd. **
In His name, Save the Persecuted Christians

name: Scott Brown
subject: A dozen donuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
Patriot,

Volunteers are the backbone of every campaign. But in a state like New
Hampshire — where elections are won door by door, conversation by conversation
— they're everything.

✅ They're the ones waking up early on Saturday mornings to knock on doors in
the cold.
✅ They're the ones spending their lunch breaks making phone calls.
✅ They're the ones standing outside grocery stores and community events, rain
or shine, talking to their neighbors about the future of New Hampshire.

They don't do it for money. They do it because they believe in something
bigger than themselves.

The least we can do is make sure they're fueled up and feeling appreciated.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/donuts-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_donuts-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_Donuts_indirect>
A dozen donuts from our local Dunkin' runs $12.99 – a small price for the
people working so hard on our behalf.Can you chip in today to help us show them
how much they mean to this campaign?
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/donuts-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_donuts-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_Donuts_indirect>
CHIP IN NOW TO FUEL OUR VOLUNTEERS
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/donuts-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_donuts-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_Donuts_indirect>
Happy volunteers are effective volunteers.

When people feel seen and appreciated, they show up more, they work harder,
and they bring their friends.

A box of donuts won't win an election, but it tells our team that their time
matters and that this community has their back.
CHIP IN NOW TO FUEL OUR VOLUNTEERS

clean_body: Patriot, Volunteers are the backbone of every campaign. But in a state like New Hampshire — where elections are won door by door, conversation by conversation — they're everything. ✅ They're the ones waking up early on Saturday mornings to knock on doors in the cold. ✅ They're the ones spending their lunch breaks making phone calls. ✅ They're the ones standing outside grocery stores and community events, rain or shine, talking to their neighbors about the future of New Hampshire. They don't do it for money. They do it because they believe in something bigger than themselves. The least we can do is make sure they're fueled up and feeling appreciated. <> A dozen donuts from our local Dunkin' runs $12.99 – a small price for the people working so hard on our behalf.Can you chip in today to help us show them how much they mean to this campaign? <> CHIP IN NOW TO FUEL OUR VOLUNTEERS <> Happy volunteers are effective volunteers. When people feel seen and appreciated, they show up more, they work harder, and they bring their friends. A box of donuts won't win an election, but it tells our team that their time matters and that this community has their back. CHIP IN NOW TO FUEL OUR VOLUNTEERS <> Thank you for standing with us. <> Scott P. Brown Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc. Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. **It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House.**

The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census.

Their plan was called _" statistical sampling."_

**In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting _real people, one at a time._**

Red states would be undercounted.
Blue states would be completely inflated.
Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast.

It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter.

_**So I sued Bill Clinton --and won.**_

The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling.
They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a _strict, physical headcount._

That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation.

clean_body: | | FROM: FMR. SPEAKER NEWT GINGRICH TO: YOU RE: CENSUS RECOUNT PETITION **** Newt Gingrich here. Let me be very clear with you. ** I've seen it before. And I stopped it before. It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House. The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census. Their plan was called " statistical sampling." In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting real people, one at a time. Red states would be undercounted. Blue states would be completely inflated. Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast. It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter. So I sued Bill Clinton --and won. The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling. They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a strict, physical headcount. That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation. Now the same election scam is back. The Democrats are demanding tens of millions of Biden 's illegal aliens be counted in the Census. Not because it's lawful. Not because it's constitutional. But because it would permanently tilt political power in the Democrats' favor. Over thirty years in politics, and I can't recall a more brazen attempt to subvert the American system. And it 's happening right now in SOCIALIST SUPERSTATES like California and New York. These Democrats didn't roll out the red carpet for millions of illegals out of "compassion"... Republicans like you and me are now facing the most important midterm election of our lifetimes, and we have a clear choice to make: Are we going to let the Democrats STEAMROLL us through rigged Census counts? Or are we going to put U.S. elections back in the hands of U.S. citizens? Below is a petition calling for a CITIZENS ONLY CENSUS RECOUNT. We must put Congress in a pressure cooker. There's no bigger task than the task to secure our elections. Do NOT let the Democrats cheat their way to power. Do NOT let illegal aliens steal your vote. I know we can win this fight. I 've won it before - but I need you by my side. For America, Newt Gingrich Fmr. Speaker of the House Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**There will be a special election to replace her on March 10, 2026, that's just nine days from now. **
**The entire country will be watching. And this district — our district — could determine who controls Congress.**
My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a Retired Brigadier General, a farmer, and I intend to win that election for Georgia and for the American people.
[If you are in a position to support my campaign, I need you now more than ever. Fellow Patriot,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia witch hunt** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment effort** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[PITCH IN NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a99dbea749db4dee87604f4903081d43&_e=WOYRxfmqpofP-Whwx5QC7v_BB3VKAfWezL5Kp8eyyuSJfjEnXd0baGMui7KJQfVVAbHktZDaxjjq5_Qo-nM8YiUAHQZrwaVLTAzJTc3HyLiAt0dqaXK8IZ9cPOMmTjkkv0P_08vuKrRK4jsIzJafI0El70a16aEOGWcsdWEHrKjnpfvrYv7gkh8xhdqL9T5aq7JjC3gk6jc5AZP3CxSNuhbK0UT1gIMmoQtSFgLIR20cQn9KaDDlIT0xxLx2M5ndS8sVyvjwM3ok8pdThCjeamQIPjPpR_qLwzv39s7VwF01jXP3PTdrE7K3WCsUuC_Q-e8PxGOWipr-kbIuTO6LeFUHAO0nDKwh3wDVX8oVdCjwlPBCP332zqZ2__X0peqr6uv6SbdVjveHYWJt_heQt4HRSDihVsmYuHQnCHz_gDjqplQx4hm6onCnYDNrKsJAhuiHj1nO5fyLJw2OQ2YL6h5Ir364HlIsKASOVbmbfUNAJ8EC4Axj9s3fve2ybBvaCElpG0ix3xlwE3bnkx2ggXvM9yaRqxhuG9a7c3AyUAgOt-iYVhSAHC4XaWHXpaOamDQsyRxqryWHudvyjdnjsmHXYCCHZ8YAOf7tiWF6zWBcHw8IHm_y6JPiyU5lwRRZSwtlag6EpLNN3DfoABKIt8GEN8TAXWJ4r1EFciROiXLa0PvYOj8m_RBpXkQFN2MZ)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**

clean_body: The Left is motivated, flush in cash, and out for revenge | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First. The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy. They hit him with the Russia witch hunt that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart. When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the impeachment effort – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President. And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions. Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly. But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage. And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge. He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way. This is no longer a normal race.It is straight, personal revenge politics. I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright. It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for. Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. We are not allowing that. Are you in? The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement. Thank you for your commitment. Sincerely,Ashley Moody | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Moody for Florida | Moody for Florida 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606

body:
Jared Moskowitz is abandoning his oath of office to allow Donald Trump to wage an illegal war on Iran
#
Jared Moskowitz just abandoned his oath of office.
He is one of just two Democrats opposing the House War Powers Resolution requiring approval from Congress for Donald Trump’s military strikes on Iran.
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=ofc_email.eyLgY5&refcode=em20260301-1516&amount=5&t=1&akid=1516%2E2118727%2EDyOxq3)
Let’s be perfectly clear: **Jared Moskowitz has invested heavily with Defense Department contractor Lockheed Martin as a sitting member of Congress, and he stands to personally profit from Donald Trump taking us to war with Iran.**
This political corruption in plain sight is toxic to a democracy. The American people, regardless of political party, are sick and tired of the United States entering endless war after endless war.
That’s why we have to replace Jared Moskowitz in FL-23’s August 18th Democratic primary.
[Please, I am humbly asking: Rush a $5 donation to our campaign to help respond to Moskowitz’s announcement that he will oppose the Congressional War Powers Resolution and help stop the Iraq War of our time.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=ofc_email.eyLgY5&refcode=em20260301-1516&amount=5&t=2&akid=1516%2E2118727%2EDyOxq3)

Allowing Donald Trump to take us to war with Iran will be one of the most catastrophic foreign policy mistakes in American history.
We have to stop this. I cannot do it alone—I need your help.
In solidarity,
Oliver

subject: It’s the honest-to-God truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
I’m counting on you, plain and simple
This is the only way to make me whole...
| Fellow Patriot,
---
This is what it looked like after the Democrats' goons arrested and booked me in one of the most violent jails in America...
---
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b2b709042e474400a536b90bcf77d15f&_e=UMrb9F4GQL43gBbRNR-3Htq5KHGUWhvCrAKyc-tVyK0Rn9W59JwT5MgQ6m2M18ZRsjdd9lMNPB5i3nDeE-wBAR9oYpk8v4tNU78pAqjGUvHTLYYvzhwSkjpyrye3nNaUjPpsEjLk2RvUENqrHAfDiUdrtPIh3LOQuyKdqD-7c-4Xrq3KqTwc6-2yBkcqZa3lVI52m-5p_B2BvPwIzwU3KDpMjZzFpgCkon--MXhyD9dpI88IctpFcmtmxCM3Mows1zrP_Z9DeaP-m06FIDxhee8xQq37KvJ2wwSdJcRQPgadnqzYfGNnwsVjWRvAyCo7mw_RYSGueVwVcLogqXEOC2L1IosEF0jJ-D1CsnH1qR3ZSAUIqOWLcrSrK7tdhDdI2PhDd2NyqAWQ8Hevt3bPnTO8Hwmte22io5nTsFcPoFEUZF_1yZZBsLC07TN5bm90zaNgwFXMszX2d2ppiRkAgjszqAoJ-2RJ0PUa0Xe3NFbtLLDD4zoqD_o7JL4OgmWP-6JdOXt0cIEEz5y9wvVv3J8w1-1QGyGApCNRd-eGCGzj4UgCWhELPW1DIm9VOKbHjyUVJ48Gv5U6kgvPktXyqw%3D%3D)
__
---
On that day, I remember thinking this is it – _this is what it looks like when the Radical Left and their Deep State take political persecution and LAWFARE to its limit._
---
**_But boy was I wrong!_**
---
The Democrats would continue to go to unimaginable lengths to not just try to put me behind bars, but to utterly ruin me personally, professionally, and financially... all because I defended my dear friend, a true patriot, and our President – Donald J. Trump.
---
They proceeded to **STRIP me of my law licenses** and the means to defend myself. They forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**. And even now, they’re trying to use bogus _state-level_ charges that President Trump cannot _federally_ pardon to throw me behind bars for the rest of my life!
---
But as I recently emailed to tell you, I still have hope that justice can prevail.
---
_Especially after this breaking report:_
---
_**“Republicans are demanding _FULL_ _RESTITUTION_ for Rudy Giuliani, who was charged with 13 felony counts and fined $148 million after contesting Georgia’s 2020 election, following Fulton County’s admission that 315,000 votes were fraudulently counted.”**_
---
My day for TRUE justice and restitution will come. If our free Republic is to survive, __it__ __has__ __to__.
---
Remember, this kind of political persecution won’t end with me. If we don’t FIGHT BACK here and now, then the precedent is set.
---
But I’m counting on every last patriot to stand with me and demand it!
---
And as it stands, I’m still missing _YOUR_ signature.
---
**So, I _humbly_ ask that YOU join the Republicans who are calling for “FULL RESTITUTION” for yours truly.**
---
This is the only way to make me whole, Fellow Patriot.
---

clean_body: I owe everything to you I’ll never love the swamp billionaires like I love you. Truly - I owe everything to you. I watched President Trump’s State of the Union speech yesterday, and I’m more fired up than ever before to continue making America great for hardworking Americans like you. But the truth is, we can’t finish our mission without you. I know $10 doesn’t seem like it can change America. But $10 from a teacher in Alabama, $10 from a welder in Ohio, and $10 from a nurse in Nebraska add up quickly. If every patriot does their part, something amazing will happen. Small-dollar contributions power this movement. YOU are our driving force and our North Star. Thank you, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Scott Brown
subject: This vote should disqualify Chris Pappas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
Chris Pappas just voted NO on the SAVE Act, again.

Let that sink in, Peter.

This bill would do one simple thing: require proof of U.S. citizenship to
vote in federal elections.

That’s it. Common sense. Yet Chris Pappas voted to keep the loopholes open.

He voted to protect the system that lets non-citizens get driver’s licenses
in states like New York and California, and then show up on voter rolls.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/save-act-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_save-act-email_sb?&utm_medium=SUPERLIST&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_save-act_indirect>
FIGHT BACK – DONATE TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/save-act-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_save-act-email_sb?&utm_medium=SUPERLIST&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_save-act_indirect>
And when we call it out? They lie. They distract. They try to scare women and
families into thinking this bill is something it’s not.

Don’t buy it.

The SAVE Act doesn’t take away anyone’s vote; it protects it. What it does do
is close the backdoors that bad actors want to leave wide open.

We show ID to fly. We show ID to buy a six-pack. Why on earth wouldn’t we
show proof of citizenship to pick a president?

Here’s the truth: the Left is fighting the SAVE Act because they want these
loopholes. They know their policies are failing. And they know the only way
they stay in power is by blurring the lines of who gets to vote.

We can’t let that happen.

I'm standing with the American people. Are you?
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/save-act-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_save-act-email_sb?&utm_medium=SUPERLIST&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_save-act_indirect>

Let’s make it loud and clear: only Americans should vote in American
elections. Period.
FIGHT BACK – DONATE TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/save-act-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_save-act-email_sb?&utm_medium=SUPERLIST&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_save-act_indirect>
Let’s fight back. Let’s pass the SAVE Act. And let’s fire the politicians who
won’t.

For America,
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/save-act-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260227_save-act-email_sb?&utm_medium=SUPERLIST&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260301_save-act_indirect>
Scott P. Brown

subject: Urgent – There are only days left in the legislative session
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/i_-oa1WQ0keSurrrDjgtSg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZplVlIJqy/uXS4C3Y7i7tr8sXC7bK5tHRSPRoICGJzJq1COSG0O9f47NEXj0mAcdySFd9V16bWrelklmiU+gTwupbKUEfwmovyaDPM2ZUZ87POLAoLIyXkiewOpXYpkd [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i_-oa1WQ0keSurrrDjgtSg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZplVlIJqy/uXS4C3Y7i7tr8sXC7bK5tHRSPRoICGJzJq1COSG0O9f47NEXj0mAcdySFd9V16bWrelklmiU+gTwupbKUEfwmovyaDPM2ZUZ87POLAoLIyXkiewOpXYpkd]
Peter,
There are only days left in the short legislative session, and what happens now could impact Oregon for decades to come. In these last few days, we’re pushing full steam ahead to pass our priorities, including 1.25% for Wildlife which will secure critical wildlife and habitat funding, and working around the clock to stop 4 Major Threats to our climate and environment. We need your help now more than ever. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i_-oa1WQ0keSurrrDjgtSg2]
Right now, we’re $1,500 away from our fundraising goal . Every dollar we raise today goes directly toward securing landmark funding for wildlife and habitat, holding polluters accountable for the damage they’ve done, and stopping dangerous threats to Oregon’s land use, water, forests, and climate.
Can you make a gift right now to help us finish this session strong? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i_-oa1WQ0keSurrrDjgtSg2] Your support — whether that’s $25, $50, $100, or more — will make a measurable difference for what we can accomplish for our people and places.
Donate now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/i_-oa1WQ0keSurrrDjgtSg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=ZplVlIJqy/uXS4C3Y7i7tr8sXC7bK5tHRSPRoICGJzJq1COSG0O9f47NEXj0mAcdySFd9V16bWrelklmiU+gTwupbKUEfwmovyaDPM2ZUZ87POLAoLIyXkiewOpXYpkd]
Thank you for stepping up when it matters most. Together, we can ensure a healthier, more just future for our communities and our environment.
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: Does a one-time gift of $50 seem too daunting or you want to make sure your gift is making the biggest impact possible? Give a smaller amount of $5 a month to have double the impact! [https://secure.everyaction.com/7lwfcpgZa0qj9OH3-bpDUw2]

clean_body: Peter, I'm following up because we still haven't received your 2026 Republican Policy Assessment. The policies we prioritize in the midterm elections this November will be determined by the feedback we receive from grassroots conservatives like you. ****************************************************************************************************** We need to know where you stand on border security and immigration enforcement, economic policy and inflation, energy independence, election integrity, and the other critical issues facing our nation. **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Senator Katie Britt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: You've got to see this photo (good news / bad news)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Fund
body:
Friend,
With Election Day staring us in the face, I have some good news and somebad news. But first, check out this photo taken by one of our canvassers this morning who ran onto a Tony Gonzales supporter on a doorstep.
The good news is that thanks to your help, we were able to get our new ads up for the final week, including the most expensive day to air them: tomorrow, the day before Election Day.
But here's the bad news: apparently the fastest burning substance known to man is the cash used to fund a campaign when you're running against not just one reprobate like Tony Gonzales but the entire Washington DC establishment..
There approximately 40,000 voters remaining that we need our paid call center to reach and that we need to blast with last minute text messages, and we need to raise the money to do this **right now. **
We are right at the finish line and want to end fighting. Will you make a last minute donation at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/wu3EBCNAs892ubNgsVXKYNFw/cFtxynqgPlMra35C9mB7qQ)?
You will of course be entered to win the RPK and donations over $250 will still earn one of the few remaining challenge coins.
Thank you for all your support that has gotten us this far. We just need to go a little further!
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Fund
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/cFtxynqgPlMra35C9mB7qQ)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Austin, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
I am heartbroken. Our country once again experienced an all-too-common tragedy this morning when a gunman opened fire in a bar in downtown Austin, Texas. At least two people were killed and 14 others were injured.
My heart is with the victims, the survivors, and their loved ones.
Safety is not a privilege — it is a right. Americans deserve to feel safe in their own communities. They deserve to go to schools, grocery stores, movie theaters, and enjoy a night out without fearing for their own lives.
Our leaders must show courage and act. It is long overdue to pass and enforce commonsense gun safety laws, invest in prevention, and build safer communities so fewer lives are shattered by gunfire.
GIFFORDS will continue working until that becomes a reality.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

Please, take a second to read this...
Gabby Giffords has led the fight to save more lives from gun violence for more than a decade, but she can’t do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-q12026.9tds8z&refcode=em260301-1-b&t=1&akid=11289%2E3935704%2EDwlyeW)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=11289%2E3935704%2EDwlyeW) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

I've seen it before.

_And I stopped it before._

**It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House.**

The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census.

Their plan was called _" statistical sampling."_

**In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting _real people, one at a time._**

Red states would be undercounted.
Blue states would be completely inflated.
Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast.

It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter.

_**So I sued Bill Clinton --and won.**_

The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling.
They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a _strict, physical headcount._

That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation.

_**Now the same election scam is back.**_

clean_body: | | FROM: FMR. SPEAKER NEWT GINGRICH TO: YOU RE: CENSUS RECOUNT PETITION **** Newt Gingrich here. Let me be very clear with you. ** I've seen it before. And I stopped it before. It started in 1998 when I was Speaker of the House. The Clinton Administration attempted to fundamentally corrupt the U.S. Census. Their plan was called " statistical sampling." In plain English, it would have allowed unelected bureaucrats to manufacture population numbers instead of counting real people, one at a time. Red states would be undercounted. Blue states would be completely inflated. Congressional seats would be rigged before a single vote was cast. It was a direct assault on representative government, Peter. So I sued Bill Clinton --and won. The Supreme Court sided with me in a nail-biting 5-4 ruling. They agreed the only legitimate way to count the Census was by a strict, physical headcount. That victory protected the integrity of our elections for a generation. Now the same election scam is back. The Democrats are demanding tens of millions of Biden 's illegal aliens be counted in the Census. Not because it's lawful. Not because it's constitutional. But because it would permanently tilt political power in the Democrats' favor. Over thirty years in politics, and I can't recall a more brazen attempt to subvert the American system. And it 's happening right now in SOCIALIST SUPERSTATES like California and New York. These Democrats didn't roll out the red carpet for millions of illegals out of "compassion"... Republicans like you and me are now facing the most important midterm election of our lifetimes, and we have a clear choice to make: Are we going to let the Democrats STEAMROLL us through rigged Census counts? Or are we going to put U.S. elections back in the hands of U.S. citizens? Below is a petition calling for a CITIZENS ONLY CENSUS RECOUNT. We must put Congress in a pressure cooker. There's no bigger task than the task to secure our elections. Do NOT let the Democrats cheat their way to power. Do NOT let illegal aliens steal your vote. I know we can win this fight. I 've won it before - but I need you by my side. For America, Newt Gingrich Fmr. name: Carmela Conroy
subject: My thoughts regarding U.S. Military Action in Iran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=3399d1e9a3&e=a7b299e420)
| | | | | |
Peter,

My thoughts are with the U.S. Military, Foreign, and Civilian service members and American citizens across the Middle East as news breaks that the United States and Israel have launched preemptive strikes on Iran, and Iran is retaliating.

**When American lives are on the line, we must lead with steadiness - not impulse. Failing to seriously consider the moral and legal justifications for attacking another country costs the aggressor blood, treasure and reputation, and earns the enmity of the people attacked.** Having worked with survivors of armed conflict as a Foreign Service Officer and distinguished graduate of the U.S. Naval War College, I am deeply alarmed by this weekend's events.

Open-source reporting indicates that Iran has not restarted nuclear enrichment at weapons-grade levels; does not currently possess the material necessary to build a nuclear weapon; and lacks the force projection capability to directly threaten the United States homeland.

If those facts hold, there was no justification for military action. The American people deserve a clear explanation for why the administration struck yesterday, what U.S. interest was served, and the desired end state or outcome.

**Furthermore, it appears this action was illegal. The Constitution is clear: the power to declare war belongs to Congress.**

Eastern Washington knows the cost of war. We are home to veterans, active-duty families, and communities that have borne the burden of past conflicts.

Ensuring that any military action is lawful, necessary, and proportional is the best way to support our troops.

**This moment requires courage - not just on the battlefield, but in the halls of Congress.**

We need leaders who will uphold the Constitution, check executive power, and use diplomacy in pursuit of American interests, not as cover for unprovoked military attack.

We cannot afford another generation defined by preventable wars and constitutional shortcuts.

We must choose strength rooted in principle.

With resolve,

Carmela
---

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: SURPASSED our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I knew we could count on this grassroots community to deliver.
| Friend, it’s the first of the month – and I’m thrilled to announce that, at the final hour, we hit our fundraising goal for February. I knew we could count on this grassroots community to deliver. Other candidates – like my Republican opponent Tom Tiffany – may rely on corporate PACs and dark money for support, but not us. **I’m incredibly grateful for your support, but we can’t afford to get complacent now, not with so much at stake.**[If you didn’t get a chance to pitch in last month, could you take 2 minutes to make a donation now? Every dollar counts.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030126_B1_TY&t=2&akid=5882%2E196590%2Eb7Dhx6)** Here are some highlights from the campaign trail last month, powered by your small-dollar donations: [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030126_B1_TY&t=3&akid=5882%2E196590%2Eb7Dhx6) We visited a dairy farm in Catawba to talk to the farmers who feed our state and our country. It’s clear from our conversations that they’ve been feeling the squeeze – as governor, I’ll work directly with our family farms to make sure we support them as they recover from Trump and Tiffany’s tariffs. [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030126_B1_TY&t=4&akid=5882%2E196590%2Eb7Dhx6) We met with small business owners from Superior to Ashland. Just like our farmers, they have had to deal with the effects of the Trump-Tiffany economic plan, with costs going up and customers spending less. **You know it, and I know it: the policies coming out of Washington are not working for Wisconsinites.** I’m in this race to deliver generational change for Wisconsin and ensure that future generations can prosper for years to come. I’ll be working hard every single day to earn your vote, and I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail. [If you want to help us get ahead this month and power our campaign with even more energy, chip in today to keep the work going!](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030126_B1_TY&t=5&akid=5882%2E196590%2Eb7Dhx6)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.5CO-cQ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030126_B1_TY&t=6&akid=5882%2E196590%2Eb7Dhx6)

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Early voting starts THIS month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260301-257&t=1&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)
Early voting begins *this month* on March 6, and many Virginians don’t even know there’s an election happening.
In an off-season race like this, awareness is low, and misinformation spreads fast.
**We’re running out of time to reach undecided voters with clear facts about why voting YES protects free and fair elections.**
That’s why we’re urgently asking: [**Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help us get the word out before ballots are cast?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260301_2.c_SOCJ&amount=3&refcode=20260301-257&t=2&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260301_2.c_SOCJ&amount=3&refcode=20260301-257&t=21&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)**
Thank you,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=22&refcode2=257_12592_UFq7uc&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=24&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=257%2E12592%2EUFq7uc)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Early voting begins this month on March 6, and many Virginians don’t even know there’s an election happening. In an off-season race like this, awareness is low, and misinformation spreads fast. We’re running out of time to reach undecided voters with clear facts about why voting YES protects free and fair elections. That’s why we’re urgently asking: Thank you, Virginians For Fair Elections

| | Peter,There are moments in life when eternity suddenly feels very close.A doctor's report.
A late-night phone call.
A quiet realization that this life is far more fragile than we like to admit.In those moments, one question rises to the surface. What happens when we die?The Bible does not leave that question unanswered.The apostle Paul wrote, "To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord" (2 Corinthians 5:8). For the believer, death is not a season of uncertainty or separation from God. It is an immediate entrance into the presence of Jesus Christ.That truth replaces fear with confidence and despair with hope. Yet many Christians have never been clearly taught what the Bible actually says about heaven.That is why I wrote _A Place Called Heaven_. In this book, I answer from Scripture what happens the moment a Christian takes their final breath and steps into eternity.

body:
The midterms are a few months away. The politicians who gave billions to ICE will be up for reelection.

| Peter, can you read this quick note? Last week, we set an emergency end-of-month fundraising goal to counter Elon Musk’s massive donation to Republicans in Congress. Unfortunately, we didn’t hit that goal in time – we’re still $2,021 short. **Emily believes in only sending fundraising emails when we have to. This is one of those times!** The midterms are a few months away. The politicians who gave billions to ICE will be up for reelection. Together, we can replace them with leaders who give a s**t about the Constitution. **Chip in with this link:_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c_fr_q12026](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126434567/604895434/1342357884?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.03.01_FellShort_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFlNDlhYi1iYjE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDAlhKwDvBkdnLVACk53VQ_WZOGnASBm-8Axpr7CNt0=)_** Thank you so much! – The whole team at Emily Randall for Congress

* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter, Elon Musk, who said he had “done enough” political spending, just gave $10 million to help Republicans keep Congress. **Elon’s millions will fuel vicious attacks on Democrats in swing districts, so we’re raising $5,000 before the end-of-month deadline to fight back.[_Can you chip in to support Emily’s organizing to take back the House before tonight’s end-of-month deadline?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126434568/604895435/1129794561?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.03.01_FellShort_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFlNDlhYi1iYjE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDAlhKwDvBkdnLVACk53VQ_WZOGnASBm-8Axpr7CNt0=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126434569/604895436/1129794561?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.03.01_FellShort_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFlNDlhYi1iYjE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDAlhKwDvBkdnLVACk53VQ_WZOGnASBm-8Axpr7CNt0=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126434570/604895437/1129794561?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.03.01_FellShort_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFlNDlhYi1iYjE1LWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDAlhKwDvBkdnLVACk53VQ_WZOGnASBm-8Axpr7CNt0=) Elon Musk continues to be a disaster for our country. He spent $300 million to elect Trump, who then installed him as director of “DOGE.” Elon spent the next few months treating federal workers like personal playthings, recklessly cutting and firing before getting bored and going home. Emily represents 27,000 federal workers who are still feeling DOGE’s effects – the firings, the uncertainty, the loss of income. Meanwhile, Elon is on track to be the first _TRILLIONAIRE_ – with a T. **The Republican agenda is BY and FOR the richest people on earth, and they’ll spend BIG to defend their narrow House majority.** [_**With your support, we’re providing critical early support to Democrats in swing districts like JoAnna Mendoza in Arizona’s 6th, so they can defend against any billionaire-backed attack that comes their way. clean_body: The midterms are a few months away. The politicians who gave billions to ICE will be up for reelection. | Peter, can you read this quick note? Last week, we set an emergency end-of-month fundraising goal to counter Elon Musk’s massive donation to Republicans in Congress. Unfortunately, we didn’t hit that goal in time – we’re still $2,021 short. Emily believes in only sending fundraising emails when we have to. This is one of those times! The midterms are a few months away. The politicians who gave billions to ICE will be up for reelection. Together, we can replace them with leaders who give a st about the Constitution. Chip in with this link:= Thank you so much! – The whole team at Emily Randall for Congress PREVIOUS EMAIL: Peter, Elon Musk, who said he had “done enough” political spending, just gave $10 million to help Republicans keep Congress. Elon’s millions will fuel vicious attacks on Democrats in swing districts, so we’re raising $5,000 before the end-of-month deadline to fight back.= = = Elon Musk continues to be a disaster for our country. He spent $300 million to elect Trump, who then installed him as director of “DOGE.” Elon spent the next few months treating federal workers like personal playthings, recklessly cutting and firing before getting bored and going home. Emily represents 27,000 federal workers who are still feeling DOGE’s effects – the firings, the uncertainty, the loss of income. Meanwhile, Elon is on track to be the first TRILLIONAIRE – with a T. The Republican agenda is BY and FOR the richest people on earth, and they’ll spend BIG to defend their narrow House majority. = = Thank you for your support! – Lorraine Basch, Political Director for Emily Randall for Congress | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: The most impactful thing you can do today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our primary election is on Tuesday, and we’re running out of time and resources to reach the final voters we need to win.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
| | | |
---
| | Peter, we want to give you three reasons why you should chip in $3 to help Roy Cooper win in North Carolina and take back the Senate this November.
---
| | **ONE:** North Carolina’s primary election is on Tuesday, so the general election is about to get underway.
---
| | **TWO:** Roy has never lost a single race – but this is going to be the toughest fight of his career. It’s set to be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
---
| | **THREE:** We must take back the Senate to break the GOP’s hold on Washington – and experts at _Politico_ say it all hinges on flipping North Carolina blue.
---
| | **Donating $3 is the most impactful thing you can do today to help Roy Cooper win in North Carolina and stop extreme Republican chaos.
**
But now it’s up to you, Peter, and all we can do is ask:
---
| | **[Will you make your first donation of $3 to our grassroots Senate campaign today? Only together can we defeat the GOP’s national fundraising machine and flip this critical seat.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6364?t=7&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)**
---
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6365?t=8&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6366?t=9&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6367?t=10&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6368?t=11&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | Thank you for being on our team.

Team Cooper
---
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=2&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=3&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=4&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=658%2E124072%2E90HVwJ)

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: DEADLINE EXTENDED: For the sake of the environment and our democracy, we can’t afford to fall short.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM1MTg0NDgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQyMDAxNTA4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
We’ve got to be honest with you, Peter: at midnight last night, we
didn’t hit our $20,000 goal for February. We’re extending our deadline through midnight tonight to help make up the
difference and fully fund LCV’s critical work ahead. Renew for just $5 before midnight tonight to get your support in under the wire >> https://links.messages.lcv. With Trump and MAGA Republicans working so quickly to ram through as many
anti-environmental actions as they can before November’s midterms — from attacks
on clean air protections to efforts to fast-track fossil fuel projects while
undermining voter rights — we simply cannot scale back our organizing work. Too much is at stake. Please, read our message below and then: renew your LCV membership right now while membership is just $5 to help us cross the finish line >> https://links.messages.lcv. — LCV Membership Team This is it, Peter — our February fundraising deadline expires at midnight tonight. As things stand, we’re still $8,219 behind our $20,000 goal. This goal matters. Right now, the Trump administration is rushing to lock in as many horrific
anti-environment policies as they can before November’s midterms. So we’re
asking: Will you renew your LCV membership right now for just $5 before tonight’s deadline? https://links.messages.lcv. Renewing your LCV membership today costs just $5 and helps: ✅ Support one of the biggest voter registration efforts in history
✅ Recruit grassroots organizers in states across the country to protect the
right to vote
✅ Oppose MAGA legislators’ attempts to rig the midterm elections in their favor
✅ Defend our climate and our democracy from Trump’s dirty agenda We have just hours left. We need your help to respond at the scale this historic
moment demands. Renew your membership for just $5 before midnight tonight to power up our campaigns for a healthy environment and a strong democracy >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. There isn’t much time left, Peter, and missing this goal would mean
dialing back our plans leading up to November, just when we need to be ramping
them up. Thank you for standing with us at this critical moment. Chris Brooks
Vice President, Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13518448&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQyMDAxNTA4MwS2&spReportId=MjQyMDAxNTA4MwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13518448&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQyMDAxNTA4MwS2&spReportId=MjQyMDAxNTA4MwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
