name: Team Talarico
subject: James took a risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
A quick update on the note James sent after our final spending decisions, Peter.
Like James said, we made the risky decision to spend down to $0 ahead of the weekend in an effort to win this race. No regrets. No votes left on the table.
We’ve seen an incredible response from this movement — surging resources into our campaign. So much so that our budget gap is nearly closed.
**[Can you contribute to help get James across the finish line on Tuesday? If enough people give now, you could make the donation that makes the difference.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260301-2-ak&t=1&akid=480%2E1347274%2ESHJLs7)**
Team Talarico
_James’ email from Friday:_
* * *

Peter —
I wanted to follow up on the spending decisions I told you we had to make. As someone who cares about taking back Texas and has invested in this movement, you deserve transparency.
When we talked about our closing strategy, we knew that putting more resources into getting out our message and mobilizing voters would make a significant impact on Tuesday. The race is going to be close, and we can’t leave any stone unturned.
So I told my team that we should spend everything we could — go as close to $0 in our bank account as we could stomach. Leaving a single dollar unspent and coming up short by a few votes would be devastating. Folks put their faith in us to use every resource available, and I take the responsibility very seriously.
We had to move fast and spend big because, as I mentioned, the television and streaming platforms set a deadline for us to pay up front.
So yes, we spent more than we had in the budget, but I gave my team the green light to get our message out in front of the voters who will decide this race in these final days.
It was a risk. But I have faith because I have seen what this team is capable of. I trusted that if I explained my decision to you, enough people who believe in our movement and care about taking back Texas and the Senate majority would come through to fill our budget gap.
**[Please contribute $5 or anything you can to make sure we have the resources to win without making any cuts to our budget. Every dollar will be spent winning votes and getting us across the finish line on Tuesday.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260301-2-ak&t=2&akid=480%2E1347274%2ESHJLs7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

It gives you a break and pays you back. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Let’s be honest — most credit cards cost you money. | But this one? name: Team WFP
subject: Add your name: Stop this war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This war can and must be stopped before it escalates further. | | | Peter, Donald Trump, alongside Benjamin Netanyahu, has launched an illegal war against Iran without either Congressional authorization or the support of the American people. These actions are putting working families, both in the United States and abroad, in increasing danger. The Iranian people deserve self-determination, freedom, dignity, and security for their families. That can only come through a coherent diplomatic strategy, not the haphazard and reckless use of military force. The U.S. government has already spent decades enmeshed in wars in the region, costing trillions of taxpayer dollars, and resulting in the deaths of hundreds of thousands of people.1 Each war has ended up making us less safe and the region less stable. That's why poll after poll shows the vast majority Americans opposing this war, including many within the MAGA coalition.2 **This war can and must be stopped before it escalates further. We are counting on our elected representatives to act now.** **[Add your name now to tell Congress to pass a War Powers Resolution to halt U.S. involvement in this illegal war before it escalates further — we'll follow up with instructions on how to call your member of Congress.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9PM7hvdIAjAGbjq-pZEqrmqYYVPo1DgZBVYj-YKRLkTMI2RanCm7WHSWLXJ9KHeZSZ07WDBQuXGBzbvGOJwbjYIfBUwmx3XqY4E8mHWz2IESawiH2BX4-LjMK2ma3aB0Z821V1cFylW79MTtI-dIRCmlWE26lZlFiHxz2FrboguyFoghp3H8X62T-qr7P45NL-fuJIC2BdBrQhoCsUQkRwS4O_31W0yEgPSgEJuzpijxf4vM60MX8RbVN4-0bCPAtlVVxxUSr6zsC8CHCueysJzoDo0IQhvSiSvqgEOKD35E/4ok/7z4M7j7mQ4WwpUj_q_rT0Q/h0/h001.XWIlGJDD7I5vuH9qKXHMJJWIl_CurZDJVgPZ1DvikWo)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9PM7hvdIAjAGbjq-pZEqrmqYYVPo1DgZBVYj-YKRLkTMI2RanCm7WHSWLXJ9KHeZSZ07WDBQuXGBzbvGOJwbjYIfBUwmx3XqY4E8mHWz2IESawiH2BX4-LjMK2ma3aB0ZsT6yeFs6Zp_DEcd5OIsNypBtYrXpFoh3y6dgx0vVdlLdlPQvqF6tojxpQcZAdVU4uLflbixlWb67yA8iu7_tdvjdy6xdYC4DwREu4tGhuIvnBxzjq7tjCYOdpi1VfnIiiaNL8ls0RR_CbiVUbBldN0IaYXok2p7VX4do9OcLNIs/4ok/7z4M7j7mQ4WwpUj_q_rT0Q/h1/h001.wpSyfs8IkVOQz5Uh6uX-B8QwH0h6YB0f4Fb6G7CmqFE) **[Add your name: No War With Iran](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9PM7hvdIAjAGbjq-pZEqrmqYYVPo1DgZBVYj-YKRLkTMI2RanCm7WHSWLXJ9KHeZSZ07WDBQuXGBzbvGOJwbjYIfBUwmx3XqY4E8mHWz2IESawiH2BX4-LjMK2ma3aB0Zwatx0YnHbcM18lcJpBlNdKX7kwORE7w1jzBD1IvJBJnps8zRuPog1KZg9PEk5klzlDOjs-ugezxWe1ECmZgkNOSrglRoV94YKMxdXytC-QTrtMvBegV3Y2eWwx6-TOKHA7AxYJnRZMFBt53nDQihwqppBu5n3w8rreaM7H84gVk/4ok/7z4M7j7mQ4WwpUj_q_rT0Q/h2/h001.7NoCmm7-sbD_sN1vpbXRpycwFoXavAKkYkPzy12_GSQ)** Republicans in Congress claim we can’t afford health care, food assistance, schools, or infrastructure, while writing blank checks for bombs and defense contractors. Some Democrats in Congress support another regime change war, but are mainly upset that Trump and Netanyahu didn't consult them first. **But working families everywhere should not be asked to sacrifice their lives and livelihoods to prop up demagogues like Trump and Netanyahu, or so that weapons manufacturers can turn a profit.** The American people are clear across party lines: We want peace and diplomacy, not another endless war. It's time our elected representatives listen and act quickly. **[Add your name now: Tell Congress to pass a War Powers Resolution to halt U.S. involvement in this illegal war before it escalates further.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9PM7hvdIAjAGbjq-pZEqrmqYYVPo1DgZBVYj-YKRLkTMI2RanCm7WHSWLXJ9KHeZSZ07WDBQuXGBzbvGOJwbjYIfBUwmx3XqY4E8mHWz2IESawiH2BX4-LjMK2ma3aB0ZyPdo3zWxvZizQS4SMBcDqmU7XvL8JgfBDKCGeEgKqoC4wtEbl7VSYk5gShn0jM3GFE1r3_7Q2fQ43dVHax7VNlQqotJXA6n0IZCLsHwVeDJ9uqQYVLQEOxIb84kte3crM-ZQHkUWRR6rVOXdmTk3UtpOfgB8OD9ErOUeQpF8Tkg/4ok/7z4M7j7mQ4WwpUj_q_rT0Q/h3/h001.rU15BQwMi_4jRIh5Hsv9WtdVRTz74ym3XNZYOCCGGjg)** **[Add your name: No War With Iran](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9PM7hvdIAjAGbjq-pZEqrmqYYVPo1DgZBVYj-YKRLkTMI2RanCm7WHSWLXJ9KHeZSZ07WDBQuXGBzbvGOJwbjYIfBUwmx3XqY4E8mHWz2IESawiH2BX4-LjMK2ma3aB0Z-y-4A9IS0Oe0qgx0CvEO3GC1h-jaz9phDQO448nd35KNMjB4Rrx-1bq_Y4N26QNjtOrAvAYRiITLpuSTh94wkGBLVD_BMNn-pcwxgYTK-6ltN5mETaT_sGuO-8S3YqCI0Dn37Kg5AMJBRKzT5zF3I5NtR-vZwe4b35uUkNI_hK0/4ok/7z4M7j7mQ4WwpUj_q_rT0Q/h4/h001.mXt-XIsediAgez0EkLKtaKodrhaN_EtO3GMipzTzTkA)** Sign on and we'll follow up with instructions on how to contact your member of Congress directly. clean_body: This war can and must be stopped before it escalates further. | | | Peter, Donald Trump, alongside Benjamin Netanyahu, has launched an illegal war against Iran without either Congressional authorization or the support of the American people. These actions are putting working families, both in the United States and abroad, in increasing danger. The Iranian people deserve self-determination, freedom, dignity, and security for their families. That can only come through a coherent diplomatic strategy, not the haphazard and reckless use of military force. The U.S. government has already spent decades enmeshed in wars in the region, costing trillions of taxpayer dollars, and resulting in the deaths of hundreds of thousands of people.1 Each war has ended up making us less safe and the region less stable. That's why poll after poll shows the vast majority Americans opposing this war, including many within the MAGA coalition.2 This war can and must be stopped before it escalates further. We are counting on our elected representatives to act now. Republicans in Congress claim we can’t afford health care, food assistance, schools, or infrastructure, while writing blank checks for bombs and defense contractors. Some Democrats in Congress support another regime change war, but are mainly upset that Trump and Netanyahu didn't consult them first. But working families everywhere should not be asked to sacrifice their lives and livelihoods to prop up demagogues like Trump and Netanyahu, or so that weapons manufacturers can turn a profit. The American people are clear across party lines: We want peace and diplomacy, not another endless war. It's time our elected representatives listen and act quickly. Sign on and we'll follow up with instructions on how to contact your member of Congress directly. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Watson School of International and Public Affairs, Brown University, September 1, 2021 2\. , Strength in Numbers, February 28, 2026 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . # [PA-13 in Action](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/03/01/pa-13-in-action/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on March 1, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 03.01.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=04b676d4368542eb8af13d9e8d8709fc0284d8e76aca35ee4b39abf4d67388e3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=14d8ff4461671224a5efd02102678933&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)**
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: Jack Stansbury
---
Many thanks for a fantastic meeting of Democrats at The Links at Gettysburg on Sunday. I met several voters who enthusiastically signed my petitions in order to appear on the Democratic primary ballot for the May 19th Primary Election.
---
Together, we CHOOSE DEMOCRACY!
---
| | | |
---
On Tuesday, while our convicted felon of a president yammered incessantly last night about the people he hates, I spoke to voters at the Bedford County Democratic Committee meeting and soup contest about:
---
– protecting our sacred right to vote,
---
– expanding our freedom to create the families we choose,
---
– raising the federal minimum wage from a poverty wage to a livable one,
---
– and more.
---
It was a great night of soup and spirit.
---
Meanwhile, in two PA House Districts, Democrats retained their seats with eye-popping outperformances of +34 and +17.
---
This is because voters in that area recognize what a colossal threat the Republican party under Trump is to our beloved Keystone State.
---
And so they’re voting accordingly.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fd7228681d3d7a83d8a48b955c965d9db09a2690d44293f13003dac3293724f9&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=935a80e318b0d99428249212e3676723&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)
---
Photo credit: Bedford Dems
---
Photo credits: Jack Stansbury
---
[https://www.instagram.com/p/DVQ5cWBkQt2/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f072c831de6d354c6b9ebfd1d9fb92fe95fb8d98306ddf9b46c2e6efa8bc7149&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=dd05bbe22476e1b8dae4e1ee87c085c6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9wL0RWUTVjV0JrUXQyLw=&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c) | IT’S STILL PETITION SEASON!!
---
PLEASE GET THOSE SIGNATURES OF SUPPORT FOR THE CANDIDATES YOU WANT TO SEE ON YOUR PRIMARY BALLOT.
---
Because candidates in Pennsylvania need signatures of support to appear on the ballots for the primary election, it is important to connect with the different county Democratic committees in order to learn about petition signing events or how to circulate a petition. I need 1000 signatures, for example, as do Governor Josh Shapiro and Lt. Governor Austin Davis in order to appear on the Democratic ballot of the May 19th Primary Election.
---
Please follow the link below in order to reach out to the committee of the county in which you reside:
---
[https://www.padems.org/county-parties/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8bc5f4da31a8d52e27123f71d6b1d1ea921d391e8b33a08a5621d94a67bc83fb&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=af4a4bdba8b1dd5e34934c4b1b984a2a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)
---
| | |
---
**Because Republicans in Congress refuse to honor their oaths to the US Constitution and therefore, the American People, they let a rogue president begin a war that was not in his power to do, unleashing more violence and much instability around the world.**
---
**Enjoy those low gas prices and stock market highs while they last.**
---
**You can fire our Trumpian bootlicker of a US Representative by voting for me in the general election in November.**
---
**You can send a strong message before then by voting for me in the Primary election.**
---
**Registered Democrats, I’ll be on our ballot so please vote for me.**
---
**Registered Republicans – write in my name on your Republican primary ballot and fill in the corresponding oval instead of voting for Traitor Joyce!**
---
Together, we [**#ChooseDemocracy**](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7473280708295fb5ed1e16d07ce04b0a3e8e7e7aed086bfdfa95589180cf21b6&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=0bc27f68ae2964962d70c184010cbf1c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c) not autocracy!
---
[https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/business/energy-environment/oil-gas-iran-attack.html](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e41436b804a67a84a9030e4eed8d23717e54bcf62fd83b60ac45de40251dde5a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=834eeb40480103a7a2be2dcca41c388e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyNi8wMi8yOC9idXNpbmVzcy9lbmVyZ3ktZW52aXJvbm1lbnQvb2lsLWdhcy1pcmFuLWF0dGFjay5odG1s&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)
---

---|---|---
| |
---|---|---
---
This weekend has been a whirlwind of petition signings and refreshments, petition signings and pancakes, petition signings and soup, and petition signings and chili. Many, many thanks to Blair, Perry, Mifflin, and Franklin County Democratic Committees for their excellent events that saw great attendance and full tummies. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy! and good food!
---
Photo credits: Eileen Roberts, Jack Stansbury, Christina Palensky
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: yours truly
---
Can you guess who used my microphone today?
---
Together, we #ChooseDemocracy!
---
| **Legislative Comparison**
---
Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison and why!
---
| **Legislation**| **Joyce’s vote**| **US House Result**| **How Beth would have voted**| **Rationale for Beth’s vote**
---|---|---|---|---
[HR 4758 – Homeowner Energy Freedom Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=80bdab378478eaaa0b4628e8f9d03648412bbd521b981d9c6b19a45251c929de&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=547122e4af782e7926a935537a86b0f0&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80NzU4L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| This Bill repeals many home efficiency programs that helped homeowners save energy by ending: the high-efficiency electric home rebate program, efficiency contractor training grants, funding for specific state building codes.
[HR 4626 – Don’t Mess With My Home Appliances Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f1eb54b8bac2e651d5fdba3d0122ba2cf2757f625611861642470234ff61422c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1e4952455d15feed2ae8bde084230228&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80NjI2L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| The Bill eliminates the DOE look back for reviewing and making periodic standards every six years in addition to revoking standards of efficiency.
[HR 6329 – Information Quality Assurance Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f19e0569e496ddbb3ef10795d0ff29bddc769bbe4c7be8ac78042657ac65c8cf&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=8b1fe8dc10930fca00beee60ae40d63f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82MzI5L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| Yes| It’s just common sense to for the Office of Management and Budget to revise policy and require federal agencies to rely on the best reasonably available information and evidence.
[S 2503 – Rotorcraft Operations Transparency and Oversight Reform (ROTOR) Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=40075b4178ab5c0a09638519cd4cdc8739b4b444ef0b507da2cd8dd0c4b4fea2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=26b80ffb9a11be8e96e0ddfc2d5f01bd&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvMjUwMy90ZXh0&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| No| Failed| Yes| Relatives of those killed in the January 2025 crash supported this bipartisan Senate Bill because it is more stringent than the Graves House Bill.
[HR 2189 – Law-Enforcement Innovate to De-Escalate Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=56fa5bd3ca4386d2080380b74a04c416d1607c28bdc5df65292eef6b559db7ae&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fa9ffe1563ef0b229b7a3619abb85b9f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yMTg5L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| While less-than-lethal weapons are ostensibly less lethal than many firearms, they can still be lethal, especially when converted through kits designed for that pu
rpose. Repealing the power of the Gun Control Act to now allow convicted criminals, including domestic abusers, to create these “ghost guns” increases danger to American communities, especially by those who have not changed their ways.
[H J Res 72 – Relating to a national emergency by the President on February 1, 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b71038205d82e9760b3a1121e0b2e2d096fc8b11b08ec5acb88430c9edfed798&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b6109ab91f69065126908566717c797d&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi83Mi90ZXh0&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| No| Passed| Yes| Agree with Rep. Bacon that Trump’s unjustified tariffs on China, Mexico, and Canada “have been a ‘net negative’ for the economy and are a significant tax that American consumers, manufacturers, and farmers are paying.” and that “Article I of the Constitution places authority over taxes and tariffs with Congress for a reason, but for too long, we have handed that authority to the executive branch. It’s time for Congress to reclaim that responsibility.”
[S 1383 – Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fac06d0cfc4cf5e8b315a5bcafde913d5753ad58b9a2e592bf69973251b5501f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=74bcc9a04d1ee4aa8bd030af27576897&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvMTM4My90ZXh0&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed | No| Suppresses the votes of married women especially whose names do not match those on their birth certificates by requiring passports as proof of citizenship instead, in the event of registration for change of address, name change, change of political party, or unjust removal from voter rolls. Cost and burden of passport is virtually poll tax with disparate impact against women.
[HR 1531 – Pressure Regulatory Organizations To End Chinese Threats to (PROTECT) Taiwan Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b2d74f79fe5071420dc1d180c1375a2381b37d1ea494b8bafc2997acca66656e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b8615aa1e26c5b1f362b724e89aa31a2&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8xNTMxL3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Requires Department of the Treasury, the Federal Reserve, and the Securities and Exchange Commission to exclude China from the Group of Twenty;
the Bank for International Settlements;
the Financial Stability Board;
the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision;
the International Association of Insurance Supervisors; and
the International Organization of Securities Commissions, if China poses threat to Tawain or US interests.
[HR 6644 – To increase the supply of housing in America, and for other purposes](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=21c948d92064dacf1d0530ae23fe81b281f7be41ba2a7f617d4bd1eab02718ce&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d257b90641a7c5c88c0abd9d42a69df3&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82NjQ0L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Expanding available finance programs for affordable housing. Restricts veterans’ disability benefits from being considered as source of income.
[H J Res 142 – Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2d10778fe9f47f5848d33a128a7af6e5b5d10df0e37acdb8c7ca96452419e55b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ce45ca7119a2ce5e07caf7a1ee29a70c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi8xNDIvdGV4dA=&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| OBBBA decreased DC’s “overall stability and revenue streams of economic base” and the decoupling was allowable through Home Rule.
[HR 4090 – Critical Mineral Dominance Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5a5f1d46d4277ccc8c218cf7ab456b3754bfe58f646d0ec456c0355b7cbf5f30&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7b32267c43c6f0cff2f9382ed4036366&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80MDkwL3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| Sweetheart deals to foreign mining corporations is contrary to American interests and security. Nor should we violate our protected public and tribal lands to do it.
[HR 7148 – Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2026](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4aebc9f09bb75fd2983cec5bb9cbd52f9fb53d3b58873adc537a19617161660f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=44c40f83dae164baf6322e7a9da7e052&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC83MTQ4L3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| No| Because there has been no correction of masked agents of I.C.E. using lethal force for imaginary reasons, I.C.E. must be abolished. It is unconscionable that the United States keep supplying funding to masked agents of the state who murder Americans on our public streets with no accountability. This is contrary to ideals born of the American Revolution.
[HR 3123 – Ernest Peltz Accrued Veterans Benefits Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=01c8842391324beb3a17f4dc05141c5fffeb4d4317703789816c89b70feb7dc2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6456&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b124d0c37c61f965b7ba251d5979611d&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8zMTIzL3RleHQ&email_id=d3931ad765ee661f441fdc09465f7b3c)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Living dependents of the veteran who died deserve the pension payment that was destined to him/her, yet unpaid.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth

clean_body: District Round-up 03.01.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you... | | | | | or ---|---|--- By Elizabeth Farnham on March 1, 2026 | District Round-up 03.01.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: | | | Photo credit: Jack Stansbury Many thanks for a fantastic meeting of Democrats at The Links at Gettysburg on Sunday. I met several voters who enthusiastically signed my petitions in order to appear on the Democratic primary ballot for the May 19th Primary Election. Together, we CHOOSE DEMOCRACY! | | | | On Tuesday, while our convicted felon of a president yammered incessantly last night about the people he hates, I spoke to voters at the Bedford County Democratic Committee meeting and soup contest about: – protecting our sacred right to vote, – expanding our freedom to create the families we choose, – raising the federal minimum wage from a poverty wage to a livable one, – and more. It was a great night of soup and spirit. Meanwhile, in two PA House Districts, Democrats retained their seats with eye-popping outperformances of +34 and +17. This is because voters in that area recognize what a colossal threat the Republican party under Trump is to our beloved Keystone State. And so they’re voting accordingly. Together, we Photo credit: Bedford Dems Photo credits: Jack Stansbury | IT’S STILL PETITION SEASON!! PLEASE GET THOSE SIGNATURES OF SUPPORT FOR THE CANDIDATES YOU WANT TO SEE ON YOUR PRIMARY BALLOT. Because candidates in Pennsylvania need signatures of support to appear on the ballots for the primary election, it is important to connect with the different county Democratic committees in order to learn about petition signing events or how to circulate a petition. I need 1000 signatures, for example, as do Governor Josh Shapiro and Lt. Governor Austin Davis in order to appear on the Democratic ballot of the May 19th Primary Election. Please follow the link below in order to reach out to the committee of the county in which you reside: | | | Because Republicans in Congress refuse to honor their oaths to the US Constitution and therefore, the American People, they let a rogue president begin a war that was not in his power to do, unleashing more violence and much instability around the world. Enjoy those low gas prices and stock market highs while they last. You can fire our Trumpian bootlicker of a US Representative by voting for me in the general election in November. You can send a strong message before then by voting for me in the Primary election. Registered Democrats, I’ll be on our ballot so please vote for me. Registered Republicans – write in my name on your Republican primary ballot and fill in the corresponding oval instead of voting for Traitor Joyce! Together, we not autocracy! | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- This weekend has been a whirlwind of petition signings and refreshments, petition signings and pancakes, petition signings and soup, and petition signings and chili. Many, many thanks to Blair, Perry, Mifflin, and Franklin County Democratic Committees for their excellent events that saw great attendance and full tummies. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy! and good food! Photo credits: Eileen Roberts, Jack Stansbury, Christina Palensky | | | Photo credit: yours truly Can you guess who used my microphone today? Repealing the power of the Gun Control Act to now allow convicted criminals, including domestic abusers, to create these “ghost guns” increases danger to American communities, especially by those who have not changed their ways. | No| Passed| Yes| Agree with Rep. Bacon that Trump’s unjustified tariffs on China, Mexico, and Canada “have been a ‘net negative’ for the economy and are a significant tax that American consumers, manufacturers, and farmers are paying.” and that “Article I of the Constitution places authority over taxes and tariffs with Congress for a reason, but for too long, we have handed that authority to the executive branch. | | | | | Trump is on fire!

Since coming to office, he's managed to:

* Established the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)...
* Created the National Energy Dominance Council to boost U.S. oil and gas production...
* Withdrew the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement and the World Health Organization

But now, he might have finally met his match.

33-year Wall Street veteran Dylan Jovine says Trump has inherited five problems that are so massive...

Even Trump and his all-star cabinet picks won't be able to fix them.

If Jovine is right, these five cracks in the U.S. economy could cause the market to crash 50%...

Real estate to drop 40%...

And unemployment to triple.

That's why Jovine has moved seven-figures of his own money _out_ of the stock market and _into_ a "safe-haven" asset class.

We're not talking about stocks, traditional bonds, gold, crypto or any asset you've likely heard of.

It's a "safe haven" asset that's favored by billionaire investors.

**Warren Buffett** has moved almost a quarter-trillion dollars into this "safe haven" asset.

**Elon Musk** calls it a "no-brainer"...

And **Bill Ackman** \- who once turned $27 million into $2.7 billion on a single trade - is heavily invested in this asset class too.

Are they seeing the same warning signs Jovine is seeing?

If he's right, the actions you take in the next 90 days could be critical to your retirement.

clean_body: Trump is on fire! Since coming to office, he's managed to: Established the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)... Created the National Energy Dominance Council to boost U.S. oil and gas production...| | | | | | | | Trump is on fire! Since coming to office, he's managed to: Established the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)... Created the National Energy Dominance Council to boost U.S. oil and gas production... Withdrew the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement and the World Health Organization But now, he might have finally met his match. 33-year Wall Street veteran Dylan Jovine says Trump has inherited five problems that are so massive... Even Trump and his all-star cabinet picks won't be able to fix them. If Jovine is right, these five cracks in the U.S. economy could cause the market to crash 50%... Real estate to drop 40%... And unemployment to triple. That's why Jovine has moved seven-figures of his own money out of the stock market and into a "safe-haven" asset class. We're not talking about stocks, traditional bonds, gold, crypto or any asset you've likely heard of. It's a "safe haven" asset that's favored by billionaire investors. Warren Buffett has moved almost a quarter-trillion dollars into this "safe haven" asset. Elon Musk calls it a "no-brainer"... And Bill Ackman \- who once turned $27 million into $2.7 billion on a single trade - is heavily invested in this asset class too. Are they seeing the same warning signs Jovine is seeing? If he's right, the actions you take in the next 90 days could be critical to your retirement. Sincerely, Victoria Tino, Director Behind the Markets P.S. Dylan Jovine predicted the 2008 crash over a year before it happened. Folks who listened to him had the chance to walk away with gains as high as 235%, 459%, and 700% \- all while the stock market got cut in half. Could he be right again? | | |

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: Mark Levin goes nuclear:
body:
“Are you ready, America!?”
Mark Levin just went nuclear, and he asked a question we can no longer ignore:
| | | | |
---
Dear Faithful Friend,
Mark Levin just went nuclear, and he asked a question we can no longer ignore: **
**_**"You ready, America?"**_
**Because what's happening in Texas isn't just a state issue anymore – it’s becoming Ground Zero in the battle for Western civilization.** _
_**All across Europe, countries are rapidly losing their identities as a result of unfettered mass migration with no assimilation.** **
** Parallel societies have begun to emerge and they are incompatible – one based upon Western, Judeo-Christian values, and one based upon Sharia Law, or Islamic Law.
**You could say this is just a European problem, but Sharia is the primary driver of Christian persecution across the planet, and it’s begun to gain a foothold right here in America.** **_
_** On a recent show, a retired Texas police lieutenant blew the whistle directly to Levin._**He revealed details about EPIC City – a proposed Sharia-compliant "Islamic mega-city" being planned on roughly 400 acres in Texas.** Critics claim it's designed to function separately from American society, operating under Sharia principles rather than U.S. law._ _
___Mark's response was unequivocal:__ __
______**“Sharia Law has no place in the United States of America.”**____ ____**
**____ And yet, other shocking examples keep coming, including Sharia materials and hijabs (veils) being distributed in some Texas schools.
**Now it’s time for citizens to have their say, because on March 3rd, Texas Republicans will vote on a ballot initiative declaring "Texas should ban Sharia Law."** **
** In the lead-up to this vote, political leaders in Texas have been fighting hard:
* Governor Greg Abbott has designated CAIR and the Muslim Brotherhood as foreign terrorist organizations.
* Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick urged Texas Senate committees to make preventing Sharia law influence a top priority for possible 2027 legislation.
* Attorney General Ken Paxton is investigating Islamic developments for violations of Texas law.
* U.S. Congressmen Keith Self and Chip Roy launched the Sharia-Free America Caucus with 33 members from 18 states.

[ **But one big name is missing –** __**YOURS**__**– and we at Save the Persecuted Christians need you in this fight before time runs out.** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b7d1028cdb64ee0ad9b1e47a6ffb523&_e=jwurG2LCt9-Szm2oEe7xJ85S8XkmZArMcAag2AZb3FggsJqaLAWWsnSWeOQVnRMizWH8B6nLIsuU3b-4IjHOujfXhQj8taaL23MfjydWXdtetdjG4-Tg4O6wro0tNCaik2r1VNreIVALRJLiGAHXWO8P5zKY_SgHGYl83CobuBKfgjpsrIC2heWiMDD9mbNIN7Z5jFmk_k-6a1IpH1wziWQ_87LF0n1CLBJ9jLMI07U-MsoaVO3102Si_RNiexqv6fEUP6ADXp1F68SaRAEH-O3hogahbosw0aYiAqsIntM2-y2DG4marl2g-3CrSNY2tLUiRsD75Zntu_d7juaC_jx-Kbk0sz7imdhO1PyWm_kS9LOXW1spyUMbl2Tb_C7glBW46diUkrJlIYgN6XxBgxUvXkIiawTYVjoa70JaLlEgdr5QcvObGd3OlMc0Ds6k9lE_dOKbl4veHbatZkcgyHOqrc9CzVTNBgmWNjG8_xsXsN2o3Kilq9p906qkQe5179cuh3-SYcNSxUvNIrUU0FJ-tfvV0tuwoVnVhJqVrbHUGzUmU17gKGTzMCZ33g5mGB27e7guPK24GjfDoiaZwbEFxcxutL8PO8yRe_1o1iGTYFEknaLdZdCpIPbRBzv2UhNO1CsTVhddrKRq51ik2UAacpGz-li2TRXJ8g8elHUXvzMpR_ea4yzPYxkqhCS8)
Whereas Sharia is the primary driver of Christian persecution worldwide, we are directly involved in the effort to educate Texans (and all Americans) about this growing threat to our sovereignty, our Constitution, and our most fundamental freedoms.
[ **If you believe Sharia must be banned in Texas – and all across America – sign your name immediately.** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b7d1028cdb64ee0ad9b1e47a6ffb523&_e=jwurG2LCt9-Szm2oEe7xJ85S8XkmZArMcAag2AZb3FggsJqaLAWWsnSWeOQVnRMizWH8B6nLIsuU3b-4IjHOujfXhQj8taaL23MfjydWXdtetdjG4-Tg4O6wro0tNCaik2r1VNreIVALRJLiGAHXWO8P5zKY_SgHGYl83CobuBKfgjpsrIC2heWiMDD9mbNIN7Z5jFmk_k-6a1IpH1wziWQ_87LF0n1CLBJ9jLMI07U-MsoaVO3102Si_RNiexqvMSnFXtECh8WTUCeIN0xbPgGp3-di9L92tOJdY_bV7kby6K2MxC8R9xzo23Ulx2F_pcVgzrEQMgxlK1iuSM67VzfQo9uTACj6my-UUFFSNgFNiWQyCzu9XSCOMPnyqHX75alT37zZCjQeV93c2KW-o00ixMfWY63toiM5E1T3FeujQGi5muib8nYVTvQK6ISOAOGB-eXSUDobmS4WaWxFkmQ4ZlooMMBwTIWGo5AM47bZUPNcU1fZ7QH1yGP3_Uc6nxpkRXmZcIDzorjyrjsVkqYl0FLZV0jRO64yOUoTG0KUKd059voHTPxtBSGZa1QywsijmTJcbhmuuIPcugEot8pr7CVqXKOxYdxeHHs3P97z0GoPmXag7Hb8_gTOLzCbqrSltxyNLCUTagguUQascbhC_nkvUNX7QFuV6-ZIzOGiFdxcu3hDWBd9CZJP-0T2)
[SIGN NOW](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b7d1028cdb64ee0ad9b1e47a6ffb523&_e=jwurG2LCt9-Szm2oEe7xJ85S8XkmZArMcAag2AZb3FggsJqaLAWWsnSWeOQVnRMizWH8B6nLIsuU3b-4IjHOujfXhQj8taaL23MfjydWXdtetdjG4-Tg4O6wro0tNCaik2r1VNreIVALRJLiGAHXWO8P5zKY_SgHGYl83CobuBKfgjpsrIC2heWiMDD9mbNIN7Z5jFmk_k-6a1IpH1wziWQ_87LF0n1CLBJ9jLMI07U-MsoaVO3102Si_RNiexqv4u1_WHvGIwzp8gQjpmZnEgjK-d_H9TA6_K6QZhHacwabmi0dL1DYjGEoQrHjS8sq-ZrUVmhf3aH4AkN0tEWceyJNzm1kdj4tz3ny0wtn51orvUEjMNhijmwvrvvjd3tQMv2bOXdkqvDV--Eni_QiWExKgLzLrnh_jNcbIpEB-ZdnJ_T18CHwwjEHKtSzk91YeNj55vavLKrjWIT9bGmGykIi0tS15xzr-7YVGTMdAKuPH1tvBMcxayk6-q-Tsn-l6nTHROdRFHPMgw5VMA9skQ4wBJhdEdqw9ICbaDyx3QyAc_seZSQOrnsGEHukja9myFuUtcH0vXDn53F0I11epDmaEGXvM08LxC4dWRHUSiczufMuuR2eZ5AeSuYkWS4RPQ5o_YZLVzfS0BDhXWUnfgAWZz2Tcch1DloTkQ1TMpDwGBOnerk1Le9U65Y36S7W)
Our Constitution, our Judeo-Christian values, and the very tenets of Western civilization don’t defend themselves. That’s our job, and those who want to see them destroyed are already hard at work.**** As Mark Levin asked, “are you ready, America?”
**The time to start answering that question is now, and we need your help by March 3rd. **
In His name, Save the Persecuted Christians

|

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Thank you in advance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
We know your email was flooded with donation requests from various causes, candidates, and organizations, and we appreciate you letting Jon Ossoff’s Senate campaign be one of them.
#

Peter - Wow!
We can’t thank you enough for supporting Jon Ossoff’s campaign through our February fundraising push.
We know your inbox was likely flooded with donation requests from various causes, candidates, and organizations, and we appreciate you letting Jon’s Senate campaign be one of them.
_And trust us, we know folks are not always in a place to give, so when you do, we never take that for granted._
**We also wanted to take the opportunity to thank you in advance.**
Last month was tough. Donald Trump came to Georgia and personally attacked Jon.
On top of that, the millions that the GOP already spent against Jon are ramping up into a full-fledged onslaught of attacks and lies heading up to Election Day.
Jon is going to need _**a lot**_ of support, which means we’ll be calling on this team to volunteer, attend important events, and yes, chip in to messages like this one from time to time.
Every dollar we are able to raise and every message we send, will be _critical_ to securing a victory here in Georgia and regaining Congressional control to put a stop to the Trump agenda.
_**So if you are able to support Jon, we promise we will put every dollar we raise into fending off attacks, sharing Jon’s message, and fighting like hell to win in November.**_
Peter, we can’t thank you enough for your support so far, and we are looking forward to having you by our side this year.
Thank you!
Jon Ossoff for Senate

_👋 Wait! Before you go... 👋_
Jon Ossoff is facing the most important and competitive Senate race in the nation this year. MAGA has already made him their #1 target and will be looking for any vulnerability to attack him and flip this seat red.
**It is very important that we show Trump, our opponents, and the media that our campaign is fired up and ready to start March strong.**
[**Please use this link to give $5 or whatever you can to Jon’s reelection campaign. Thank you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260301-1-f&t=1&akid=1753%2E5691347%2E5p6ju-)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260301-1-f&t=2&akid=1753%2E5691347%2E5p6ju-)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=1753%2E5691347%2E5p6ju-) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1753%2E5691347%2E5p6ju-) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:

| Peter,
---
